clean_body: UPDATE: UPDATE | Friends, The latest from here in Arizona: Biden is forcing Arizona to pay $76 million to take DOWN a border wall made of shipping containers. And this comes AFTER Arizona taxpayers paid over $100 million to put this wall UP. This kind of wasteful, backward spending would NEVER have happened under Kari Lake. That’s why we need to keep fighting. We will NOT stop until our sovereignty is regained. Because right now, it’s being replaced with fentanyl, illegal immigration, sex trafficking, and HUMAN SUFFERING. Because watching Katie Hobbs take office is like a trainwreck — we don’t want to see it but we just can’t turn away. It’s a disaster unfolding before our very eyes. Thank you so much, Kari Lake HQ | Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc.

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: U.S. Drops $4.5 Mil on Culturally Appropriate Program to Help Asians Quit Smoking
body:
The U.S. government is dedicating $4.5 million to enhance a
“linguistically and culturally appropriate” program to help Asians
quit smoking.

[alt_text]

[*****]
January 11, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61751&L=28713&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdXMtZHJvcHMtNC01LW1pbC1vbi1wcm9ncmFtLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUNNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRA==]

The U.S. government is dedicating $4.5 million to enhance a
“linguistically and culturally appropriate” program to help Asians
quit smoking. It is known as the national Asian language quitline and
provides cessation counseling, nicotine replacement therapy (NRT), and
in-language materials for tobacco users who speak Chinese, Korean, and
Vietnamese (CKV). The cash will flow through a Centers for Disease
Control (CDC) offshoot called Office on Smoking and Health. With an
annual budget of nearly $10 billion, the CDC is the federal agency
responsible for protecting public health. It operates under the

clean_body: The U.S. government is dedicating $4.5 million to enhance a “linguistically and culturally appropriate” program to help Asians quit smoking. [alt_text] [*****] January 11, 2023 [article-image] [==] The U.S. government is dedicating $4.5 million to enhance a “linguistically and culturally appropriate” program to help Asians quit smoking. It is known as the national Asian language quitline and provides cessation counseling, nicotine replacement therapy (NRT), and in-language materials for tobacco users who speak Chinese, Korean, and Vietnamese (CKV). The cash will flow through a Centers for Disease Control (CDC) offshoot called Office on Smoking and Health. With an annual budget of nearly $10 billion, the CDC is the federal agency responsible for protecting public health. It operates under the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) and claims to work around the clock to protect America from health, safety, and security threats whether diseases start at home or abroad. Team -- A major poll by AARP shows that Americans almost **_universally_** support Social Security!

**But despite its widespread popularity, key Republican senators have hatched a plan to GUT Social Security behind closed doors.**

Millions of Americans depend on the Social Security benefits **_they earned_** through decades of hard work -- so we've launched an urgent LIVE POLL to confirm the AARP’s numbers. **We still need 13 responses from 18326 -- tell us where you stand before the poll expires at MIDNIGHT:**

**Do you support Social Security?**

name: Senate Republicans
subject: Calling it quits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fe3d243b51c444d7ad3820adc8a10cff&_e=IdN3rCJwjfYdJpcV4HlWwTB6bPO5SFidmV-mxZ1oHTpESlYAp9FYNdhAitazAMCFVPU-e9jlgaTJ3t4P0Eodi9hPL00CztR0JemKP4xJecAPwwgsUTA-MZoLI_-_ROw1xIGvhj6IYhzB7pQU0rgJB7i0CUbb2AAw6PKakXAqHU5JkCHCk4XbIyQTcF_8hzyAr19skV2YW-JO2xAX1fvrtMF1sm8t32YLElW7v6Ym64Kfd7B-XO4rfoOdmHnzMCPADz9TwVP0LchIMXHi6p2i-n654xmVqk3kgL9NfEYc9jrlffYEhRMo_j_g63-fubRe2FKa6R700r8b8AHcvBt6TIR9cIPburRVY4LgXUuBn946vD-AmGG-a-sOSigDxmwmNNL838IIRZP3s2r18WjlnG93tjyHg1-jj8VS7jpQ4AE7RH8BD4i4blN4xL7EIMalRKFgptDYyI0UdvKE49FxVg%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

This is no doubt this is a big news week, so you may have missed the announcement that Michigan Democrat Debbie Stabenow is calling it quits, opening another path for Republicans to retake the Senate in 2024.

The veteran Democrat’s decision to forgo a 5th term is an ominous sign for Democrats; she would have been the favorite to win reelection, but something spooked her. When Stabenow last ran for reelection in 2018, she won by a comfortable 6.5 margin. Could it be that the senior Michigan Democrat was afraid Biden’s approval rating would drag her down? Or could it be that she knows that if Republicans put up a strong presidential nominee, her fate would have finally been sealed?

**Whatever the real reason behind Debbie Stabenow’s retirement, we’ll never know. What is clear is this: the odds of flipping the Michigan Senate seat now favor Republican.**

**We know that there is nearly two years between now and Election Day, however,[ it would be malpractice if we didn’t begin to raise the money we need to win, today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fe3d243b51c444d7ad3820adc8a10cff&_e=IdN3rCJwjfYdJpcV4HlWwTB6bPO5SFidmV-mxZ1oHTpESlYAp9FYNdhAitazAMCFVPU-e9jlgaTJ3t4P0Eodi9hPL00CztR0JemKP4xJecAPwwgsUTA-MZoLI_-_ROw1xIGvhj6IYhzB7pQU0rgJB7i0CUbb2AAw6PKakXAqHU5JkCHCk4XbIyQTcF_8hzyAr19skV2YW-JO2xAX1fvrtMF1sm8t32YLElW7v6Ym64Kfd7B-XO4rfoOdmHnzMCPADz9TwVP0LchIMXHi6p2i-n654xmVqk3kgL9NfEYc9jrlffYEhRMo_j_g63-fubRejKfyRUwUZPGKZox0vs5fRbbuAEoKfFlTeVsfKF7yWNafI67i5VmBm5zrN_as5Ticc3pjW99KxzQbBYypzzx0zUEYki0i3RiAahOIuNFC3NGSZo2NXjefxdkYZU1xhXylnDiCEFRtACWb4zOI1MfYKA%3D%3D)**

**The last time Republicans contested a Michigan Senate seat, total spending surpassed $98 MILLION. The Republican nominee (John James) came within 1.5 points of knocking out the incumbent, despite more than $51 million in attacks against him.**
[**Today, we’re asking for your help to get a head start on our fundraising for this race.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fe3d243b51c444d7ad3820adc8a10cff&_e=IdN3rCJwjfYdJpcV4HlWwTB6bPO5SFidmV-mxZ1oHTpESlYAp9FYNdhAitazAMCFVPU-e9jlgaTJ3t4P0Eodi9hPL00CztR0JemKP4xJecAPwwgsUTA-MZoLI_-_ROw1xIGvhj6IYhzB7pQU0rgJB7i0CUbb2AAw6PKakXAqHU5JkCHCk4XbIyQTcF_8hzyAr19skV2YW-JO2xAX1fvrtMF1sm8t32YLElW7v6Ym64Kfd7B-XO4rfoOdmHnzMCPADz9TwVP0LchIMXHi6p2i-n654xmVqk3kgL9NfEYc9jrlffYEhRMo_j_g63-fubRetqgFj1IK8UitpDFQkugGSKIXS8QAXvI4fHwQ8rbja7lAi-W8TgaedaG7zZRZijxSk0B2Yri75pez-zONH-dai0iojEX_K2UXgLHCpSxsAgX99ILrPqB-Mfh6tlCcAxmtE3UT0o7OhXB3X9JM5qInmA%3D%3D) Democrats are likely to coalesce around a candidate soon, so it’s important we use this time while they don’t one candidate to get ahead of them.

[**If you can chip in $9 right now**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=fe3d243b51c444d7ad3820adc8a10cff&_e=IdN3rCJwjfYdJpcV4HlWwTB6bPO5SFidmV-mxZ1oHTpESlYAp9FYNdhAitazAMCFVPU-e9jlgaTJ3t4P0Eodi9hPL00CztR0JemKP4xJecAPwwgsUTA-MZoLI_-_ROw1xIGvhj6IYhzB7pQU0rgJB7i0CUbb2AAw6PKakXAqHU5JkCHCk4XbIyQTcF_8hzyAr19skV2YW-JO2xAX1fvrtMF1sm8t32YLElW7v6Ym64Kfd7B-XO4rfoOdmHnzMCPADz9TwVP0LchIMXHi6p2i-n654xmVqk3kgL9NfEYc9jrlffYEhRMo_j_g63-fubRenWH-W7BJU4KIX7aTqhyQDd-m9DYhxMae5OG1IsRnMpC97cV3-9KoFA1uQreKvLQuZqcMSKmq6scbzzeg_sF_1JddiLIMdIgKhDBrMWzLyYUuLgtE6WEUYMQ05FSlBctsqCUynVuT8P1Pic-i9xNtWA%3D%3D), would you please do so? The next race is going to be even more expensive than the last. That means we cannot afford to wait until next year to start thinking about how we’re going to flip this battleground seat.

clean_body: Fellow American, This is no doubt this is a big news week, so you may have missed the announcement that Michigan Democrat Debbie Stabenow is calling it quits, opening another path for Republicans to retake the Senate in 2024. The veteran Democrat’s decision to forgo a 5th term is an ominous sign for Democrats; she would have been the favorite to win reelection, but something spooked her. When Stabenow last ran for reelection in 2018, she won by a comfortable 6.5 margin. Could it be that the senior Michigan Democrat was afraid Biden’s approval rating would drag her down? Or could it be that she knows that if Republicans put up a strong presidential nominee, her fate would have finally been sealed? Whatever the real reason behind Debbie Stabenow’s retirement, we’ll never know. What is clear is this: the odds of flipping the Michigan Senate seat now favor Republican. We know that there is nearly two years between now and Election Day, however, The last time Republicans contested a Michigan Senate seat, total spending surpassed $98 MILLION. The Republican nominee (John James) came within 1.5 points of knocking out the incumbent, despite more than $51 million in attacks against him. Democrats are likely to coalesce around a candidate soon, so it’s important we use this time while they don’t one candidate to get ahead of them. , would you please do so? The next race is going to be even more expensive than the last. That means we cannot afford to wait until next year to start thinking about how we’re going to flip this battleground seat. Thank you, Senate Republicans If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. | Friend,
Remember when the Left couldn’t stop screaming about how Russia “rigged” the 2016 election?
You and I knew it was a lie all along...and now, **a major study from New York University confirms that “RUSSIA RUSSIA RUSSIA” was an election-denying “Big Lie” from the very beginning.**
The entire Russian Collusion Delusion was a sham and so was the phony impeachment Democrats used to defame and shame President Trump.
It’s time we get retribution for the Democrats' frivolous lies and disgraceful behavior...and we can make this happen now that we have a House majority.
But in order to do so, I’ll need to get my fellow colleagues on board and the message out to millions of Americans. **[Can I count on you to join me in my fight to expose the Democrats?](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUcmOnDAQ_Rq4gbx0sxw4JGnNSIk00iinmYtl7AKc8UIbI5p8_dgEJVIky8t75apXr6DDVU0vLSaXNpcdr_gAMlcdQYQijNOBCSllg5GkGEspqz6u7ILAcKVLjjfuvXOmFM7kU9f3g6CorfEVVY2kNYJ2EFc0NPjSU4Ih190Uwrxk9EtGnuJaQKweyk1ZDzIliRi3cu_VOC7p3jPpLHOGbZ75ZXoUoJVlvWenRJzRJ27cakNGbxRlpPIppVd2jEDwK0RoDYYZkGo1ETuUn-DiVi8gglZoxs2s1bCflIhPrkYbyT-FikNTksODSpr0bmYlUl7OThuYX5dF8cnxBwMNIgUqG2D0KuxRtfsAz0f4J_6s5WLM0UHUUbTjR_U2_vz9_BppZrWSkfgPnJSMJt4auAfE35vcd3LelNZqqeo4nfGYTprJ2VSX1V8zQo5vhBz2k_vbZvz6y_x4LrbH9-JevZhrIsm3uId9hr-RZ5LytI5k9e0TOV26lw)** | | | | [EXPOSE THE LIES](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUctupDAQ_Bq4gbA9w5ADh82OEimRohz2klysxm7AiR-MMWL4-7VZtCutZPlR1e6ursaW1Bd2eiD09JDLFmroUeaqpRVlFSHpIJSWsiGVZIRIKesuruxUoQGlSyAreO-cKYUz-dh2FEH0EkBSOLOqqk8AcK6xwYaJpu9z3Y4hTHPGfmT0Ka4ZxeKxXJX1KFOSiIGVW6eGYU73jktnuTN89dzP471ArSzvPD8kkow9gXGLDRm7siqjtU8pvbJDBIJfMEJLMNygVIuJ2K78AGe3eIERtEJzMJNW_XZQIj5BDTaSfwoVu6YkB4JKmvRmJiVSXuCHDdwv86xgdHDnqFGkQGUDDl6FLap23-hhwH_ij1ouxuwdRB2FeHl_nh5_WfiONLdayUj8B45KRhOvDd5CBZ9N7ls5rUprNdeXOJ1hn06aydFUm10eM0r3b5Tu9tPbx2r88mVen4v1_lLc6jdzTiT9GfewTfg38khSHtbR7HL9DbmSvBk)

We cannot sit back now that the Russian Collusion Delusion is confirmed to be one of the biggest political lies in US history.

**Democrats knew Russian interference did little to sway voter opinion, and so did we, yet they still used it to delegitimize President Trump and destroy his public image.**

Now is our best shot to expose every single Democrat who supported this lie, especially the ones who used it to launch the sham impeachment.

**[I’ll need your support right away](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdUU2P2yAQ_TX4ZgtwQpyDD7ubbqVU6m2lbi8IG2Kzy4eDQY7_fQev1UqVRny8NzzezKiWsFN9OBN6OBeyFUzclCx0SzGtMSF5I5RWsiFY1oRIKVkHgQ5YWaFNJcgiQvDeVr23xdgKfJbkeBNdI5obkaCM8fF8YIrCmbG6MO0Y4zSj-gnRV4hZ9SmoatEuKJlFABNOrp0ehjmfOy69497yJfAwj49SGe14F_hukaD6VVifXET1pcaIspAlg3YDADEkBVCKllsldbKAbc53cPYp9ApA1xsu7GT0bd2pHq5CDw7Ir4_KzVO2I6LOnsxqJ91nXcH3NvCQ5lmL0YsHV0b1OVG7qIag4wqu_acKYlD_zO9_ecjZKgAf5du1-zaOb9f0C2jujJZA_AeOWkITL426Ryx-N0Vo5bRoY_TMTjCdYZtOnsleVItOz4jS7RmlW_vp_X2xIX3YH9_L5XEt7-ynPWaSvsAa10n9zdxFqr11FJ0ufwANc7qj)** to demand my Republican colleagues work with me to get this information out to millions of Americans. Together we can demand action, but it’ll take us all.

Yours in Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5

| | NEGOP Unicameral Update"2ND HOUSE ALERT" WEDNESDAY, JANUARY 11, 2023
2023 Signature Pro-Life Bills Introduced!
Today, a coalition of Nebraska Senators led by Senator Albrecht (District 17) held a press conference to announce the signature pieces of Pro-Life Legislation for the 2023 session.
The [2023 NEGOP Legislative plan](https://www.ne.gop/so/b5OMYvFmH/c?w=gQhYxyt6_y9yQyFFgpIQZ8rHp7ZZzk053qaiTrEt26Y.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmUuZ29wLzIwMjNsZWdpc2xhdGl2ZXBsYW4iLCJyIjoiNjljNWI3NmEtODQ5Mi00MjVjLTk2OTUtMTJlZTlkZGE1ZDM0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) calls to “Protect the unborn child, restrict abortion, and honor the sanctity of every human life.” The Republican citizens expressed their frustration with inaction on this issue in 2022 after the Supreme Court ruling. The NEGOP voiced that frustration. Today, the legislative bill on life was unveiled. We applaud the Senators that are moving forward from inaction to action on this important issue in 2023.
Senator Joni Albrecht led Senators, doctors, and pregnancy volunteers through a press conference that introduced the Nebraska Heartbeat Act and the Nebraska Pregnancy Help Act. You may read the position our representatives are taking on life in the PDF summaries attached. Included with the summary is a recent survey about Pro-Life Legislation and the Nebraska Heartbeat Act bill for your review ([click here](https://www.ne.gop/so/b5OMYvFmH/c?w=yxIT9MBY5c42MDAnpBTrplVwthJkVTRM0j0xboCy0U0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmUuZ29wLzIwMjNsZWdpc2xhdGl2ZWFsZXJ0cyIsInIiOiI2OWM1Yjc2YS04NDkyLTQyNWMtOTY5NS0xMmVlOWRkYTVkMzQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0MThjMTc2MS1lZGQzLTRjMWEtYjA2NC1jMGJhYzlkMDI2NGYifQ) for a link to documents). Please note, a bill number and complete list of sponsors had not been yet to be assigned prior to the printing of the documents.
In summary, this pro-life legislation eliminates abortions AFTER a heartbeat has been established which is usually around week 6. The exceptions in the bill are rape, incest, and a medical emergency of the mother.
The enforcement provisions do not hold a woman liable for a violation of this act—only doctors/abortionists. There are no criminal or civil penalties for abortionists. The abortionist who violates the Nebraska heartbeat Act would have a hearing pursuant to the Uniform Credentialing Act, just like any other instance where a doctor has allegedly committed an act of unprofessional conduct that would make their medical license subject to discipline.
The NEGOP is presenting the facts of the bill and the materials from today's press conference for the benefit of educating Nebraska citizens. Senator Albrecht stated at the press conference that she believes she has the 33 votes to win on this bill. Furthermore, she stated that 85% of babies normally aborted will experience the precious gift of life if passed.

---

name: Alerts - An America United
subject: Governor Hogan's Farewell
body:
| | | It was a bittersweet farewell, friend.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=24a79c4379d2439db46ed2939af7ac3e&_e=q9-Y4sf_9mKL0Lbl8nUkf7YHTM_fCYKVQPc87eJV-QrXeYS72NNogPWIqK847Oa-uoXSPBbRpsi1nPJwV_sqy5_vrgaAG2rnjQRrSU9A0MkDwwKzlkXf1DGtawfdwVfzTOUCp1xzhphlcixmnBvqwu66dAKR6pllOqWIoqzs91hDbmhOASdoYs3f1ZIicx3hViSlATnFsqbBG375o8jdoHaBGylusPtUR6KL1VZLAaF3qaQYCZDUNgPOB1SNJrSLHMXlNc8ByuF62kXJnGrcsQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Governor Larry Hogan gave his farewell address to Maryland yesterday and in it, showed his deep love, admiration, and commitment to the people he served. As a Republican Governor in a deep-blue state, Governor Hogan said he's proud of his accomplishments and the bipartisan work done during his time in office like the $4 billion in tax, toll, and fee relief for small businesses, families, and senior citizens. He also helped usher through meaningful legislation to rebuild Maryland's aging infrastructure, navigated the state through the Covid-19 pandemic, kept law and order during the Baltimore riots in 2015, and showed the country how to get things done by working together and focusing on the issues that matter. _**"I vowed that day that the politics that have divided our nation need not divide our state. I'm proud to say that we kept that promise. Together, we lived up to Maryland's heritage as a state of middle temperament." **_ Governor Hogan never strayed from his promise to work to unite the leadership in Maryland and ensure that the government work _**FOR**_ the people... and he, along with _**An America United**_ , will continue to fight for a better way forward across the country. [_**But we need you on board if we hope to continue this important work. clean_body: | | | It was a bittersweet farewell, friend. | | Governor Larry Hogan gave his farewell address to Maryland yesterday and in it, showed his deep love, admiration, and commitment to the people he served. As a Republican Governor in a deep-blue state, Governor Hogan said he's proud of his accomplishments and the bipartisan work done during his time in office like the $4 billion in tax, toll, and fee relief for small businesses, families, and senior citizens. He also helped usher through meaningful legislation to rebuild Maryland's aging infrastructure, navigated the state through the Covid-19 pandemic, kept law and order during the Baltimore riots in 2015, and showed the country how to get things done by working together and focusing on the issues that matter. "I vowed that day that the politics that have divided our nation need not divide our state. I'm proud to say that we kept that promise. Together, we lived up to Maryland's heritage as a state of middle temperament." Governor Hogan never strayed from his promise to work to unite the leadership in Maryland and ensure that the government work FOR the people... and he, along with An America United , will continue to fight for a better way forward across the country. Thank you, Team An America United | | | | | | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | Contributions to An America United are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | |

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Congress is back, and I want to hear from you
body:
What do you want to see happen in 2023? [](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-fzthik-yddjllujiu-r/) 🚨 _**2023 PRIORITIES SURVEY**_ 🚨 It's a new year and the 118th Congress is officially underway, my friend! I'm rolling up my sleeves and getting straight to work, and that's why I'm reaching out. As one of my biggest supporters, I hope you will take our survey and share your top priorities for Congress to tackle. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible
body:
Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis.
| |
---
| | My fellow concerned American,Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis._Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible_ ... right? Now... imagine a world where that doctor is praised for his or her “bravery” and for giving your child the body he or she was “always meant to have.”I paint a disturbing picture. But this is happening under our noses. **Except it’s not amputations for appendicitis -- it's double mastectomies, chemical castration drugs, and genitalia mutilation surgeries for children with gender dysphoria.** The Center for American Liberty is now actively engaged in legal action against Kaiser Permanente Hospital for physically mutilating and destroying the health of an innocent girl – Chloe Cole – after convincing her that she needed to be a boy to survive.**I need your help to fund this legal battle.**[**Will you donate an urgent $35 or more tax-deductible gift today to the Center for American Liberty to help cover our lawyer fees, months of research, and expert witness costs?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z89t7k195cua4nc7uf4vu6ea2nrvohjatg8742ko_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clh68oj2cph2bs) Before you decide to donate today, let me briefly share with you the details on this case.When Chloe Cole was 13 years old, doctors began experimenting on Chloe to “transition” her from being a girl to a boy.She should have been able to trust her doctors when she told them about her anxiety and gender dysphoria. Instead, these medical “professionals” coerced Chloe and her parents into irreversible life-altering “treatment.”**Doctors told her parents they could either have a “dead daughter or a living son.”** Then, doctors lied to Chloe.They lied when they told her that absent puberty blockers and surgeries her gender dysphoria would never resolve itself.

We know that the scientific data shows that often gender dysphoria does resolve itself by the time children reach adulthood.Doctors also lied, by omission, when they failed to inform Chloe of the many less invasive treatment options that should have been an option for her. Instead, for the next several years, these medical “professionals” pumped Chloe full of chemicals used on high-risk sex offenders to castrate them.Specifically, they gave her**Lupon Depot** to stop her natural progression into puberty, which is an off-label use of the drug.**Then, when Chloe was just 16 years old, doctors performed a double mastectomy on her.** And it’s time to hold them accountable.My name is Harmeet K. Dhillon, the founder of the Center for American Liberty (CAL). And I’m helping Chloe finally receive justice.So, with your support, we’re suing the hospital and doctors that did this to Chloe.Chloe deserves justice. She finds herself just 18 years old wondering if she will ever be able to have children and knowing that if she is able to have children, she will never be able to breast feed them.Doctors robbed Chloe of her experience as a woman—and they did it through deceptive and coercive tactics. This legal battle won’t be easily won – we’re facing Kaiser Permanente Hospital, who has billions of dollars at their disposal. In fact, just last year Kaiser Permanente reported **$8 billion** profit in 2021 alone. [**So, if you’re in the position to make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center of American Liberty today to help us win a historic victory against predatory doctors and hospitals butchering children for profit, I hope you will.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdq1d48rpdhsrdj4akao7fj9abebgctddf2s16vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clh68oj2cph2bs) These hospitals, transgender activists, and medical “professionals” have a lot to lose in this case so we know they will put up a huge fight—likely hiring some of the most expensive lawyers in the country to protect their interests.But Americans like you and I simply can't stand for this. You and I must make sure that no child ever goes through what Chloe Cole did. Chloe is courageously standing up for herself and for vulnerable kids everywhere.Will you stand with her?Thank you for supporting our mission today.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhnc16qnrgvj36h5pdea69mr42ahium5a5up728g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clh68oj2cph2bs)
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf3u64eg771e207kjovt64j7k5ovki0kl2053ir8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clh68oj2cph2bs)
---
| | P.S. If we don’t fight back now and hold these medical “professionals” accountable, untold thousands of young children could suffer the same horrible fate as Chloe. We can’t allow that. [**So please, join the fight to help us get justice for Chloe and save the future of our children with a tax-deductible gift of $35 more today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbttrmu97dap47679fitc32bbstnttobce6b4128_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clh68oj2cph2bs)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkuvmnsfeb6gk21vlhuc5hejjdtn6nma1vvcrqb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clh68oj2cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmsd3p7c9f4bkudq0nfjqj045fgn9chbu9dq7heo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clh68oj2cph2bs)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible
body:
Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7710%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=vBMMBBMl0PI%2fX3LMQoolUw&sysid=1)
| |
---
| | My fellow concerned American, Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis. _Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible_ ... right? Now... imagine a world where that doctor is praised for his or her “bravery” and for giving your child the body he or she was “always meant to have.” I paint a disturbing picture. But this is happening under our noses. **Except it’s not amputations for appendicitis -- it's double mastectomies, chemical castration drugs, and genitalia mutilation surgeries for children with gender dysphoria.** The Center for American Liberty is now actively engaged in legal action against Kaiser Permanente Hospital for physically mutilating and destroying the health of an innocent girl - Chloe Cole - after convincing her that she needed to be a boy to survive. **I need your help to fund this legal battle.** [**Will you donate an urgent $35 or more tax-deductible gift today to the Center for American Liberty to help cover our lawyer fees, months of research, and expert witness costs?**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91144%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SV%2fBnpNd0zTprquopJNvYQ&sysid=1) Before you decide to donate today, let me briefly share with you the details on this case. When Chloe Cole was 13 years old, doctors began experimenting on Chloe to “transition” her from being a girl to a boy. She should have been able to trust her doctors when she told them about her anxiety and gender dysphoria. Instead, these medical “professionals” coerced Chloe and her parents into irreversible life-altering “treatment.” **Doctors told her parents they could either have a “dead daughter or a living son.”** Then, doctors lied to Chloe. They lied when they told her that absent puberty blockers and surgeries her gender dysphoria would never resolve itself.

We know that the scientific data shows that often gender dysphoria does resolve itself by the time children reach adulthood. Doctors also lied, by omission, when they failed to inform Chloe of the many less invasive treatment options that should have been an option for her. Instead, for the next several years, these medical “professionals” pumped Chloe full of chemicals used on high-risk sex offenders to castrate them. Specifically, they gave her**Lupon Depot** to stop her natural progression into puberty, which is an off-label use of the drug. **Then, when Chloe was just 16 years old, doctors performed a double mastectomy on her.** And it’s time to hold them accountable. My name is Harmeet K. Dhillon, the founder of the Center for American Liberty (CAL). And I’m helping Chloe finally receive justice. So, with your support, we’re suing the hospital and doctors that did this to Chloe. Chloe deserves justice. She finds herself just 18 years old wondering if she will ever be able to have children and knowing that if she is able to have children, she will never be able to breast feed them. Doctors robbed Chloe of her experience as a woman--and they did it through deceptive and coercive tactics. This legal battle won’t be easily won - we’re facing Kaiser Permanente Hospital, who has billions of dollars at their disposal. In fact, just last year Kaiser Permanente reported **$8 billion** profit in 2021 alone. [**So, if you’re in the position to make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center of American Liberty today to help us win a historic victory against predatory doctors and hospitals butchering children for profit, I hope you will.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91255%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y9PUI%2bygYeJXpqiEBlaKrg&sysid=1) These hospitals, transgender activists, and medical “professionals” have a lot to lose in this case so we know they will put up a huge fight--likely hiring some of the most expensive lawyers in the country to protect their interests. But Americans like you and I simply can't stand for this. You and I must make sure that no child ever goes through what Chloe Cole did. Chloe is courageously standing up for herself and for vulnerable kids everywhere. Will you stand with her? Thank you for supporting our mission today.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91256%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Obs8rjMABNDjCqYk8It1kQ&sysid=1)
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91257%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UJ%2fOC6tvUlvQhNUVEJp1Kg&sysid=1)
---
| | P.S. If we don’t fight back now and hold these medical “professionals” accountable, untold thousands of young children could suffer the same horrible fate as Chloe. We can’t allow that. [**So please, join the fight to help us get justice for Chloe and save the future of our children with a tax-deductible gift of $35 more today.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91258%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bs0IR8MGEIbnPjFHgNyFNQ&sysid=1)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c91259%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o1gV4kzdNq%2f9o%2ffB0l3u5g&sysid=1)

name: Team Gillibrand
subject: I wanted you to hear it first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
**Dear supporter,**
I wanted you to hear it first. Kirsten is running for reelection to the United States Senate in 2024.
And as the top New York elected official on the ticket, Kirsten is committed to running a well-resourced, vigorous campaign that will not only be successful but will lift down-ballot races and help us win back the congressional seats we need to take back the House majority. The road to Democrats retaking the House runs right through New York.
Unfortunately, the truth is that New York Republicans just had their best election result in two decades.
We have a lot of work to do, but our team is prepared. Kirsten has already won three statewide elections and has never been in a better position to win reelection and lead New York Democrats to victory.
Here’s why...
**Strong name ID and high approval ratings with Democrats and general election voters**
An [October 2022 Quinnipiac poll](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57222072/387236326/2016999249?releaseid=3859&refcode=jtk3873-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzRiODdjMS03OTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_MNMlVcTHPN2YaZI6xN1pKUr0UJzINRrSg77tUm1tgY=&emci=e3721681-f290-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=d34b87c1-7992-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=7659029) showed that Kirsten is well known and widely popular with Democratic voters (73% approve vs. 10% disapprove), as well as New Yorkers generally (45% approve vs. 36% disapprove). [A December 2022 Siena poll](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57222073/387236327/543337199?refcode=jtk3873-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzRiODdjMS03OTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_MNMlVcTHPN2YaZI6xN1pKUr0UJzINRrSg77tUm1tgY=&emci=e3721681-f290-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=d34b87c1-7992-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=7659029) found similarly strong results: 61% favorable vs. 14% unfavorable among Democrats and 42% favorable vs. 27% unfavorable among all voters.
**Sizable and growing war chest**
Despite not accepting corporate PAC money, Kirsten enters reelection with more than $5 million cash on hand, more than double her cash on hand entering the 2018 cycle, in which she raised nearly $18 million. Her campaign has received donations from every one of New York’s 62 counties.
**Historic vote getter**
First elected to Congress to represent a rural 2-to-1 Republican district, Kirsten was appointed to the Senate in 2009. While the vast majority of New Yorkers did not know who she was and more than a dozen Democrats considered challenging her in the 2010 special election, Kirsten won 76% of the vote in the primary. In 2012, she set the record for the largest winning margin in New York senatorial election history, winning 72% of the vote, outperforming even President Barack Obama. In 2018, she once again decisively won reelection, earning 67% and outperforming the governor’s race.
**New York values**
From her exceptional environmental record to her unwavering record of fighting for organized labor and working people, Kirsten’s New York values serve as her North Star. She’s delivered results on jobs, accessible health care, affordable education, seniors and veterans–the priorities New Yorkers really care about. And now that the right-wing Supreme Court has turned back the clock on reproductive rights, Kirsten is working with federal, state and local partners and advocates to ensure that reproductive care is accessible to all those seeking it.
**Putting in the work**
Kirsten has traveled extensively throughout New York’s 62 counties to hear directly from her constituents. She is the only New York statewide official to hold open town hall forums on a regular basis. Just recently, she held town hall meetings in all five boroughs as well as on Long Island and in Buffalo.
**Record of accomplishments for New York**
Throughout her tenure, Kirsten has consistently delivered strong results for New Yorkers, compiling a record of accomplishments relating to gun trafficking, 9/11 health care, veterans, congressional ethics and more.
_**Made gun trafficking a federal crime**_
After more than a decade of advocacy, Kirsten secured legislation to make gun trafficking a federal crime. In 2009, Kirsten introduced a bill to establish the first federal criminal penalties for gun trafficking, which would ultimately become known as the _Hadiya Pendleton and Nyasia Pryear-Yard Gun Trafficking and Crime Prevention Act_. Major provisions from the bill were included in Congress’ 2022 bipartisan gun safety legislation.
**_Permanently enshrined 9/11 first responder benefit programs into law_**
In 2010, Kirsten spearheaded the passage of the bill to create the World Trade Center Health Program and reopen the September 11th Victim Compensation Fund, providing health care and compensation for sick and dying first responders and rescue workers. She later led the successful effort to make both programs permanent.
**_Raised the bar on transparency_**
Kirsten led the effort to ban insider training in Congress with her authorship and passage of the _STOCK Act_. Additionally, she was the first member of Congress to post a “Sunlight Report” that included her official schedule, financial disclosures and earmark requests online.
**_Delivered benefits to veterans exposed to toxic burn pits_**
Kirsten was at the forefront of the successful effort to extend VA health care and disability benefits to veterans exposed to toxic burn pits. The _PACT Act_ , which could help as many as three and a half million service members and veterans, removed the burden on veterans to prove that their illnesses and disabilities are directly related to their burn pit exposure in order to receive VA benefits. This is an important issue to Kirsten; in 2019, she passed a law to deliver benefits to Vietnam veterans exposed to Agent Orange while serving on ships off the coast.
**_Repealed discriminatory “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell” policy_**
In 2009, Gillibrand led the effort in the Senate to repeal “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell,” waging an 18-month campaign on the issue. Gillibrand pushed for a hearing on DADT, securing a commitment from Sen. Carl Levin to have the Senate Armed Services Committee hold the first one on the law in 16 years.
**_Brought home critical funding for New York_**
In the wake of the COVID-19 pandemic, Kirsten helped secure billions of dollars in funding for New York families, state and local governments, and local businesses. As part of this funding, Kirsten spearheaded the development of a new public health workforce, modeled off of her “Health Force” legislation, to build public health capacity in underserved communities. More than 500 new community health workers have already been hired and trained in New York City as part of this effort. And in the 2022 funding bill, Kirsten ranked in the top ten in all of Congress in terms of money delivered for constituents, securing $230.6 million for projects in New York State.
**_Enacted some of the most significant workplace reforms in modern history_**
Kirsten successfully led the fight to end forced arbitration for sexual assault and sexual harassment. First introduced in 2017 and passed last year, her legislation prevents corporations from being able to force survivors of sexual assault and sexual harassment into the secretive, biased arbitration process, voiding all such existing agreements and ending the practice for the future. She also just passed a bill that invalidates and prohibits predispute non-disclosure agreements in cases of sexual assault and sexual harassment.
**_Secured funding to reconnect divided communities_**
In the 20th century, infrastructure projects cut through communities of color, walling them off from the local economy and displacing thousands of New Yorkers and more than one million people nationwide. The 2021 Bipartisan Infrastructure Law included $1 billion to enact key provisions of Gillibrand’s _Build Local, Hire Local Act_ for federal infrastructure projects and prioritized the hiring and training of local workers.
**_Led the fight to change the military justice system_**
Starting in 2013, Kirsten called on the Pentagon to reform how it handled sexual assault and introduced legislation to have sexual assault cases and other serious, non-military crimes removed from the military chain of command, and she has never backed down despite years of roadblocks and institutional pushback. In this year’s defense bill, this critical reform is finally being implemented.
_**Inserted paid leave into the national debate**_
In 2013, Kirsten introduced her paid family and medical leave legislation, the _FAMILY Act_ , which would establish the first national paid leave program in our nation’s history. Since then, national paid leave has become a staple of Democrats’ presidential platforms, and her leadership paved the way for an emergency paid leave program in the COVID response packages. She continues to work to make this critical program a reality.
**Tough. Determined. Relentless.**
If you know Kirsten, you know that these three words are the key to her success. There is no candidate who will work harder than Kirsten Gillibrand or fight harder for New Yorkers. It’s why she’s won a special election and two reelections, and why she will win a third.
— Team Gillibrand

clean_body: | | | Dear supporter, I wanted you to hear it first. Kirsten is running for reelection to the United States Senate in 2024. And as the top New York elected official on the ticket, Kirsten is committed to running a well-resourced, vigorous campaign that will not only be successful but will lift down-ballot races and help us win back the congressional seats we need to take back the House majority. The road to Democrats retaking the House runs right through New York. Unfortunately, the truth is that New York Republicans just had their best election result in two decades. We have a lot of work to do, but our team is prepared. Kirsten has already won three statewide elections and has never been in a better position to win reelection and lead New York Democrats to victory. Here’s why... Strong name ID and high approval ratings with Democrats and general election voters An showed that Kirsten is well known and widely popular with Democratic voters (73% approve vs. 10% disapprove), as well as New Yorkers generally (45% approve vs. 36% disapprove). found similarly strong results: 61% favorable vs. 14% unfavorable among Democrats and 42% favorable vs. 27% unfavorable among all voters. Sizable and growing war chest Despite not accepting corporate PAC money, Kirsten enters reelection with more than $5 million cash on hand, more than double her cash on hand entering the 2018 cycle, in which she raised nearly $18 million. Her campaign has received donations from every one of New York’s 62 counties. Historic vote getter First elected to Congress to represent a rural 2-to-1 Republican district, Kirsten was appointed to the Senate in 2009. While the vast majority of New Yorkers did not know who she was and more than a dozen Democrats considered challenging her in the 2010 special election, Kirsten won 76% of the vote in the primary. In 2012, she set the record for the largest winning margin in New York senatorial election history, winning 72% of the vote, outperforming even President Barack Obama. In 2018, she once again decisively won reelection, earning 67% and outperforming the governor’s race. New York values From her exceptional environmental record to her unwavering record of fighting for organized labor and working people, Kirsten’s New York values serve as her North Star. She’s delivered results on jobs, accessible health care, affordable education, seniors and veterans–the priorities New Yorkers really care about. And now that the right-wing Supreme Court has turned back the clock on reproductive rights, Kirsten is working with federal, state and local partners and advocates to ensure that reproductive care is accessible to all those seeking it. Putting in the work Kirsten has traveled extensively throughout New York’s 62 counties to hear directly from her constituents. She is the only New York statewide official to hold open town hall forums on a regular basis. Just recently, she held town hall meetings in all five boroughs as well as on Long Island and in Buffalo. Record of accomplishments for New York Throughout her tenure, Kirsten has consistently delivered strong results for New Yorkers, compiling a record of accomplishments relating to gun trafficking, 9/11 health care, veterans, congressional ethics and more. Made gun trafficking a federal crime After more than a decade of advocacy, Kirsten secured legislation to make gun trafficking a federal crime. In 2009, Kirsten introduced a bill to establish the first federal criminal penalties for gun trafficking, which would ultimately become known as the Hadiya Pendleton and Nyasia Pryear-Yard Gun Trafficking and Crime Prevention Act. Major provisions from the bill were included in Congress’ 2022 bipartisan gun safety legislation. Permanently enshrined 9/11 first responder benefit programs into law In 2010, Kirsten spearheaded the passage of the bill to create the World Trade Center Health Program and reopen the September 11th Victim Compensation Fund, providing health care and compensation for sick and dying first responders and rescue workers. She later led the successful effort to make both programs permanent. Raised the bar on transparency Kirsten led the effort to ban insider training in Congress with her authorship and passage of the STOCK Act. Additionally, she was the first member of Congress to post a “Sunlight Report” that included her official schedule, financial disclosures and earmark requests online. Delivered benefits to veterans exposed to toxic burn pits Kirsten was at the forefront of the successful effort to extend VA health care and disability benefits to veterans exposed to toxic burn pits. The PACT Act , which could help as many as three and a half million service members and veterans, removed the burden on veterans to prove that their illnesses and disabilities are directly related to their burn pit exposure in order to receive VA benefits. This is an important issue to Kirsten; in 2019, she passed a law to deliver benefits to Vietnam veterans exposed to Agent Orange while serving on ships off the coast. Repealed discriminatory “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell” policy In 2009, Gillibrand led the effort in the Senate to repeal “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell,” waging an 18-month campaign on the issue. Gillibrand pushed for a hearing on DADT, securing a commitment from Sen. Carl Levin to have the Senate Armed Services Committee hold the first one on the law in 16 years. Brought home critical funding for New York In the wake of the COVID-19 pandemic, Kirsten helped secure billions of dollars in funding for New York families, state and local governments, and local businesses. As part of this funding, Kirsten spearheaded the development of a new public health workforce, modeled off of her “Health Force” legislation, to build public health capacity in underserved communities. More than 500 new community health workers have already been hired and trained in New York City as part of this effort. And in the 2022 funding bill, Kirsten ranked in the top ten in all of Congress in terms of money delivered for constituents, securing $230.6 million for projects in New York State. Enacted some of the most significant workplace reforms in modern history Kirsten successfully led the fight to end forced arbitration for sexual assault and sexual harassment. First introduced in 2017 and passed last year, her legislation prevents corporations from being able to force survivors of sexual assault and sexual harassment into the secretive, biased arbitration process, voiding all such existing agreements and ending the practice for the future. She also just passed a bill that invalidates and prohibits predispute non-disclosure agreements in cases of sexual assault and sexual harassment. Secured funding to reconnect divided communities In the 20th century, infrastructure projects cut through communities of color, walling them off from the local economy and displacing thousands of New Yorkers and more than one million people nationwide. The 2021 Bipartisan Infrastructure Law included $1 billion to enact key provisions of Gillibrand’s Build Local, Hire Local Act for federal infrastructure projects and prioritized the hiring and training of local workers. Led the fight to change the military justice system Starting in 2013, Kirsten called on the Pentagon to reform how it handled sexual assault and introduced legislation to have sexual assault cases and other serious, non-military crimes removed from the military chain of command, and she has never backed down despite years of roadblocks and institutional pushback. In this year’s defense bill, this critical reform is finally being implemented. Inserted paid leave into the national debate In 2013, Kirsten introduced her paid family and medical leave legislation, the FAMILY Act , which would establish the first national paid leave program in our nation’s history. Since then, national paid leave has become a staple of Democrats’ presidential platforms, and her leadership paved the way for an emergency paid leave program in the COVID response packages. She continues to work to make this critical program a reality. Tough. Determined. Relentless. If you know Kirsten, you know that these three words are the key to her success. There is no candidate who will work harder than Kirsten Gillibrand or fight harder for New Yorkers. It’s why she’s won a special election and two reelections, and why she will win a third. — Team Gillibrand | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to . Gillibrand for Senate c/o Verdolino & Lowey 124 Washington St., Ste. 101 Foxboro, MA 02035 United States © 2023 | Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate |

name: ConservativeFWD
subject: As a nation we have turned slowly away
body:
Take a look at this quote from Benjamin Franklin, who wasn’t even a Christian. He was a Deist:
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zf89325klelles454ngkhv0sfpa9e3pkr3r1ej0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clj64o32c1h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ulh76cbmcsqrcpdlm9hb6ojlephn2s34mlrbcs9gssq33djjm8o76tdkmsr38dpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphheapm8c3im9j38o5jc1jr1db5e8iv0)
| | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zal546iqj9eo8aj9ra8e9mk69q02tinmeevuggg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clj64o32c1h2bs)
---
Hello Friend, Revisionists of America's history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that "a great wall of separation between Church and State" has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government. The truth of the matter is that, over time, we have allowed secularists, humanists, atheists, and infidels to pervert our Constitution into something our founding fathers never intended. Take a look at this quote from Benjamin Franklin, who wasn't even a Christian. He was a Deist:

_" I have lived . . . a long time, and the longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth--that God governs in the affairs of men. And if a sparrow cannot fall to the ground without his notice, is it probable that an empire can rise without his aid? We have been assured . . . in the sacred writings, that 'except the Lord build the House they labour in vain that build it.'"_

In fact, it was Ben Franklin who suggested that the Constitutional Convention should seek God's blessing in an opening prayer at every session!

When I think about truths like this and contrast them with the utter contempt for and avoidance of any semblance of Christian thought by today's governing leaders, I am both amazed and disgusted.
---
| | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0ufb58nf8iqkiqtmf2fbe5o0p513uhcn3cb9fqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clj64o32c1h2bs)
---
As a nation, we have turned slowly away from the God who "governs the affairs of men" and relied instead on our own understanding. Look where it has got us:
---
* Since the Roe v Wade ruling in 1973, an average of 600,000 babies have been murdered in the womb each year.
* As of 2018, gun violence is the leading cause of death for children and teens.
* Every year, excessive drinking is responsible for the deaths of more than 3,500 people under the legal drinking age.
* We've pushed God out of our classrooms, courtrooms, and living rooms--and we are reaping the consequences.

---
What's the solution? We as a nation must invite Him back in. That starts with changing individual hearts and lives. And that change can only come about through the proclamation of God's Word.
---
[Sign the pledge to stand for Christian values in America](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6gs3g9r87r04b8bv8f9svbj2kc40u6kj6g12fqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clj64o32c1h2bs)
---
If you are ready to be counted among those who wish to live the true Christian life without hesitation or apology, I invite you to sign a pledge resolving to do so. This pledge, created by the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_ , is a simple way to show that you stand with us and believe that America is a Christian nation. Change can and will take place when we as believers take our faith seriously. **[Will you stand shoulder to shoulder with me and pledge to stand for Christian values in America?](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zamohi30he5ck7u4at85kf6ogvphik9ske4jgg98_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clj64o32c1h2bs)** There is hope for the future of America--and it starts with a firm resolve to shine the light of Jesus Christ.

clean_body: Take a look at this quote from Benjamin Franklin, who wasn’t even a Christian. He was a Deist: | | | Hello Friend, Revisionists of America's history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that "a great wall of separation between Church and State" has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government. The truth of the matter is that, over time, we have allowed secularists, humanists, atheists, and infidels to pervert our Constitution into something our founding fathers never intended. Take a look at this quote from Benjamin Franklin, who wasn't even a Christian. He was a Deist: " I have lived . . . a long time, and the longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth--that God governs in the affairs of men. And if a sparrow cannot fall to the ground without his notice, is it probable that an empire can rise without his aid? We have been assured . . . in the sacred writings, that 'except the Lord build the House they labour in vain that build it.'" In fact, it was Ben Franklin who suggested that the Constitutional Convention should seek God's blessing in an opening prayer at every session! When I think about truths like this and contrast them with the utter contempt for and avoidance of any semblance of Christian thought by today's governing leaders, I am both amazed and disgusted. | | As a nation, we have turned slowly away from the God who "governs the affairs of men" and relied instead on our own understanding. Look where it has got us: Since the Roe v Wade ruling in 1973, an average of 600,000 babies have been murdered in the womb each year. As of 2018, gun violence is the leading cause of death for children and teens. Every year, excessive drinking is responsible for the deaths of more than 3,500 people under the legal drinking age. We've pushed God out of our classrooms, courtrooms, and living rooms--and we are reaping the consequences. What's the solution? We as a nation must invite Him back in. That starts with changing individual hearts and lives. And that change can only come about through the proclamation of God's Word. If you are ready to be counted among those who wish to live the true Christian life without hesitation or apology, I invite you to sign a pledge resolving to do so. This pledge, created by the ministry of Pathway to Victory , is a simple way to show that you stand with us and believe that America is a Christian nation. Change can and will take place when we as believers take our faith seriously. There is hope for the future of America--and it starts with a firm resolve to shine the light of Jesus Christ. subject: Sign the petition: Ban hedge fund investors from owning single-family homes
body:
2 minutes for a fair housing market
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc6296a48-b77c-436a-8fe0-572e27197666/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[Sign the petition: Ban hedge fund investors from owning single-family homes.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30131006-4462-430d-9261-7852b7e9d8ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** The affordable housing crisis is impacting nearly every community, every neighborhood. Rents are going up almost everywhere, even as families struggle to make ends meet. And home prices, especially for first-time home buyers, keep climbing further out of reach. There’s a Wall Street-driven reason for that – private hedge funds are [exacerbating](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2b4c391-25b8-4b79-922d-38272d67b873/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) the crisis by buying up housing in bulk. All across America, hedge funds and private equity are using their vast fortunes to outbid everyday Americans looking to buy homes. And because their investors demand Wall Street-style returns, they're driving up rents and cutting back on repairs.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6cf07464-b4db-4471-957a-3da758371218/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| In order to protect American home buyers from Wall Street greed, Senator Jeff Merkley has a plan to end Wall Street ownership of residential housing. While aspects of the housing crisis— including a supply shortage—will take years to remedy, others can be addressed immediately, including a ban on hedge funds and private equity firms owning and controlling large parts of the American housing market. It's time to ban Wall Street from buying up the homes in our neighborhoods. [**Sign the petition: We must take action to make housing affordable by ensuring that housing is for homes, not hedge funds.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td3a07e33-9753-4346-94c0-71060f065a88/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for standing up for a fair housing market for working families. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. I've got a little present for you,
Listen, we just got our first shipment of **[Gunner Gear Speed Loaders](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11231/6374453/35b6fa2be91eb389ad9c8392d90e681d57358dde/7cc843d4a03cced2a33bc9e005973387fe05cbe8)** in the warehouse...

And I'm so pumped about it, we are **giving away the first 500 for NOTHING** but a small shipping and handling charge.

I don't know about you, but we care about our thumbs!

And we want to help you spend more time shooting' and less time loading' magazines... **WAY less time.**

This thing loads a full mag in about **20 seconds flat...**

Load 9mm or .40 S&W, this bad boy eats em up!

Some people are saying I'm crazy for handing out 500 of these bad boys but I say the best type of advertising is word of mouth!

**[Grab your complimentary Speed Loader right here (Free S&H!)](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/11231/6374453/35b6fa2be91eb389ad9c8392d90e681d57358dde/7cc843d4a03cced2a33bc9e005973387fe05cbe8)**

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: PRESS RELEASE: Food Drive in NE Philly Peter
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y9-mKYJYmCUtIEfkpeRfwXrUjk4s92FxPaqSpRtTxdajp9EY5EWrB8v10QOaR5AqocFtYdo_MrhnFL8M_ePl964uXZwTzM3dMJnUaaOJY5dYeZ0oAa-XcOKYSANgdkTIty8lLfLbniWCGsfyvttdbQ==&c=UKhOdFDOSH5cCC438zbPXrKJGXzwnonzoFRzcIzRSR4V1CmeOh-a7g==&ch=QWAVUnIQ0y_AkOuajYT5XxoNrcc1XjhQPfW4QoPnp4mLDIdmzMPMEg==)
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Press Contact: [JesseRanney@gmail.com](mailto:JesseRanney@gmail.com) January 12, 2023 Kathy Barnette Hosts Food Drive with ABC Urgent Care Philadelphia, PA \- Kathy Barnette is teaming up with ABC Urgent Care to host a non-perishable food drive on Saturday, January 14th, between Noon and 2 PM. Food will be distributed at: ABC Urgent Care 1010 Cottman Ave. Philadelphia, PA 19111 "Like many Pennsylvanians, I have vivid memories of standing in front of an empty refrigerator, wondering where the next meal would come from," Kathy noted in her introduction to this event. "There is no more vulnerable feeling than not being able to feed your family," she said. Kathy is partnering with ABC Urgent Care to distribute food to our community. It is a great opportunity for Philadelphians to come together, meet our neighbors, and care for those in need. All are welcome, especially those who are in need. If you would like to support our efforts, please consider spreading the word to others and/or volunteering this Saturday to help distribute food.

---
|
---
| | |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Press Contact: mailto:JesseRanney@gmail.com January 12, 2023 Kathy Barnette Hosts Food Drive with ABC Urgent Care Philadelphia, PA \- Kathy Barnette is teaming up with ABC Urgent Care to host a non-perishable food drive on Saturday, January 14th, between Noon and 2 PM. Food will be distributed at: ABC Urgent Care 1010 Cottman Ave. Philadelphia, PA 19111 "Like many Pennsylvanians, I have vivid memories of standing in front of an empty refrigerator, wondering where the next meal would come from," Kathy noted in her introduction to this event. "There is no more vulnerable feeling than not being able to feed your family," she said. Kathy is partnering with ABC Urgent Care to distribute food to our community. It is a great opportunity for Philadelphians to come together, meet our neighbors, and care for those in need. All are welcome, especially those who are in need. If you would like to support our efforts, please consider spreading the word to others and/or volunteering this Saturday to help distribute food. | | | | | Kathy Barnette | == | == == == | | Kathy Barnette | P.O. name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 11 years in prison for defending his son?
body:
I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges.Please let me explain.In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately.**With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best, tax-deductible gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk38kilst6ua12s35mjqjsjns4jcc61spgaa0bag_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clj61p30c9h2bs) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in vulgar and aggressive ways**.Mark defended his son and himself against the escort, after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort then wanted Mark prosecuted for assault and battery, despite Mark acting of self-defense and defense of his son, but the State Courts in Philadelphia threw out the case. Instead of the matter ending there, Joe Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this.**Mark’s trial is set to begin on January 24th** , so we’re running out of time. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in** – ** by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmbd2f7udb2nbt2nmjccmhkaagk2umiuvac05fco_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clj61p30c9h2bs)Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out.Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. [**Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6u0rspasg7r90ldsrg6hm1fs9d16m5koi354dro_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clj61p30c9h2bs) I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence.We're expecting that Mark's defense may cost us as much as hundreds of thousands of dollars, as the Justice Department is out for blood and targeting Mark with its vast resources, all at taxpayer expense. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn.So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in sending your tax-deductible donations to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6ek50op6dc8elb85tmjcuqlsvglhrr330r9obq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clj61p30c9h2bs) I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. Again, the January 24th trial date is FAST approaching, so please don’t hesitate!I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. [**Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense fund of Mark Houck with a tax-deductible donation today?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrtdavgmap1b7jui72k6phca88414afp6gqhnb4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clj61p30c9h2bs)

clean_body: I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal | | | | Dear Friend,I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges.Please let me explain.In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately.With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming. Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our team is representing him in court. Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in vulgar and aggressive ways.Mark defended his son and himself against the escort, after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort then wanted Mark prosecuted for assault and battery, despite Mark acting of self-defense and defense of his son, but the State Courts in Philadelphia threw out the case. Instead of the matter ending there, Joe Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act... and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family. We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this.Mark’s trial is set to begin on January 24th , so we’re running out of time. no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out.Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence.We're expecting that Mark's defense may cost us as much as hundreds of thousands of dollars, as the Justice Department is out for blood and targeting Mark with its vast resources, all at taxpayer expense. To put it as bluntly as possible, Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone. Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn.So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. Again, the January 24th trial date is FAST approaching, so please don’t hesitate!I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. | | May God bless you, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. | | | © Thomas More Society | 309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Why I Fight...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
| | | [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cdba2093d37443118481615c663d7651&_e=FnRldnOhN9-wspIGj7709zxJ5NNLYSqcezqVUmar10PoekxvNmUCzKgX4fnkIWVY6x8VGo8E0fb950jkCl6lZEcR-ojjECRIu6VFHr1B25V_9QcS89A-6_K1gOfSWL8MAODAIYtiW8eNCkd2SPhsborJE20ljGydOF4X0botPJH5nN4tGLcws1gPf9Af0nHxUOjLt7S3SQywY5tkFTnhHg6xmEhG_VfEntwxBbAaMmcHBe9kS8Ok_uCubZnTF2vf7sQ6OzXt8CnB2CXTlvbvra_crOgGGEL51UNnk-mYKjU%3D)
---
| | | Friend,

A lot of people are asking why I took such a strong stand last week in the vote to elect a new Speaker of the House.
---

_**It 's because I work for the people and the people alone.

I refuse all PACs - that means corporate PACs, Leadership PACs, and ideological PACs.

I refuse all federal lobbyist donations.

I believe no other Republican in Congress has such a policy. **_

I am 100% funded by the people because that's the **ONLY** constituency I swore to serve.
