name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or fri Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [ ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7620c7f842264dfb839cb4c67ab8b04f&_e=44bGO1T2Zsbfz4hMU0v-4gC_UNIGvmLd18J4Xmacup7UyGe_erxig4gwpiehnTZYYjjJ-Nvrwn8MuIfp4FMCELJFrtBXmLm34TDfe5EVAq2ZlnlWNVj_KBRyKMdFpjGblkSXj_Gp5_NCBFGmP1MH6S3ul1NvOzHIE-biF0_958kymvM8TeLdGePPRMJHcSJQYWeSKRkFJXPgoFrWIWEvDpyVBM-ZsE2vtLzF8OU19s4ZgIWteMwjBCNm-p7e_5JgewgUIyaY8nQz78tW4sTzNKBu1otm4j-nm8L2zQt_s02WuizERGc72fD-7GySD2eF6-TXVafQ_AYyLEgIQX4nKg%3D%3D) |
---

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7620c7f842264dfb839cb4c67ab8b04f&_e=44bGO1T2Zsbfz4hMU0v-4gC_UNIGvmLd18J4Xmacup7UyGe_erxig4gwpiehnTZYYjjJ-Nvrwn8MuIfp4FMCELJFrtBXmLm34TDfe5EVAq2ZlnlWNVj_KBRyKMdFpjGblkSXj_Gp5_NCBFGmP1MH6S3ul1NvOzHIE-biF0_958kymvM8TeLdGePPRMJHcSJQvVFh_cPp2-CrUc1GCG9Sz3IFXWpmJ1jqIKZ-BbP6dtHX2XFK0vnl9e0GLIcr8m0Y-AjRrd4DACEntJdJ0y9Ftx-wPCUe1dHHk679TllKKcmRn0Tez_dDYI_9e5luwDTvOnajhrSmSf-XT8NY2136bA%3D%3D) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7620c7f842264dfb839cb4c67ab8b04f&_e=44bGO1T2Zsbfz4hMU0v-4gC_UNIGvmLd18J4Xmacup7UyGe_erxig4gwpiehnTZYYjjJ-Nvrwn8MuIfp4FMCELJFrtBXmLm34TDfe5EVAq2ZlnlWNVj_KBRyKMdFpjGblkSXj_Gp5_NCBFGmP1MH6S3ul1NvOzHIE-biF0_958kymvM8TeLdGePPRMJHcSJQPmzbIzT6pMJtzVHVEp11KK38CGGxfnv03p6fAz2MicrhAoKzbI71aN_XJpMZACViRJhHmjAYfd3FzisFHjQrmuZHWJOkgOFSFGUZYr_lyv7m1wVP5jp_aHmBpHULdtAd57ghRdGvfHoje1We2Pw8gQ%3D%3D)

I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7620c7f842264dfb839cb4c67ab8b04f&_e=44bGO1T2Zsbfz4hMU0v-4gC_UNIGvmLd18J4Xmacup7UyGe_erxig4gwpiehnTZYYjjJ-Nvrwn8MuIfp4FMCELJFrtBXmLm34TDfe5EVAq2ZlnlWNVj_KBRyKMdFpjGblkSXj_Gp5_NCBFGmP1MH6S3ul1NvOzHIE-biF0_958kymvM8TeLdGePPRMJHcSJQMALN-D1Vs7h-8PRka0xBPvP_B4BrM3YXRqiPvI6Hg4aV8Q9DPHLvBxCsm8CzdsMKLJbQ9cxYNRROMMY4OQwaSOnz0PDRkdU4mrkLRSdM02M9x-BJpCqcIbL8fbcQPFysbYNdDaY7CZp6DoWP4D11cw%3D%3D)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7620c7f842264dfb839cb4c67ab8b04f&_e=44bGO1T2Zsbfz4hMU0v-4gC_UNIGvmLd18J4Xmacup7UyGe_erxig4gwpiehnTZYYjjJ-Nvrwn8MuIfp4FMCELJFrtBXmLm34TDfe5EVAq2ZlnlWNVj_KBRyKMdFpjGblkSXj_Gp5_NCBFGmP1MH6S3ul1NvOzHIE-biF0_958kymvM8TeLdGePPRMJHcSJQ8q5DNhFhtnkNBcvOG0BFeicBTcuGcOi97FRp2DeuKCI-XMTo3ZrBRTqWPUEQk0t2kphGXBF6fNXvAxJpY5GppJ2K8n_i3b60lj8MlTIdai_pDdq2lW45ubiKWmg1wC2YbeG7m7qdA-lD3Zb8v1nZwA%3D%3D)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7620c7f842264dfb839cb4c67ab8b04f&_e=44bGO1T2Zsbfz4hMU0v-4gC_UNIGvmLd18J4Xmacup7UyGe_erxig4gwpiehnTZYYjjJ-Nvrwn8MuIfp4FMCELJFrtBXmLm34TDfe5EVAq2ZlnlWNVj_KBRyKMdFpjGblkSXj_Gp5_NCBFGmP1MH6S3ul1NvOzHIE-biF0_958kymvM8TeLdGePPRMJHcSJQyfj5qeqEb-BxalRhxjGRpEyd04ZcdgtzaUUkwIa-KKNv8l8zNF0o4Py4SDo_l6hhYI9qvO8ArkUpcZnBnLxQ_RKX_oMXpbBDa9QfsaenNjsMvLlTmb413gFtkka9dI2MjuijpWF8QYyC979O_DbUWw%3D%3D)

name: Dawn Moore
subject: Help me help Wes
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57236741/387278604/-1133349033?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230112deadline7_dm_od90ds_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGE1MWQ4ZC05MjkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hJVp5gY-qSGpyH-ZFZoTdFD93Cym0CzEhKP74QLODlY=)

Hey there, it’s Dawn Moore, Maryland’s next First Lady. I hope 2023 is treating you and your family well so far! 2022 was a year of hard work, hitting the campaign trail, celebrating, and the Moore-Miller team putting our all into building a brighter future where all Marylanders can thrive. I am so proud of my husband and can’t wait to see him sworn in next week! Since the New Year began, I’ve been busy helping Wes prepare to take the oath of office and co-chairing the Inaugural People’s Ball, where we’re bringing Marylanders and amazing entertainers together for a night of dancing and celebration before the Moore-Miller administration gets to work. But on the same day Wes is sworn in and we celebrate this momentous victory, _we have to pause all fundraising activity until the legislative session ends in April._ **That’s why I’m reaching out today to ask you to help me help Wes before this fundraising freeze begins on January 18.** **[Will you rush a grassroots contribution of $10 right now to help Wes reach his $30,000 goal before 11:59 pm next Tuesday, so we can keep our movement fueled and moving forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57236742/387278605/-1133349033?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230112deadline7_dm_od90ds_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGE1MWQ4ZC05MjkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hJVp5gY-qSGpyH-ZFZoTdFD93Cym0CzEhKP74QLODlY=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Hey there, it’s Dawn Moore, Maryland’s next First Lady. I hope 2023 is treating you and your family well so far! 2022 was a year of hard work, hitting the campaign trail, celebrating, and the Moore-Miller team putting our all into building a brighter future where all Marylanders can thrive. I am so proud of my husband and can’t wait to see him sworn in next week! Since the New Year began, I’ve been busy helping Wes prepare to take the oath of office and co-chairing the Inaugural People’s Ball, where we’re bringing Marylanders and amazing entertainers together for a night of dancing and celebration before the Moore-Miller administration gets to work. But on the same day Wes is sworn in and we celebrate this momentous victory, we have to pause all fundraising activity until the legislative session ends in April. That’s why I’m reaching out today to ask you to help me help Wes before this fundraising freeze begins on January 18. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for all you do to support Wes as he gets to work as your next Governor! — Dawn ** | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, Rhodes Scholar, former small business owner and leader of one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations — and now, your Governor-Elect! body:
I've officially launched my 2024 campaign...
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62195795:JQABH-GRN:m:1:3334294963:FEF384E4A46B03EE0CEC5500AEF85ABB:r)
---
Peter,
---
Last November, my congressional seat was the tipping point that gave conservatives control of the House and ENDED Nancy Pelosi's career as speaker.
---
**But the Democrats have already named me their top target in 2024 as they fight to overcome our razor-thin 4-seat House majority.**
---
That's why I'm asking grassroots conservatives from across the country to join my 2024 campaign as Founding Members to help defend my critical bellwether seat from a radical Democrat.
---
[**Please make a contribution of any amount to accept your Founding Membership with my 2024 campaign and serve as my co-pilot in Congress for the next two years.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62195795:JQABH-GRN:m:1:3334294963:FEF384E4A46B03EE0CEC5500AEF85ABB:r)
---

[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62195795:JQABH-GRN:m:1:3334294963:FEF384E4A46B03EE0CEC5500AEF85ABB:r)
[ACCEPT YOUR MEMBERSHIP ✅>> ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62195795:JQABH-GRN:m:1:3334294963:FEF384E4A46B03EE0CEC5500AEF85ABB:r)
---

We've now defeated the radical Left three times in deep-blue California.
---
Back in May of 2020, we defied the odds by flipping the first Democrat-held congressional district in California since 1998.
---
Then, when pundits said we could never defend the seat in the general election with Joe Biden at the top of the ticket, we won for a second time.
---
Finally, California progressives gerrymandered my district into a seat Biden would have won by double digits in 2020 to try and take us down...
---
_... but we won by the biggest margin yet to give conservatives the House majority and retire Nancy Pelosi._
---
Winning in 2024 and preserving our narrow House majority isn't going to be easy, Peter.
---
But with patriots like YOU behind me, I know we'll pull it off.
---
[**So please, make a contribution of any amount to accept your Founding Membership with my 2024 campaign and serve as my co-pilot in Congress for the next two years.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62195795:JQABH-GRN:m:1:3334294963:FEF384E4A46B03EE0CEC5500AEF85ABB:r)
---
Thank you,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62195795:JQABH-GRN:m:1:3334294963:FEF384E4A46B03EE0CEC5500AEF85ABB:r)

name: Ryan Chamberlin Campaign
subject: The strange things I hear as a dad of seven...
body:
| | |
---

As a dad of seven, I hear daily conversations between brothers that sometimes just make me laugh. One such conversation occurred this morning when I came across my four-year-old Judah telling my twelve-year-old Israel, "Did you know Jesus can control your arms?", to which Israel promptly replied, "Yes! Of course, He can. Dude everyone knows that."

I love hearing my sons speak to each other. I wonder if Abba ever dips His ear down low to hear what His children are saying one to another? It's like dad walks in the room and walks up on your conversation to see how your day is going. I wonder if would He be pleased? Would He catch us talking about His goodness? Would He catch us blessing or curing one another?

This is how we love Abba well, considering His heart, feelings, and desires. He loves it when we speak well to each other and is surely overjoyed to catch us remembering Him in thanks.

He hears. He listens. He feels. He's real. Honor Him one to another today. Bless the Lord oh our souls!

Amen? I bless you in Jesus name - Thomas and Mandi + 7 Awesome Boys

**P.s.** I'm inviting you to join me for a heart-to-heart time to connect and share some updates, maybe some worship, exciting announcements, prayer, and share a word of encouragement that I know will bless you.

Tonight at 7:30 CST: [Click Here to Register to Join (You get the Replay Link This Way)](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=g06vxgGIoQve0iI&b=llJHp1ndZcG4wp8MZTIvQw)

**P.s.s.** To support [click here](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=g06vxgGIoQve0iI&b=VjG599Dj.Ps9S8_W5S2wvQ)

12305 SE 55th Avenue Rd
Belleview FL 34420
USA

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Sharing the big news with you personally, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57238333/387284309/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230112_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzc5OWFjODItOTc5Mi1lZDExLTlkN2ItMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=crdwS0ZMAmcwkz_u2LFtFmy7LmaQ5_etLEf8dWAB4Ew=)
---
I wanted to share the official news with you personally, Peter:** ** **I’m running for reelection to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support _today_ is so important.** The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades — enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too. But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign. **So that’s what I’m asking of you today, Peter. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority.** [_**Please, will you split $25 between my campaign and HER Time to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign to defeat the GOP in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57238334/387284310/-2030493197?amount=25&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230112_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzc5OWFjODItOTc5Mi1lZDExLTlkN2ItMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=crdwS0ZMAmcwkz_u2LFtFmy7LmaQ5_etLEf8dWAB4Ew=) I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic. But there are so many critical fights ahead — for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a _permanent_ paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that. **The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues, so I’m counting on your help to make sure we can take them head on and win.[_Please, Peter, will you split $25 between my campaign and HER Time to defend our Democratic Senate majority and make sure that I can keep fighting for you in the Senate?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57238335/387284311/-2030493197?amount=25&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230112_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzc5OWFjODItOTc5Mi1lZDExLTlkN2ItMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=crdwS0ZMAmcwkz_u2LFtFmy7LmaQ5_etLEf8dWAB4Ew=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57238336/387284312/-2030493197?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230112_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzc5OWFjODItOTc5Mi1lZDExLTlkN2ItMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=crdwS0ZMAmcwkz_u2LFtFmy7LmaQ5_etLEf8dWAB4Ew=)

clean_body: | = I wanted to share the official news with you personally, Peter: I’m running for reelection to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support today is so important. The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades — enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too. But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign. So that’s what I’m asking of you today, Peter. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority. = I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic. But there are so many critical fights ahead — for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a permanent paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that. The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues, so I’m counting on your help to make sure we can take them head on and win.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Kirsten = HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zdg3asj0ue7ve2e317jqh350tts5pvjqn4uko2fg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm8pb7cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z57u7h42hm0adbv91bg12caj97fb0f31od99odh0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm8pb7cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcdb0tgrm8cenffkbuq20tnp8dh0jnoijvjhd8no_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm8pb7cth2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Ted
subject: New Year, New Maps.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
AOTL New Year’s resolution...
|
---

The new year is a time to set goals and make resolutions. I can't believe it is already 2023, friend. Check out All On The Line's new year’s resolutions:
* * *
* **_Engage the public_** to take the movement forward, ensuring voters across the country have the knowledge and awareness to make decisive choices within their constitutional power.
* **_Mobilize grassroots activists across the country_** to advocate for redraws where gerrymandered maps still exist and prevent underrepresented groups from having a voice in policy decision-making and at the ballot box.
* **_Champion voting accessibility _**through democracy reform and organizing volunteers to protect fair maps and fair elections.

* * *
[**_Help All On The Line reach their goals in 2023. A few bucks will give us the boost we need. Donate today._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57239425/387288593/-767066908?refcode=20230111_AOTL_F_nynewmaps_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3M2ViNTk2LTlhOTItZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gSIlDBdZLSxYu9fPl6BxWZeSaY5V8A6xS3lZ315zkss=)

Every year, your efforts to join us in the fight to strengthen our democracy continues to inspire us. We believe in the principles of justice and fairness. In 2023, we strive to continue what we started in defending our most fundamental right: the right to vote and be fairly represented.
Last year, we witnessed significant monumental victories in places like Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Colorado, where voters had a significant impact on the future of their communities. As a result, we are continuing to lay the foundation for democracy reform in redistricting and are anticipating obstacles where districts are still heavily gerrymandered in places like Alabama and Ohio.
The new year may bring many changes for redistricting, but one thing is sure: **new maps must be on the agenda.**[**Make your new year's resolution a contribution to All On The Line's work to fight for fair maps.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57239436/387288632/-767066908?refcode=20230111_AOTL_F_nynewmaps_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3M2ViNTk2LTlhOTItZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gSIlDBdZLSxYu9fPl6BxWZeSaY5V8A6xS3lZ315zkss=)
So, new year, new maps, and new challenges, but a more robust democracy to face it because of you.
\-- Ted Corcoran

Organizing Director

**_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

name: American Briefing
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z460kcog1kee77disi7uc7vt0l9qsbdobgus64o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgmcp76c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, **" The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism."**
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zve8991kfm0v766qbhc8oiisdp7o6uqvbtecv0rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgmcp76c3h2bs)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4nkbjp5elab3k5dug2nhglbtajhtn8jnr4abbv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgmcp76c3h2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: please, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [_**Peter, last week I was officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader, after 14 failed, dysfunctional attempts to convene our Congress. Now, I 'm asking you to help me lead Democrats in a historic fundraising month to show we stand ready to win back the House Majority. Will you split a gift between myself and Abigail Spanberger? I can't tell you how much it would mean to see your donation >>**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/hKNNEjSqmyrVkGmklScjcEh4DkiAuaIN7MrmDlw6qCA=/GHvo23G9heEj69LG7Vxq37LkB-E59btOmhPZpzqc-yw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230112-1-EM&amount=25)

**Peter, as the new Democratic Leader, I want to take this moment to share what I stand for and earn your support:**

I was raised by working-class parents.

I'm a product of New York City's public schools and grew up in a predominantly African-American neighborhood in Brooklyn.

**Now, I 'm leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We're not wasting a single second getting to work.**

Which is why I'm asking for a historic surge of support to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. [_**Can I count on you to split a gift between myself and Abigail Spanberger?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/hKNNEjSqmyrVkGmklScjcEh4DkiAuaIN7MrmDlw6qCA=/GHvo23G9heEj69LG7Vxq37LkB-E59btOmhPZpzqc-yw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230112-1-EM&amount=25)

| [CONTRIBUTE $25 ](https://act.myngp.com/el/hKNNEjSqmyrVkGmklScjcEh4DkiAuaIN7MrmDlw6qCA=/GHvo23G9heEj69LG7Vxq37LkB-E59btOmhPZpzqc-yw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230112-1-EM&amount=25)

| [CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://act.myngp.com/el/hKNNEjSqmyrVkGmklScjcEh4DkiAuaIN7MrmDlw6qCA=/GHvo23G9heEj69LG7Vxq37LkB-E59btOmhPZpzqc-yw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230112-1-EM&amount=50)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT ](https://act.myngp.com/el/hKNNEjSqmyrVkGmklScjcEh4DkiAuaIN7MrmDlw6qCA=/GHvo23G9heEj69LG7Vxq37LkB-E59btOmhPZpzqc-yw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230112-1-EM)
---
Peter, I will always fight for what's right, and I don't care if it makes me a target.

I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years - _even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers._

I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging - _even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back._

I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics.

**And I know we can win back the House - the right way - but I need your help to act fast.**

This is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are.

[_**So I 'm humbly asking 1,000 Democrats to chip in before midnight and prove that we will spare no expense to reclaim our House Majority >>**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/hKNNEjSqmyrVkGmklScjcEh4DkiAuaIN7MrmDlw6qCA=/GHvo23G9heEj69LG7Vxq37LkB-E59btOmhPZpzqc-yw=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230112-1-EM&amount=25)

Keep the faith,
Hakeem

clean_body: | Peter, as the new Democratic Leader, I want to take this moment to share what I stand for and earn your support: I was raised by working-class parents. I'm a product of New York City's public schools and grew up in a predominantly African-American neighborhood in Brooklyn. Now, I 'm leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We're not wasting a single second getting to work. Which is why I'm asking for a historic surge of support to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. | | | | | | | Peter, I will always fight for what's right, and I don't care if it makes me a target. I helped House Democrats pass the first meaningful gun safety legislation in 30 years - even though it made us a target of the corporate gun manufacturers. I stood with our caucus to call out corporate price-gouging - even though we knew that special interest groups would fight back. I know House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics. And I know we can win back the House - the right way - but I need your help to act fast. This is our best shot to show just how strong Democrats are. Friend,

This won't take long.

All you need to know is that the January 6th Committee LIED and covered up the TRUTH and that I need YOU to stand with me NOW.

_**[Please rush in a donation of ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to PROUDLY stand with me and join the Trump Defense Task Force.>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z59lfttmunj7osbd8990lj6ttegtq5654nf0hngo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm2or1c5h2bs)**_

For nearly 2 years, _**as inflation skyrocketed, crime soared, the border was erased, and Joe Biden destroyed our country,**_ the American People have been lied to by the partisan witch hunt known as the **Unselect Committee on January 6th:**

**They cut out the part of my speech where I encouraged protestors to make their voices heard "PEACEFULLY and PATRIOTICALLY."

Liz Cheney deliberately omitted the part of my tweet where I told protestors to "Go HOME with LOVE and IN PEACE."

They slanderously claimed I did not respond for "187 minutes." I issued a statement urging peace and respect for law enforcement within 25 minutes of the Capitol breach.

They hid and covered up my multiple tweets and videos, which were censored by Twitter and the FBI, in which I called for law and order, and no violence.**

__You need to know that everything they've said about me is a LIE. LIE. LIE.__
** **
_**[Please stop what you're doing and contribute of ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to DEFEND me on the Trump Defense Task Force.>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn4ialo1eos8a17iila2hj1fvu5jh1njajpgrigg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm2or1c5h2bs)**_

_The REAL story is what the Committee did NOT mention in their fake trial:_

I urged the deployment of _10,000 National Guard troops_ to keep the event safe for all involved. Nancy Pelosi and the DC Mayor REFUSED.

The Committee barely even discussed the **catastrophic security failures at the Capitol** and who was responsible for them.

They did not talk about the REASON for the protest - _a rigged and stolen election._

Most importantly, the Unselect Committee did not produce a single shred of evidence that I in ANY WAY intended or wanted violence at the Capitol.

The events of January 6th were NOT an insurrection; they were a protest that tragically got out of control - and which the Left has been weaponizing ever since to censor, spy on, and persecute American citizens.

**The entire phony hoax is about taking away your speech, taking away your vote, and taking away your freedom.**

_From the day I came down the escalator,_ it has been one Witch Hunt after another: Russia, Russia, Russia; Ukraine, Ukraine, Ukraine; Impeachment Hoax #1, Impeachment Hoax #2; the FBI's censorship of the Laptop from Hell, the Boxes Hoax, and so many more.

**Alongside these other persecutions, the Unselect Committee will go down in history as a con job and a disgrace. **They want to stop us from taking back our Country. But as long as I have you by my side, _they will fail, and we will WIN._

There's no time to waste, Friend.

_**[Please rush in a donation of ANY AMOUNT IMMEDIATELY to PROUDLY stand with me and join the Trump Defense Task Force.>>](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg7mdc7b0628p82na3fmeu98n64kj5tf2eu3akv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm2or1c5h2bs)**_

Thank you,

name: American Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0334%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=tveE0cRZAJqTs6xM3qNpVQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655482%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1g7BlHFuAY5V%2foxt1GBd9Q&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655483%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GBRpoMihGNK7aYxlH%2fgwZQ&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655484%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O1z67mfotEojLNiXyIuyag&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Hey Peter, Congress has been sworn in with a new Republican majority in the House. With the change in leadership, conservatives have **greater oversight power** to investigate and hold the Biden Administration—and federal agencies—accountable to the American people. And with greater control of the House, conservatives can stop Biden and Senate Democrats from advancing their radical policies: **inflationary spending,** **open borders** , **rigging our federal election laws,** and **handouts to the climate extremists.** And perhaps most importantly**, conservatives can advance their own legislation in the House.** Passing the right policies (even if Biden won’t sign them) will set a clear vision for America’s future. We must provide a stark contrast to the failed policies of Joe Biden. Right now, conservatives can build the policy platform for a winning conservative presidency in 2024: 🔔 Empower parents to make education choices 🔔 Secure America’s borders and reduce crime 🔔 Ensure free and fair elections 🔔 Reverse the growth of regulations, spending, and inflation🔔 Counter the threat of Communist China 🔔 Hold Big Tech accountable🔔 Protect the unborn

name: =?utf-8?Q?James=20P.=20Bradley?=
subject: Dianne Feinstein needs to retire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bradley for Senate
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2fa380567f&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter, this is**James Bradley** and I’m asking for your support to help **Dianne Feinstein** ...**RETIRE**.If you don’t already know me, I made my debut in California politics in 2018 taking on Senator Feinstein in a crowded field of 32 candidates. I was an outsider running a shoestring but effective campaign, but I defied expectations and finished as the top GOP candidate in the race.My friends, I will be your fighter and I won’t hesitate to deliver on the promises I make to my constituents. As a **US Coast Guard** veteran, I took on **Trump** troll **Ted Lieu** and made it once more into the General election before being edged out by the powerful and extravagantly financed Democratic machine.From my days in **The Guard** , I learned that a narrow defeat may be just a necessary step to victory. I didn’t stop with my promise and commitment to serve California and the US, **AND I NEVER WILL!**
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=ba717270c1&e=fdefed58de)
| [HELP JAMES BRADLEY RETIRE DIANNE FEINSTEIN!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=4f20186ae8&e=fdefed58de)
---
At the fall of Kabul, I put together a team to save the remaining citizens left behind by Biden.I fought for the families of loved ones that died at the hands of Fauci’s Remdesivir Death Protocol.I organized 13 Candidate plaintiffs to clean up the elections after the 2020 steal.**Not bad for a man without a political machine in his corner, carrying on the fight with wit, devotion and a small group of like-minded citizens, huh?**
| [DONATE NOW: HELP JAMES BRADLEY WIN THIS RACE](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d5f7e09c20&e=fdefed58de)
---
And now I am ready and eager to take on **Feinstein** once again in the 2024 race, and I want you to be a part of this historic event. I’m therefore asking each of you to step up and contribute now so I can get ahead of the rush. Always an outsider, owned by no faction, I need your help to help California come back from the mess the Loony Left has made for over 40 years!What is it worth to get our state back, to be _**The Golden State**_ once more, and not the butt of jokes about public defecation, failing electrical grids and a collapsing educational system?**Ask yourself now what that’s worth, and then CHIP IN to join this fight with me.**
| [CHIP IN $20 TO RETIRE DIANNE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d1b55d5ce7&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [CHIP IN $50 TO RETIRE DIANNE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c715f7e382&e=fdefed58de)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 TO RETIRE DIANNE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=62ee47fd26&e=fdefed58de)
---
We want term limits in government. Dianne Feinstein, at EIGHTY NINE years old, is the _**perfect**_ example of why we need term limits.At the end of her term, she’ll be 97 years old. Now, I have respect for the elderly but when you’re a century old you’re not fit to serve in Congress anymore.Dianne Feinstein and her Chinese spy driver need to GET GONE from the Senate. I can get rid of her in 2024, but I need to start FAST and I need to start **NOW**!California is a big state but it’s not a state we can’t win with the right effort. We’ve seen the Recall Gavin effort and many other conservative movements take root here. Now that we’re getting a hold on ballot harvesting, we can truly beat the Left.So, chip in to my campaign today so that Dianne won’t understand what hit her when she sees my financial disclosure report and sees the kind of cash we’ll have to spend to take her down!
| [CHIP IN TO RETIRE DIANNE FEINSTEIN!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=77589a817b&e=fdefed58de)
---
Victory is ours.Let’s do this,James P. BradleyCandidate for US Senate, 2024
|
---

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: AFSCME District Council 33 Endorses Dr. Nina Ahmad for City Council At Large.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
I hope 2023 has been good for you so far. Started off well for me-I have great news to share!
The largest [union representing almost 10,000 blue-collar municipal workers](https://act.myngp.com/el/pyPHg_h7p7_N9d7TmnN72Ya0HKDEyP0MHQ2F4jC2s70=/ZM38H2sJEohNi9c8ZXFg1g7c0hBL0R_CJdOMgtr8wQM=) has unanimously endorsed my candidacy for Philadelphia City Council-At Large.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/pyPHg_h7p7_N9d7TmnN72Ya0HKDEyP0MHQ2F4jC2s70=/ZM38H2sJEohNi9c8ZXFg1g7c0hBL0R_CJdOMgtr8wQM=)

AFSCME DC 33 represents 15 locals of some of the most visible city employees in the coronavirus era from sanitation workers to correctional officers. This union shapes not only the city budget but Philadelphia's labor movement.
Running for City Council At-Large with the support and partnership of AFSCME DC33, truly humbles me - I thank them for their trust in me. I do not take it lightly. I promise to be transparent and always available. I will always fight my heart out for those members and working families across our City.
[Please donate $25 to keep Nina's Momentum going to help Democrats continue protecting our fundamental rights, ensuring every eligible voter has their voice heard, and investing in critical programs.](https://act.myngp.com/el/pyPHg_h7p7_N9d7TmnN72Ya0HKDEyP0MHQ2F4jC2s70=/ZM38H2sJEohNi9c8ZXFg1g7c0hBL0R_CJdOMgtr8wQM=)

subject: Surprising ways your children are taught socialism
body:
And it’s no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of un

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9k75dpa0tf5u5dvs0ih6vmnbq2k61kq587tvovo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm1oj4c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation's youth. And it's no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education.

But today's young people don't understand the true realities of socialism--or the clever ways it's being introduced to them.

That's why our latest addition to The Libertas Institute's _Tuttle Twins_ series is so important, _["The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism."](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zccs741cgop16erfi5a4cfvntnviueupdcjfgotg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm1oj4c9h2bs)_

[https://act.libertas.org/tt-subtle-ways](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoe9s87tp6vc374qoq9jsreme3ouv6le75ubqn9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm1oj4c9h2bs)

Inside this eBook, you'll get an in-depth look at some of the socialist concepts being fed to your children. But more importantly, you'll discover practical ways to explain socialism while teaching your children important liberty-based principles of how to live free.

If you're concerned with the rise in socialism in our country--especially among our nation's youth--this is the eBook for YOU!

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of, [_The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism._](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zecnv0pc52gs7bu5kfp1np8ssc3rt3u92eqgclm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm1oj4c9h2bs)

Thank you,

Connor Boyack

name: 1600 Daily
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaa8mea829nrah1bp8t9atfel5tc5p8s21vffamo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm6ob4cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z39hvhgh7qfjpk5uk48938uk3p8q8npnqom3sjq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm6ob4cph2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8ju5ifd0v32srpq78l0hpocbo5i9v0nju5k28v0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm6ob4cph2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: I can’t overstate the urgency.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
| Peter, I can’t overstate the urgency of this situation. Marjorie Taylor Greene just launched the first attack ads against me as the Democratic Leader in a dishonest smear to distort my record. [**I’m not easily insulted – but when extremists fan the flames of hostility, you have to believe I’m going to respond.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57251602/387305612/1662333042?refcode=20230112_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_cl_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzc5YzY1Ni1hYjkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5mujp0WEuyAmKFfxDdybNMkaiQliP05wPa2Hlz_YSY=) [_**To counter these attacks and defend my Democrats, I need to launch my own ads to set the record straight. Because, Peter, attack ads are only going to come at us more and more. Democrats must be prepared to respond quickly to get our message out there. So I’m gearing up to launch my first wave of ads as your Leader, and I’m hoping you’ll help me raise 500 gifts before midnight to fund them. Can I count on you? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57251603/387305617/1662333042?refcode=20230112_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_cl_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzc5YzY1Ni1hYjkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5mujp0WEuyAmKFfxDdybNMkaiQliP05wPa2Hlz_YSY=) Peter, I’ll never back down from extreme MAGA Republicans who lie to the American people. Especially not one who has promoted violence and armed insurrection. This is just one of many reasons why we must take back the House. [**_Immediately._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57251604/387305618/1662333042?refcode=20230112_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_cl_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzc5YzY1Ni1hYjkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5mujp0WEuyAmKFfxDdybNMkaiQliP05wPa2Hlz_YSY=) But Peter, we can’t flip the House if dangerous lies in ads like this one go unanswered – so I can’t overstate the urgency of the next 24 hours. [_**I need 500 supporters to help me stand up to these shameful smears. | | | Dear Peter _\-- the Radical Left and the Biden Regime put America Last**again and again...**_

**[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=4830e82999&e=645b3b1338)**

The Mexican cartels running our border are foreign terrorist organizations actively killing Americans.

**[We must put a permanent stop to it](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=4776f32009&e=645b3b1338).**

**_And now the Biden admin will allow up to 30,000 migrants a month into the US from Cuba, Haiti, Nicaragua and Venezuela._**
**[What can this be called other than an invasion? We must strengthen and close our borders immediately](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=7e44571650&e=645b3b1338).**

_**[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=201c149917&e=645b3b1338)**_

**Fentanyl is a serious problem in our country that the Biden Regime has been ignoring for far too long, destroying families across America.**

We must do everything we can to combat this crisis and protect our loved ones.

Strengthening and closing our border is a good start.

**_Fentanyl is genociding our youth and killing hundreds of thousands. It's become the number one cause of death for young people._**

This is unacceptable.
* **We must secure our border.**
* **We must finish the border wall.**
* **We must enforce an immigration moratorium.**

_That's America First_.
**[Help us keep fighting by making a contribution to mobilize patriots in Congress!](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=c9b849ca7a&e=645b3b1338)** [**_CONTRIBUTE $250_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=22dabb1668&e=645b3b1338)

[**_CONTRIBUTE $100_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9ca7c5453c&e=645b3b1338)

[**_CONTRIBUTE $50 _**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=497739b649&e=645b3b1338)

[**_CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=128a76422d&e=645b3b1338) _**[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=59b5ddd56e&e=645b3b1338)**_

Fentanyl is a serious problem in our country that the Biden Regime has been ignoring for far too long, destroying families across America. We must do everything we can to combat this crisis and protect our loved ones. Strengthening and closing our border is a good start. Fentanyl is genociding our youth and killing hundreds of thousands. It's become the number one cause of death for young people. This is unacceptable. We must secure our border. We must finish the border wall. We must enforce an immigration moratorium. That's America First. Respectfully, Paul Gosar, D.D.S. | | PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Paul Gosar for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Surprising ways your children are taught socialism
body:
Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation’s youth. And it’s no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh740ti40g3q2asouk2crq7miad0ro0f93uh6s4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm9p37c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation's youth. And it's no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education.

But today's young people don't understand the true realities of socialism--or the clever ways it's being introduced to them.

That's why our latest addition to The Libertas Institute's _Tuttle Twins_ series is so important, _["The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism."](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvfuab19ce3ghq65dru0l71klaa8nc7vktqlm9co_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm9p37c3h2bs)_

Inside this eBook, you'll get an in-depth look at some of the socialist concepts being fed to your children. But more importantly, you'll discover practical ways to explain socialism while teaching your children important liberty-based principles of how to live free.

If you're concerned with the rise in socialism in our country--especially among our nation's youth--this is the eBook for YOU!

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of, [_The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism._](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zopou39hh5pm00n1708g290sbar8uh62rdfevbpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm9p37c3h2bs)

Thank you,

Connor Boyack

| | Friend, Do you have the power to choose a quality school for your child, or is your child stuck in a school that barely meets his or her needs? Do you believe every child deserves better and parents deserve choices? **Here at the American Federation for Children, we do too!** We’re committed to putting education decisions for children back in the hands of parents. Today we're conducting our Official 2023 School Choice Survey. **[_Take the survey now and let us know what options you have in your state >>_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655498%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yRExSrg%2f%2b44gpjBpPl8Imw&sysid=1)**

Friend, with your input, you can help us shape the future of education and bring choice to parents and students across the country.

---
| | _Who is the American Federation for Children? _ We’re an organization of parents, activists, and policy professionals all united under one mission: _**bringing school choice to parents and students in every state.**_ We believe EVERY parent deserves a choice, and EVERY child deserves better. **And 72% of Americans agree.** Yet, not every state offers even one alternative to traditional public school. **That’s not fair to students or parents.** If you agree, take our _Official 2023 School Choice Survey_ and join our fight for school choice:**[_https://secure.anedot.com/americanfederationforchildren/school-choice/_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c655407%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iEb%2fJlJoJmLnsuOokwjeNw&sysid=1)** Thank you, American Federation for Children

name: American Defense News
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ide

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8e401f46hvf21ut1h92uqq15d9m8qaa1h330ua0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm9p36cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, "**The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism**."

In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3l43eatk9idlmfpmna02b9lmevr5m20o4ogqr6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clgm9p36cdh2bs)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: AFSCME District Council 33 Endorses Dr. Nina Ahmad for City Council At Large.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
I hope 2023 has been good for you so far. Started off well for me-I have great news to share!
The largest [union representing almost 10,000 blue-collar municipal workers](https://act.myngp.com/el/HjcKlcI8Aj4gqsuR-l-J9ojizPcToZ9w-k7CRNA0n7k=/9lhfJURc_8UpGCBmmczbl_r3fvjwg9kRFGUOFIXcaGc=) has unanimously endorsed my candidacy for Philadelphia City Council-At Large.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HjcKlcI8Aj4gqsuR-l-J9ojizPcToZ9w-k7CRNA0n7k=/9lhfJURc_8UpGCBmmczbl_r3fvjwg9kRFGUOFIXcaGc=)

AFSCME DC 33 represents 15 locals of some of the most visible city employees in the coronavirus era from sanitation workers to correctional officers. This union shapes not only the city budget but Philadelphia's labor movement.
Running for City Council At-Large with the support and partnership of AFSCME DC33, truly humbles me - I thank them for their trust in me. I do not take it lightly. I promise to be transparent and always available. I will always fight my heart out for those members and working families across our City.
[Please donate $25 to keep Nina's Momentum going to help Democrats continue protecting our fundamental rights, ensuring every eligible voter has their voice heard, and investing in critical programs.](https://act.myngp.com/el/HjcKlcI8Aj4gqsuR-l-J9ojizPcToZ9w-k7CRNA0n7k=/9lhfJURc_8UpGCBmmczbl_r3fvjwg9kRFGUOFIXcaGc=)

Paid for by Nina for Philly

Philadelphia PA 19118 United States

clean_body: I hope 2023 has been good for you so far. Started off well for me-I have great news to share! The largest = has unanimously endorsed my candidacy for Philadelphia City Council-At Large. = AFSCME DC 33 represents 15 locals of some of the most visible city employees in the coronavirus era from sanitation workers to correctional officers. This union shapes not only the city budget but Philadelphia's labor movement. Running for City Council At-Large with the support and partnership of AFSCME DC33, truly humbles me - I thank them for their trust in me. I do not take it lightly. I promise to be transparent and always available. I will always fight my heart out for those members and working families across our City. = Paid for by Nina for Philly Nina for Philly PO Box 27339 Philadelphia PA 19118 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Please commit yourself to the principle that “No One is Above the Law”
body:
If you have already made a contribution to support Judicial Watch in 2023 thank you!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

_If you have already made a contribution to support Judicial Watch in 2023**... thank you!**_
But if you haven't, [I urge you to help us with a tax-deductible gift today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61767&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61767&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

The new year is already presenting us with _new_ challenges...

...like the Biden Justice Department _belatedly_ announcing it is "investigating" classified documents from Joe Biden's time as Vice President that were "found" while packing up records at a downtown Washington DC office used by Biden before his election!

[We need your financial support to get to the facts about this apparent violation of the law](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61767&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE), because I sure don't trust the Biden team to launch a _serious, thorough and impartial_ investigation into it!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61767&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

Your commitment now will also help us score _more_ victories for the American people and for the rule of law as we _continue to lead_ the national fight to keep our elections honest. Our in-depth research and _historic_ and _successful_ lawsuits to force states to follow federal law and clean their voter rolls are _the very best way to block voter fraud_.

We are already fighting hard in the courts and leaning hard on the new Congress to expose Biden family corruption, enforce our nation's laws against illegal immigration, and challenge the spread of critical race theory.

And we are building on our 2022 successes by investigating...and being prepared to challenge in court...unconstitutional local and state programs and laws that divide Americans by creating discrimination based on race, ethnicity, gender and sexual orientation.

_These are critically important fights that no one else is waging as effectively as Judicial Watch_.

**But our continued success depends on patriots like you joining our team!**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61767&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

We still cannot trust politicians in Congress, _Republicans or Democrats_ , or politically-driven bureaucrats in the Biden administration to do the right thing in fighting _against_ corruption and _for_ the rule of law!

Thanks our members, we're clearly the most effective government watchdog in the country ...and [**that’s why I need you to stand strong with us now**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61767&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE), in these critical early weeks of 2023!

[Please stand with us today...](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61767&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61767&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 educatio
| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb9ctj0mag5bpvd8nmtq1v1h2rdv06vek7cmqh4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim8o74chh2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zh75ttn4d370paq3tlaedh8n64v1m0q6ooh2k0j8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim8o74chh2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi692ui43loovaej6vhlm54dd9hl0rgi3591b66g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim8o74chh2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfl0dma4jhuccettohvu3ks4ul14elolb6aphil0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim8o74chh2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmf34bqvoaetqi8lcutqjr1emgucinvhrp9666e8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim8o74chh2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

name: Bonnie Watson Coleman
subject: Thank you for speaking up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57252683/387310148/1328194270?refcode=BWC_EM_FR_3MO_20230112_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjM3NmUzOS1iMTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V0TlYiCT6OaSuRKSm1ZmAJtLJOqxAoWEX8CZuBDL1rI=&emci=41376e39-b192-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=42376e39-b192-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=30096098) | At the end of last year, my team sent out a priorities survey asking which issues you would like me to focus on in 2023.

You have spoken loud and clear that climate change (86%), reproductive rights (78%), gun violence (74%), and racial justice (74%) are pivotal issues to you and your family.

Here are just a couple of accomplishments from last year:
* Introducing bill to combat the causes and impacts of excess urban heat
* Introducing the Securing Air Travel Act
* Passing the Creating a Respectful and Open World for Natural Hair (CROWN) Act

**I also got arrested, alongside several of my House colleagues, for peacefully protesting the Court’s decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. If I had a choice to fight for our fundamental rights, I would do it again in a heartbeat.**

Whether we successfully address our concerns this year is going to come down to how hard we fight — which is why I need your support every step of the way! Because my team and I rely on grassroots supporters like you for resources to serve our 12th Congressional District, your contribution is what makes our work possible. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:

Companies controlled by the Chinese Communist Party are buying up TENS OF THOUSANDS ACRES of farmland _right here in America - and they’re even getting into the free state of Florida._

Right now, I’m working with Florida agriculture leaders to STOP the CCP from buying our farmland and impacting our food supply, but I need your help.

If we’re going to stop the CCP invasion, we need every single American patriot to stand strong.

body:
Friend, earlier this week a new Congress got seated. | | | Serving the American people never gets old, friend. **We just ushered in one of the most promising, diverse, and hardworking classes of Democratic representatives in our history.** In this Congress, I will be laser-focused on fighting for my district and continuing to keep corrupt leaders accountable. We were elected to serve our communities. Not use our power for personal gain. I won’t stand for lies or abuses of power. Our policies have the overwhelming support of the American people.*
* 92% of US adults want Congress to “limit the cost of prescription drugs"
* 84% of US adults want Congress to “pass a new voting rights law to protect every citizen’s right to vote"
* 78% of US adults want Congress to increase aid to schools for increased teacher compensation
* 70% of US adults want Congress to enact laws that would make it easier for workers to unionize

*According to [Marquette University Law School](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDHX5quTMpAwAziuR8FgZoRb5WnqWxlQNirak_rVars2-uHHkO_O639XlyTq4T0xYSZhc0vBrcmP1Ge8xv43ipsdG4M27skYJeqW7WjD_wZOA-lK60UlPYmoT-xGozB2xyw6enq7S6RkjelsN7G48-oz7wUb8DbyZA7Oib9ClMrOe3ZneHxm9WXZF7SVs3gskQFn-tk4GQIh_X-QqGERyicmcMMFWnkzYv_uoWLR1wxhlprtCC9LsA7DF-k9nULdIZTplHUOTUaMU-xGxB6YU54G3ccUU4vZRR-zLckgRk3eT6IJoKdKHmjJml5sPZnDnw4VlZhyKkQ-UBppH9_J0tLad8XGrI3P6aqC2ZywG9civ5K5ORXalMkWONGvFiZBDCw/3ss/44henSs6Qa6Bmj1HmISAlQ/h0/fRRe3ZOadIpK1p5c32Wjl2XBwta61ccLpPJ9WUV2d9E) **Holding corporations accountable. Fighting for our democracy and the right to vote. Protecting our working families.** These are the policies that Democrats have fought for and made strong progress on in 2022, friend. **In 2023, we're committed to continuing that work.** I'm extremely honored to have been sworn in alongside this historic Democratic class, and I look forward to partnering with my colleagues to pass more historic legislation. — Bill Pascrell **[contribute](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wppj5LSzKXEpSAJ7iRqmNTQ4GQqbagMq2QwX2lnnaixFbjERIsHtTrY-qyOlYoPRLh7xoAj6qnLOwxJGxgYeUmAYHVCzJLj1vuBiIIr1IOHPYOVmEsGxq8EsTuJDqcTilUcxhfn77OVbSAnZww9IXUU738dQAoJnwClFcOlyR-FoRvJjhyTsQ5b86MBFYHDLKPhaMBdg86HcMznDIkkzR-s0sGrfaYNp2_AOwdKps5fMO6e7wZAQUSQxH7wHX0XJMm5hr2_X7AJ0dxB-ZyuryjCKp33REs--aQf9x4OUM24POWtSReq-evIg3oONwPRMkn0_sT2n2tCLkppPHok2mNO9d3ieGk9zp-9D6CFtJAO61HsOq8MoiogRywNsnSQJE/3ss/44henSs6Qa6Bmj1HmISAlQ/h1/ztmL_STOr2tBH7X8uWZTj0jW-GHgNkuqMN8Hnm-pB3Q)**

Hi, it's Kirsten Gillibrand. I wanted to share the official news with you personally: **I’m running for re-election to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support _today_ is so important.** The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades — enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too. But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign. **So that’s what I’m asking of you today. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority.** [**Please, will you split $10 between my campaign and Michael Bennet's to become a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign to defeat the GOP in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57252852/387311435/-148300633?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20230112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmFiNmVlNS1iMjkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DfolZDHDqFXxAcLJxwJxQrsk1mXGzPk5JJ9hrGOXBek=) I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic. But there are so many critical fights ahead — for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a _permanent_ paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that. **The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues, so I’m counting on your help to make sure we can take them head on and win.**[**Please, will you split $10 between my campaign and Michael Bennet’s to defend our Democratic Senate majority and make sure that I can keep fighting for you in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57252853/387311436/-148300633?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20230112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmFiNmVlNS1iMjkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DfolZDHDqFXxAcLJxwJxQrsk1mXGzPk5JJ9hrGOXBek=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Kirsten Gillibrand and Michael Bennet will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57252854/387311437/-148300633?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20230112_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmFiNmVlNS1iMjkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DfolZDHDqFXxAcLJxwJxQrsk1mXGzPk5JJ9hrGOXBek=)******

clean_body: | = Hi, it's Kirsten Gillibrand. I wanted to share the official news with you personally: I’m running for re-election to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support today is so important. The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades — enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too. But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign. So that’s what I’m asking of you today. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority. = I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic. But there are so many critical fights ahead — for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a permanent paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that. The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues, so I’m counting on your help to make sure we can take them head on and win.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Kirsten Gillibrand and Michael Bennet will go through immediately: | | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** Thank you, Kirsten Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.
