Friend,
---
Our new House majority is ready to fight for YOUR priorities.
---
That’s why I had my team prepare a survey for Wisconsin voters like you to share your opinions, concerns, and top issues with my office.
---
**[Please take my New Majority Survey to ensure that your priorities are addressed in our new House majority.](https://links.steilforcongress-email.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=d73e7e6521bf48a78d2a7fb3ee6c528b&_e=fKDPybf69gVnTXbXWgJzA8q-QINeWyidVtIqUkCfS0xnL5Qzw3icZ8_zT7wDfoP79V0jgr58yxB9dIaOhsGKWwvxx3GU-I3dSNhNz4Nojt34jFW4xrMo1EfFYUWPOEpIEReRL62mMe5e6qHNRmUzQ_WmnTziYwejK2jR1hfsvTASRduQmb6TjS16ls_yfOqWnI-OYzYF2HK0fmou0mARk_xfFhKO5k5vcciBKD5VYZZ2hmniDLfxeve1J_cRwrPtFA6rO-oMX5d8BX8eN_OFFhJp-43iw6uNDmrrs2hsXQjJSyl3XZ40_jVou1wt1p9Wh8tlIN5yYjJUy_prT0I_lF-XDnE-Un2jk1tmGhZEvezGpo64P77ZQRbV8uYEZutsnw4_oC2N_V05zQ55NWITq6nr0L1RtWFe-5D6cm2D1bx3dJNDpXINbkz0HoRtMc5SQ3bP7_5fGipFQ0pbgDVBkkb-_EDMGmzjT5-WUR3vqqs%3D)**

[TAKE THE SURVEY ](https://links.steilforcongress-email.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=d73e7e6521bf48a78d2a7fb3ee6c528b&_e=fKDPybf69gVnTXbXWgJzA8q-QINeWyidVtIqUkCfS0xnL5Qzw3icZ8_zT7wDfoP79V0jgr58yxB9dIaOhsGKWwvxx3GU-I3dSNhNz4Nojt34jFW4xrMo1EfFYUWPOEpIEReRL62mMe5e6qHNRmUzQ_WmnTziYwejK2jR1hfsvTBjZL-lB4I7BG5w7oVFJbwD9OE-SvD20G-KYGddOLla9utNeqw0clgkJujjdCJKbVMiE5XXwBgckMoeF5SGWWsZUqKPjRhSyyAkNP-iiB_sbJWFX4ICPd2MvdbxZr7MhiFEBx5qroIy9ZuHIGOB8suRoWoDgUHqV0Q_8jqNVkUU9cJkSNHtlVEFdkBrT3mTaN4AnLMwPJ77rEXUex3XJcwec8sKEpe2HyvkQJkoN_BRAAFLJ_Yv4qrvVQ34qi8HYElZ2-c-5XDjOf9kPLIO_u_YG3kdk5NhHPbYMVUuyFcxoHKJN_5RoK_PyY_HIxgpwPo%3D)
---

While I was back home for Christmas, my fellow Wisconsinites shared their grave concerns about the future of our country.
---
Folks are worried about rising costs, a looming recession, our wide-open southern border, the spread of Fentanyl into our communities, and surging crime.
---
**_That’s why I voted “no” on the $1.6 trillion omnibus spending bill that will drive up inflation and do nothing to address the actual needs of our citizens._**
---
But thankfully, the Democrats’ control of the House has come to an end.
---
Our House majority will serve as a check on Biden’s agenda that is clobbering hardworking families and endangering our communities.
---
But to be certain that the issues you care about become our House majority’s top priorities, I need you to complete my survey as soon as possible.

clean_body: I need your input to set our agenda. | Friend, Our new House majority is ready to fight for YOUR priorities. That’s why I had my team prepare a survey for Wisconsin voters like you to share your opinions, concerns, and top issues with my office. While I was back home for Christmas, my fellow Wisconsinites shared their grave concerns about the future of our country. Folks are worried about rising costs, a looming recession, our wide-open southern border, the spread of Fentanyl into our communities, and surging crime. That’s why I voted “no” on the $1.6 trillion omnibus spending bill that will drive up inflation and do nothing to address the actual needs of our citizens. But thankfully, the Democrats’ control of the House has come to an end. Our House majority will serve as a check on Biden’s agenda that is clobbering hardworking families and endangering our communities. But to be certain that the issues you care about become our House majority’s top priorities, I need you to complete my survey as soon as possible. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil Wisconsin’s 1st Congressional District PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Sharing the big news with you personally, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
I wanted to share the official news with you personally, friend:

**I’m running for reelection to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support today is so important.**
The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades – enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too.

But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign.

**So that’s what I’m asking of you today, friend. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority.**
**[Please, will you split $15 between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign to defeat the GOP in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57233121/387264025/-1627083876?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk2183-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjNjY1NTg0LThhOTItZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hNknMZwUkezDFv2oSEO8TYxHYvBt2X_YEvn7Xs4NslE=)**
I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic.

But there are so many critical fights ahead – for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a _permanent_ paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that.
**The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues, so I’m counting on your help to make sure we can take them head on and win.**[**Please, friend, will you split $15 between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to defend our Democratic Senate majority and make sure that I can keep fighting for you in the Senate?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57233122/387264026/-1627083876?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk2183-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjNjY1NTg0LThhOTItZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hNknMZwUkezDFv2oSEO8TYxHYvBt2X_YEvn7Xs4NslE=)
__If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Kirsten Gillibrand and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately:__ | | | [Donate $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57233123/387264027/-1627083876?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=jtk2183-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjNjY1NTg0LThhOTItZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hNknMZwUkezDFv2oSEO8TYxHYvBt2X_YEvn7Xs4NslE=)

clean_body: | | | I wanted to share the official news with you personally, friend: I’m running for reelection to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support today is so important. The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades – enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too. But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign. So that’s what I’m asking of you today, friend. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority. = I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic. But there are so many critical fights ahead – for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a permanent paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that. The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues, so I’m counting on your help to make sure we can take them head on and win.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Kirsten Gillibrand and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Kirsten | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. American Bridge 21st Century 800 Maine Ave SW Suite 400 Washington, DC 20024 United States

subject: It’s terrifying

body:
23 of the 33 Senate seats up for re-election are held by Democrats.
#
Derek -
2024 is going to be a tough year.
23 of the 33 Senate seats up for re-election are held by Democrats. Many of them are in red and purple states. With a 51-49 Senate, it’s terrifying.
The White House is also on the line. Trump is running. DeSantis is running. That campaign is already underway.
It won’t be easy.
But VoteVets will have an absolutely CRITICAL role to play in those tough Senate races. Our messages will cut through the clutter. They will move voters. They will make a difference.
And VoteVets will have a critical role to play in swing states during the presidential campaign as well.
But we can’t do ANY of it without you. So with our first mid-month fundraising drive coming up, we’re asking:
[**Can you please contribute $3 to VoteVets before our first mid-month fundraising deadline comes to a close in just a few days? [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57253925/387317671/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230112-2024_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_B_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwOTc5ZDY0LWI2OTItZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C0-RVL4Q3LpJxf4bZVBF4XhSQVlsyifXhUBVBYfn9Jg=)
| Fellow activist,

We’re certainly not overlooking the many important races happening this year, but we are also starting the year looking ahead to 2024.

The New Pennsylvania Project will be conducting consistent civic engagement and education throughout 2023 to prepare for the municipal elections. We know these local elections will impact communities all across the Commonwealth and often get overlooked.

Time flies, so we want to ensure we are doing everything we can _now_ to set ourselves up for success in the future. Every voter we reach, educate, and empower to vote every year, twice a year, is one less we need to reach in 2024. **[Every moment counts, so we are counting on strong grassroots supporters like you, fellow activist, to help us make the most of them. Will you help us stay on track to 2024 by chipping in $10 or whatever works for you today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57253926/387317672/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230112-2024_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_B_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwOTc5ZDY0LWI2OTItZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C0-RVL4Q3LpJxf4bZVBF4XhSQVlsyifXhUBVBYfn9Jg=)** [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57253927/387317673/409185284?refcode=EM_FR_230112-2024_N_TEAM_90DO_7_NG_B_B1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgwOTc5ZDY0LWI2OTItZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=C0-RVL4Q3LpJxf4bZVBF4XhSQVlsyifXhUBVBYfn9Jg=) 2024 is already shaping up to be an extremely important and competitive election year, all the way from the presidential and Senate elections down to a renewed fight over Pennsylvania’s legislature.

clean_body: The work starts now. = | Fellow activist, We’re certainly not overlooking the many important races happening this year, but we are also starting the year looking ahead to 2024. The New Pennsylvania Project will be conducting consistent civic engagement and education throughout 2023 to prepare for the municipal elections. We know these local elections will impact communities all across the Commonwealth and often get overlooked. Time flies, so we want to ensure we are doing everything we can now to set ourselves up for success in the future. Every voter we reach, educate, and empower to vote every year, twice a year, is one less we need to reach in 2024. = = 2024 is already shaping up to be an extremely important and competitive election year, all the way from the presidential and Senate elections down to a renewed fight over Pennsylvania’s legislature. All our rights and our very democracy will likely once again be on the ballot at every level of government. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Special Elections happening 2/7/2023 for three PA House districts in Allegheny Co only, unless otherwise determined: HD32, HD34, HD35 Municipal Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: ICYMI News
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdf3r6movluuss6kn6sb0vh2vir07sjbml2qivp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim2p77cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdtc2c3renov3945bvcrmnf436cvsafevdn1o8io_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim2p77cjh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zequ3avnoqm1lr7hcf37qb3dlqohp0u73oc1vjgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim2p77cjh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zitno5fr914flc879bddfm952tfittr0lfeqkruo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim2p77cjh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Announcing: OCN’s Priorities For a Healthy Oregon!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Congress
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57254280/387319259/-937858190?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0MWYxYjI2LWI5OTItZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GBjNM0Nzf0bYoHR773kO_ZcdDDn_nBHXzDYgIpgmKiY=&emci=c1db9e75-b392-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=741f1b26-b992-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) | | | Dear Peter, With the Oregon Legislature starting the 2023 session next week, it’s time for all of us to get to work passing strong climate and environmental bills! We must continue to build on the victories of the most recent legislative sessions. The way we do that is with the next set of Priorities for a Healthy Oregon––these are bills the 40 organizations in the Oregon Conservation Network (OCN) collectively choose to prioritize to make the biggest impacts on climate change, and making Oregon a healthier place for everyone. [**I hope you’ll join me in asking your state lawmakers to support these bills in the 2023 legislative session.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57254288/387319263/-937858190?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0MWYxYjI2LWI5OTItZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GBjNM0Nzf0bYoHR773kO_ZcdDDn_nBHXzDYgIpgmKiY=&emci=c1db9e75-b392-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=741f1b26-b992-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) **Here are the 2023 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon:** 1) **Resilient Buildings Package** includes bills to make the buildings we live, work, and learn in more energy efficient, and lower energy bills with the use of electric heating and cooling systems. Oregon’s buildings are the second largest source of greenhouse gas pollution in the state behind transportation––it is crucial that the state take action on this! 2) **Natural Climate Solutions Bill** \- would create a program to help our state sequester as much carbon as possible on our forested and agricultural lands. 3) **The Factory Farm Moratorium** \- Factory farms wreak havoc on groundwater systems, produce high levels of air pollution, produce methane (a nasty greenhouse gas), and create an inhumane environment for livestock. This bill puts a stop to new or expanded factory farms in Oregon until they are adequately regulated to address water and air quality, and animal welfare issues. 4) **Toxic Free Package** \- We also need to protect people, especially our children, from toxics. This package includes:
* **Toxic Free Kids Act Modernization** \- Oregon is overdue in updating this historic act to allow more chemicals to be added to it to better protect our children from harmful toxins.
* **Toxic Free Cosmetics** \- this bill would require that personal care product companies publish all the ingredients of their products on their websites, and would require the phasing out of the most toxic chemicals.
* **Toxic Free Schools** \- would fund the creation of a pesticide tracking system on school grounds and requires transitioning to less or non-toxic alternatives.

5) **Zero Waste Package** aims to reduce Oregon’s waste and includes these five bills:
* **Right to Repair** \- will reduce electronic waste and save people hundreds of dollars a year by allowing them to repair their own electronics.
* **Styrofoam Phase Out** \- phases out the use of styrofoam in food to-go containers, as well as bans the use of highly carcinogenic PFAS chemicals in food packaging.
* A bill that will require a **25% Reduction of Single Use Packaging in 10 Years**.
* **Reusable Containers** \- Updating Oregon law to allow for reusable containers to be used in the bulk section of the supermarket and for eating out.
* **No New Permits for Chemical Recycling Plants** \- while the name might sound nice, chemical recycling leads to localized air pollution and is not healthy for people or the environment.

6) **Budget!** We will fight as we always do for a strong climate budget and for strong Natural Resources agency budgets to make sure our progress is funded. It’s an ambitious environmental and climate agenda for 2023, but the historic moment we are in calls for bold action on every front. Each of these priorities moves the dial on environmental justice. Our priorities will help protect people from toxic chemicals and the worst effects of climate change, and help improve people’s lives while also better protecting Oregon’s environment. [**I hope you will join us in asking your state lawmakers to support the OCN Priorities in the 2023 Session.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57254297/387319271/-937858190?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc0MWYxYjI2LWI5OTItZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GBjNM0Nzf0bYoHR773kO_ZcdDDn_nBHXzDYgIpgmKiY=&emci=c1db9e75-b392-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=741f1b26-b992-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Sincerely, Julia DeGraw

clean_body: | | | Dear Peter, With the Oregon Legislature starting the 2023 session next week, it’s time for all of us to get to work passing strong climate and environmental bills! We must continue to build on the victories of the most recent legislative sessions. The way we do that is with the next set of Priorities for a Healthy Oregon––these are bills the 40 organizations in the Oregon Conservation Network (OCN) collectively choose to prioritize to make the biggest impacts on climate change, and making Oregon a healthier place for everyone. Here are the 2023 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon: 1) Resilient Buildings Package includes bills to make the buildings we live, work, and learn in more energy efficient, and lower energy bills with the use of electric heating and cooling systems. Oregon’s buildings are the second largest source of greenhouse gas pollution in the state behind transportation––it is crucial that the state take action on this! 2) Natural Climate Solutions Bill \- would create a program to help our state sequester as much carbon as possible on our forested and agricultural lands. 3) The Factory Farm Moratorium \- Factory farms wreak havoc on groundwater systems, produce high levels of air pollution, produce methane (a nasty greenhouse gas), and create an inhumane environment for livestock. This bill puts a stop to new or expanded factory farms in Oregon until they are adequately regulated to address water and air quality, and animal welfare issues. 4) Toxic Free Package \- We also need to protect people, especially our children, from toxics. This package includes: Toxic Free Kids Act Modernization \- Oregon is overdue in updating this historic act to allow more chemicals to be added to it to better protect our children from harmful toxins. Toxic Free Cosmetics \- this bill would require that personal care product companies publish all the ingredients of their products on their websites, and would require the phasing out of the most toxic chemicals. Toxic Free Schools \- would fund the creation of a pesticide tracking system on school grounds and requires transitioning to less or non-toxic alternatives. 5) Zero Waste Package aims to reduce Oregon’s waste and includes these five bills: Right to Repair \- will reduce electronic waste and save people hundreds of dollars a year by allowing them to repair their own electronics. Styrofoam Phase Out \- phases out the use of styrofoam in food to-go containers, as well as bans the use of highly carcinogenic PFAS chemicals in food packaging. A bill that will require a 25% Reduction of Single Use Packaging in 10 Years. Reusable Containers \- Updating Oregon law to allow for reusable containers to be used in the bulk section of the supermarket and for eating out. No New Permits for Chemical Recycling Plants \- while the name might sound nice, chemical recycling leads to localized air pollution and is not healthy for people or the environment. 6) Budget! We will fight as we always do for a strong climate budget and for strong Natural Resources agency budgets to make sure our progress is funded. It’s an ambitious environmental and climate agenda for 2023, but the historic moment we are in calls for bold action on every front. Each of these priorities moves the dial on environmental justice. Our priorities will help protect people from toxic chemicals and the worst effects of climate change, and help improve people’s lives while also better protecting Oregon’s environment. Sincerely, Julia DeGraw Coalition Director, OLCV | | ---|---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. name: Giffords
subject: Will you take our 2023 Gun Violence Prevention Priorities Survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Now that our new Congress has been sworn in, we want to hear from you to help us shape our priorities.
#

Friends -
While we have made strides towards a future free from gun violence, we’re still in the midst of an epidemic. We are still the only developed country in the world that has mass shootings on a regular basis. Just last week, an elementary school teacher in Virginia was shot by her six-year-old student—a tragedy that could have been prevented through safe storage.
We’ve spent much of this month reflecting on the progress we’ve made as an organization over the past decade. These strides towards a future free from violence are important, but there is still so much more work to do.
Now that our new Congress has been sworn in, we’re planning our goals for this year and beyond. We want to hear from you to help us shape our priorities.
[**Will you take our first priorities survey of the year to share your top gun safety priorities with us?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/jan23-priorities-sv/?source=em230112-1-15&refcode2=4033.3935704._87IYa&akid=4033%2E3935704%2E_87IYa)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/jan23-priorities-sv/?source=em230112-1-15&refcode2=4033.3935704._87IYa&akid=4033%2E3935704%2E_87IYa)**
Our work is only possible through supporters like you—people who care about commonsense gun legislation like universal background checks.
People who care about making sure children can’t access firearms.
People who care about a future free from the senseless gun violence that impacts communities nationwide.
Your priorities influence the work that we do. So please, use this link to take our 2023 Gun Safety Priorities Survey today:
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/2023-Priorities**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/jan23-priorities-sv/?source=em230112-1-15&refcode2=4033.3935704._87IYa&akid=4033%2E3935704%2E_87IYa)
Thank you so much for taking the time to complete our survey. We really value your input as we work to focus our organization’s goals for this year and beyond.
More soon,
The team at Giffords
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.giffords.org/signup/jan23-priorities-sv/?source=em230112-1-15&refcode2=4033.3935704._87IYa&akid=4033%2E3935704%2E_87IYa)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=4033%2E3935704%2E_87IYa) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvktqr7jur24nche9vcd43jg0ombve70e5pim100_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim6p70cjh2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuj06mj2ji80le4lf3g4qljve3600jpabg8ds1j8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim6p70cjh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbirltr3ovck1r15bacncgbqvdhot76i5t8p1jt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim6p70cjh2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z31jcottb02prkga4l2nnl59mfk6bploehi7bga8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim6p70cjh2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zflsgfslqgajft5ulslss0sj1euhjlgijck4ahj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim6p70cjh2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z36ua77kui354h7hpj3joveg9s2h3h184so4fb80_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim6p70cjh2bs)
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zc7nvlvmuahafkp1928t17jeucd1ugqob99j7j5g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8rqas8dbidbqoosi6k4h9f4eib1oup9a2hi8490_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim6p70cjh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court. I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray. Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation. Thank you so much! Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znen5v0n0gndoel7blct6kmccs4ni4nmk89thf5g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim6o72c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjkdl0800e20tqj5as7m1nsmker01iahfuav0560_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim6o72c3h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd0gj50caqtue8qraihvjc5u4uno9duv96o2q5qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim6o72c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8cccea177535ud8ogrbho1giqohth1b4pp7cpig_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim6o72c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Charles Harper, Evergreen Action
subject: [FIXED!] Falling *further* behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
We just updated EPA's report card.
| We're sorry. This morning, we sent an email that contained broken links. Please find the updated email below. [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4415?t=2&akid=13225%2E53494%2Erzc6Rv) Friend, With so much at stake and so little time, EPA needs to move further, faster. **But our new analysis reveals they're only falling further behind.** [**_Read and share our updated EPA report card right now—we need to raise awareness of these unacceptable delays._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4415?t=3&akid=13225%2E53494%2Erzc6Rv) | [READ NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4415?t=4&akid=13225%2E53494%2Erzc6Rv)
---
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4415?t=5&akid=13225%2E53494%2Erzc6Rv)
EPA is only on track with one of 10 crucial environmental rules. These delays perpetuate environmental injustice and mean more people will be exposed to toxic pollution and suffer worse health consequences. These rules are also the most effective tool President Biden has to combat climate change.
There are only two years left in Biden's term, and EPA's delays threaten the administration's very ability to fulfill Biden's own climate commitments. Waiting until the last moment isn't an option.
[**_With its delays, EPA risks leaving signature achievements unfinished—or risks their reversal by a future Congress or administration before they can even take effect. Read more about this pressing threat to our clean energy future now._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4415?t=6&akid=13225%2E53494%2Erzc6Rv)
Onward,
Charles Harper
Power Sector Policy Lead, Evergreen Action
[READ NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4415?t=7&akid=13225%2E53494%2Erzc6Rv)
---

body:
| Hi — Did you see Dan’s email? Our survey closes tonight and we need your input! Please take two minutes to complete our 2023 Priorities Survey, then read Dan’s message below.

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/jan23-survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57255373/387323484/1216928039?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230112_SV_1.2_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_prioritiesSV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzRlYzY1OS1iZTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9HGHui3bOK80yOY57xBJpKaGP18bf1pRk_hi0w6TKts=&emci=544ec659-be92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=634ec659-be92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)**

* * *
**_Dan’s Message:_**

Hi, it’s Dan. Despite running in a Republican-leaning district, we had a decisive win in the last election. But our victory didn’t happen by accident — it was thanks to our incredible team of grassroots supporters.

On Team Kildee, we’re already laying the groundwork to win in 2024. **Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing.**

If we’re going to win again, I’ll need support and input from folks like you. That’s why I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll be one of the 2,000 supporters we need to take my short, 2023 Priorities Survey before it closes in 48 hours. **[Click here to take the survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57255374/387323485/1216928039?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230112_SV_1.2_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_prioritiesSV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzRlYzY1OS1iZTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9HGHui3bOK80yOY57xBJpKaGP18bf1pRk_hi0w6TKts=&emci=544ec659-be92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=634ec659-be92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57255375/387323486/1216928039?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230112_SV_1.2_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_prioritiesSV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzRlYzY1OS1iZTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9HGHui3bOK80yOY57xBJpKaGP18bf1pRk_hi0w6TKts=&emci=544ec659-be92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=634ec659-be92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)**
I’m also excited to share that I will serve in leadership in this new Congress as co-chair of the House Democratic Steering and Policy Committee. This role will give me the opportunity to help set Democrats’ agenda for working families in Congress.

As I begin this new role, and we begin a new session of Congress, I need to hear from you. Your input is vital. It guides my work in Congress and helps my campaign make sure we address the most pressing issues you and your family are facing.

**[With that in mind, please take 2 minutes to complete my 2023 Priorities Survey before it closes in 48 hours:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57255376/387323487/1216928039?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230112_SV_1.2_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_prioritiesSV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzRlYzY1OS1iZTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9HGHui3bOK80yOY57xBJpKaGP18bf1pRk_hi0w6TKts=&emci=544ec659-be92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=634ec659-be92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)**

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/jan23-survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57255377/387323488/1216928039?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230112_SV_1.2_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_prioritiesSV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzRlYzY1OS1iZTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9HGHui3bOK80yOY57xBJpKaGP18bf1pRk_hi0w6TKts=&emci=544ec659-be92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=634ec659-be92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=31479900)**

clean_body: | Hi — Did you see Dan’s email? Our survey closes tonight and we need your input! Please take two minutes to complete our 2023 Priorities Survey, then read Dan’s message below. Dan’s Message: Hi, it’s Dan. Despite running in a Republican-leaning district, we had a decisive win in the last election. But our victory didn’t happen by accident — it was thanks to our incredible team of grassroots supporters. On Team Kildee, we’re already laying the groundwork to win in 2024. Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing. If we’re going to win again, I’ll need support and input from folks like you. That’s why I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll be one of the 2,000 supporters we need to take my short, 2023 Priorities Survey before it closes in 48 hours. I’m also excited to share that I will serve in leadership in this new Congress as co-chair of the House Democratic Steering and Policy Committee. This role will give me the opportunity to help set Democrats’ agenda for working families in Congress. As I begin this new role, and we begin a new session of Congress, I need to hear from you. Your input is vital. It guides my work in Congress and helps my campaign make sure we address the most pressing issues you and your family are facing. Thank you so much for your input, Dan Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States ** **

name: Kevin Schilling, Team Kilmer

**NOW:** It's clear these next two years are going to be an uphill battle. But Derek is more than ready to go to bat for Social Security, working people, and our freedoms no matter what the Republican majority throws our way.

We're coming up on our first mid-month fundraising deadline of 2023. If we plan to help Democrats regain the House majority in 2024 to get Congress back on track, we need to start building power now.

body:

| | | [Demand George Santos resign from Congress >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T067878cc-937e-48bf-8a9c-93dd5fd308da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | **Representative George Santos must resign. NOW.**

He lied about his work experience. He lied about his education. He lied about being Jewish. He lied about his grandparents being Holocaust survivors. Bizarrely, he even lied about being on a championship volleyball team -- at a school he never attended.

Kevin McCarthy doesn't have the spine to tell Santos to resign, but Republican leaders from his district do, and [just called on Santos to step down](https://default.salsalabs.org/T307f7732-b8e8-496c-97cf-89df6d2c0193/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). And that's exactly what he should do.

[**Add your name, and tell George Santos: "Resign!"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T528b25a3-ceb7-42d5-9321-1e03276beea2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childr
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn07ajm8mpho542ie8nrmrjplot5mqjadhg72um0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim1p34clh2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi4iou8th7sqlk5h4l8ad47015qegekals5k0h18_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim1p34clh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn7cv0hvtknma9pbofr8gd887u76ei4u3ppgkhp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim1p34clh2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4263nh9god914m4ch5sntf9a97d9mrr8em8ihvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim1p34clh2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2anjbdp7uo5uqtj67iulml0ul4u5nl2qrrivi9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim1p34clh2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

clean_body: Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childr Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | | Dear Patriot, I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends. At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves. Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again. You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building. Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day. But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway. Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments. As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba! Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days. That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time. I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN! And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court. I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray. Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation. Thank you so much! Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zegssgrm01v84jq28dol2qp2umh8mms20gj157c0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim9o36cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpp67hn58gppjuaqlpp66ruh66ibkkpchs8hh3to_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim9o36cdh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6ig5tisjmdacam8h58fjq4q4rch5o29v5ou5bgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim9o36cdh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zifd2qrf5s2i0vaml9fb5m005h0oqn2f9q5jnrq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim9o36cth2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8qut5cugl13tv5vko25b75sr4l8jlhvc5vr27uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim9o36cth2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3sevr74dftp5pthghjd0q06at93c9dr3ukjid2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim9o36cth2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7nr9roqkppe5rtoe0tn2m1l7mibkhh9gfvfcfo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim9o36cth2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvht1qj20lq632h1eoq8jtu6m9pja65p67tgvii8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim9o36cth2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zin79a4ti0bb4dfeebojvnh9vrqdj9h05pcp9g68_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clim9o36cth2bs)

subject: This is just the tip of the iceberg
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress

The GOP is trying to turn the clock back on every shred of the progress we’ve made

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57255721/387325111/-33439388?refcode=EM_FR_230112MM1_FR_LBR_90DO_8_NG_TESTB_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTUxMTgyMi1jMjkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U6OzT0RTikzRj4eRK6osoCY6IgIjTBQ3RM3a_-cLp1I=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57255722/387325112/-33439388?refcode=EM_FR_230112MM1_FR_LBR_90DO_8_NG_TESTB_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTUxMTgyMi1jMjkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U6OzT0RTikzRj4eRK6osoCY6IgIjTBQ3RM3a_-cLp1I=) It’s been only a week since Republicans took control of the House, and we’re off to a troubling start. But don’t just take our word for it. **Here’s what they’ve done so far:** **_FIRST,_** Republicans halted all Congressional business, taking five days and 15 rounds of voting to elect a Speaker. _**THEN,**_ they immediately jammed a bill through the House, reversing IRS funding that was geared toward reforming our tax system and ensuring our nation’s wealthiest 1% pays their fair share. **_THEN,_ as if all of this wasn’t bad enough, the GOP just passed new abortion legislation, a first step toward restricting reproductive rights.****** The scene playing out in our nation’s Congress is disheartening. Republicans are determined to put us on the path to absolute chaos, and we can’t allow it. Despite their fractured start, the GOP is still on the warpath, and they will jump at all opportunities to take us backward. **[Leaders like Lisa Blunt Rochester are doing everything they can to protect our progress and stop the GOP’s advances, but unless we show up to support her, all our efforts could be in jeopardy. subject: 2023 Memo from Heritage Action
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
| | | | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5bd4d798b0&e=fdefed58de)
---
Hey friend, Congress has been sworn in with a new Republican majority in the House. With the change in leadership, conservatives have **greater oversight power** to investigate and hold the Biden Administration—and federal agencies—accountable to the American people. And with greater control of the House, conservatives can stop Biden and Senate Democrats from advancing their radical policies: **inflationary spending,** **open borders** , **rigging our federal election laws,** and **handouts to the climate extremists.** And perhaps most importantly**, conservatives can advance their own legislation in the House.** Passing the right policies (even if Biden won’t sign them) will set a clear vision for America’s future. We must provide a stark contrast to the failed policies of Joe Biden. Right now, conservatives can build the policy platform for a winning conservative presidency in 2024: 🔔 Empower parents to make education choices 🔔 Secure America’s borders and reduce crime 🔔 Ensure free and fair elections 🔔 Reverse the growth of regulations, spending, and inflation 🔔 Counter the threat of Communist China 🔔 Hold Big Tech accountable 🔔 Protect the unborn
---
[**KEEP CONGRESS ACCOUNTABLE: CHIP IN >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=7944b1d357&e=fdefed58de)
---
This is a critical opportunity for conservatives to finish the job and fulfill their promises to the American people. And Heritage Action and our hundreds of thousands of grassroots patriots are holding them to it. That’s why we need your dedicated support to ensure Congress maximizes conservative wins for the American people.
---
[**CHIP IN NOW >> $100**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c5d55c248d&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**CHIP IN NOW >> $75**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=e68f8c9526&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**CHIP IN NOW >> $50**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f050b4ca55&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**CHIP IN NOW >> $25**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=96a6220736&e=fdefed58de)
---
In addition to supporting our efforts on Capitol Hill, your contribution will empower conservatives in state legislatures across the country to complement these efforts by working to ensure these conservative policies are also implemented at the state level.
---
[**RACK UP CONSERVATIVE WINS IN 2023: CHIP IN >>**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c9bbf99eb6&e=fdefed58de)
---
Thank you, Digital Team Heritage Action

name: Nikki Haley
subject: we have answers
body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=2d3e3c7226284148b94440dba84bdac5&_e=3O4X-NkhQx6m6_bTexGPwXFYzdFcybsE_Y_ZbSOB61Em3NL9XElKUkIVOlhIZWF3Mr49pjfcFqZTosYSy0VvyFJW_zCCEqkLjOoG4n7SI41K4FbdND5b-9QHyr-RsDdHiL3PfMeV9Ehc2nC04uOEUbi0MItaKdABA2-nKwZHYDkSJ6pIdumQ7IOtZ6bOC1I5s4mtRGEdQ6zQKz6GYmN-jGFqOVh6uSlcIQ-bAtr1vOBwRvwzZXcmWZs_AWKWtCUjSXZxYZT85iLgNDw14qR-u8AsDqiIak6ZbochUly808Fk3pbQ_d2o2vgaKIUjNgH5VoVQQBKBM82vn6-TtBKZJISesGHS8FUC8DU9QcBrScc%3D)
---
Friend,
---
After traveling across the country, I’ve had the chance to talk with many Americans about the state of our country. I’ve heard from parents who are fed up with schools failing our children; workers who are sick of inflation stealing our hard-earned money; and families who’ve had enough of the crime that’s destroying our cities. Americans are struggling with the inevitable consequences of the Left’s agenda, and they’re desperate for the conservative solutions Republicans have to offer. _And they should be looking to us for answers._ We are the only party that can lift up everyone. We know that the values America holds dear are always worth defending and that America is always worth fighting for. We’ve got to work together and fight for the conservative solutions that we know will make our country stronger. **[I’m on a mission to do just that, but I need your help.](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=2d3e3c7226284148b94440dba84bdac5&_e=3O4X-NkhQx6m6_bTexGPwXFYzdFcybsE_Y_ZbSOB61Em3NL9XElKUkIVOlhIZWF3Mr49pjfcFqZTosYSy0VvyFJW_zCCEqkLjOoG4n7SI41K4FbdND5b-9QHyr-RsDdHiL3PfMeV9Ehc2nC04uOEUbi0MItaKdABA2-nKwZHYDkSJ6pIdumQ7IOtZ6bOC1I5s4mtRGEdQ6zQKz6GYmN-jAn--ouAU8nbz39D_2BMP5-n8LXnMt0VEpUfozZM8v_dno6BK5833V4ZWL3fR-J99ETn4r5b7eltcuk47lDZl2hgXQYLKkQP6TFhenKzEBtBr0AV2hmz889rr7hsUMqv1tdDVgwlfx7vL8QfCRHAUlI%3D) ** When I launched Stand For America PAC two years ago, I was on a mission to support bold conservative leaders up and down the ballot. As I traveled the country, I endorsed and financially supported more than 60 conservative candidates. I was able to do that because people like you stepped up with a donation. I will never stop standing for America. I am fighting every day to support freedom-loving conservatives and uphold the values our country holds dear. [**If you’re with me in this mission, I’m asking you to chip in a donation of any amount to Stand For America PAC today.**](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=2d3e3c7226284148b94440dba84bdac5&_e=3O4X-NkhQx6m6_bTexGPwXFYzdFcybsE_Y_ZbSOB61Em3NL9XElKUkIVOlhIZWF3Mr49pjfcFqZTosYSy0VvyFJW_zCCEqkLjOoG4n7SI41K4FbdND5b-9QHyr-RsDdHiL3PfMeV9Ehc2nC04uOEUbi0MItaKdABA2-nKwZHYDkSJ6pIdumQ7IOtZ6bOC1I5s4mtRGEdQ6zQKz6GYmN-jKDIo6i1YbdmaCgnjVnf3ES3gLoIW7pXGOaUTQKnqDh0FSIa8rUA23UUSP0jjCwUM0Xps53QrYE6OzO03bxp1UqUjr0VTN29emWxmcJ9xhf6TNwWQEHlCwedCRWot5P-iBPESJ45aJZW_qoeR-y4Eno%3D) My very best,
---
[](https://links.standforamericapac.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=2d3e3c7226284148b94440dba84bdac5&_e=3O4X-NkhQx6m6_bTexGPwXFYzdFcybsE_Y_ZbSOB61Em3NL9XElKUkIVOlhIZWF3Mr49pjfcFqZTosYSy0VvyFJW_zCCEqkLjOoG4n7SI41K4FbdND5b-9QHyr-RsDdHiL3PfMeV9Ehc2nC04uOEUbi0MItaKdABA2-nKwZHYDkSJ6pIdumQ7IOtZ6bOC1I5s4mtRGEdQ6zQKz6GYmN-jE5p2n8gssvTT5eFsYV54XMox9nVUlmDxMPBJw_R1r3Zc7XD90UlZ0gRMLUnlNUiNb4VGAIMqupG2IBLAAtxyxXAXXc8EkPdsnqvubuBSEgJ9yJRxELs35SGH59fdUihm3C8Pu8GiVHQTuaz2ZVildQ%3D)

Nikki Haley

Nikki Haley here. I want to make sure you have a signed copy of my new book. There are only a few signed copies left. clean_body: | | | Friend, After traveling across the country, I’ve had the chance to talk with many Americans about the state of our country. I’ve heard from parents who are fed up with schools failing our children; workers who are sick of inflation stealing our hard-earned money; and families who’ve had enough of the crime that’s destroying our cities. Americans are struggling with the inevitable consequences of the Left’s agenda, and they’re desperate for the conservative solutions Republicans have to offer. And they should be looking to us for answers. We are the only party that can lift up everyone. We know that the values America holds dear are always worth defending and that America is always worth fighting for. We’ve got to work together and fight for the conservative solutions that we know will make our country stronger. When I launched Stand For America PAC two years ago, I was on a mission to support bold conservative leaders up and down the ballot. As I traveled the country, I endorsed and financially supported more than 60 conservative candidates. I was able to do that because people like you stepped up with a donation. I will never stop standing for America. I am fighting every day to support freedom-loving conservatives and uphold the values our country holds dear. My very best, Nikki Haley | | | Nikki Haley here. I want to make sure you have a signed copy of my new book. There are only a few signed copies left. It’s called “If You Want Something Done...” and it profiles bold, courageous women and the lessons they teach us about making a difference, overcoming adversity, and sticking to principle. | | Copyright © 2023 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. Stand For America PAC does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. Our mailing address is: 611 Pennsylvania Avenue, SE #146 Washington, DC 20003 Want to change how you receive these emails? . name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01ad7bf701284af3a17a841fe936b1e0&_e=g8O3-9hNUhEOLGZoeP20GqkkqOp1tlKQxbAQkK7oql3az91xRGI87-HkFaJo_WUWNQ0ZvyOiMNmn4Y-7gjxLTcFeaYJxv58xiBO4dd436WyVO13ZEjrmWdByD9w38JknZOhoFMfFsec8_tLlFYnBxqBYAvKD35EzrTCCUgN6iGicjqUPJX1PzjOApcolKiJfFaRXDlVWtpFJvsDXMk7Gv8LRaq1Is7XD52Dyw0JPwmZHqCTna6id5kJh7qQk4tMlclKsRz-6oTY8N-Nem3HPjx2lAC6-hDvDztKhiJbgYzsP_DuyU_CQxFysc06kXLlXYXEeNwJ7eO9N6r9r2s02LkjlSLZzIeSjYzbq5BGyXVJ5_J4u8gXh2E_xkLc-sR3WWYPBF976bGA4XqaS5LEg2Q%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01ad7bf701284af3a17a841fe936b1e0&_e=g8O3-9hNUhEOLGZoeP20GqkkqOp1tlKQxbAQkK7oql3az91xRGI87-HkFaJo_WUWNQ0ZvyOiMNmn4Y-7gjxLTcFeaYJxv58xiBO4dd436WyVO13ZEjrmWdByD9w38JknZOhoFMfFsec8_tLlFYnBxqBYAvKD35EzrTCCUgN6iGicjqUPJX1PzjOApcolKiJfFaRXDlVWtpFJvsDXMk7Gv8LRaq1Is7XD52Dyw0JPwmZHqCTna6id5kJh7qQk4tMlqMBJG1_3Rvv3hTpRa-jrb8PkuQQjg4DprGv85QLO-oqB4Q7XeG9VIRUPW2z3j_EvjwBkgUZ2E36v8uvgARzRCmNKUEcnWI71tLqHOHJK5ceNQIj3qwYKGF712Dip9idHr-TSmzeWYJCGOmtc1Grwog%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01ad7bf701284af3a17a841fe936b1e0&_e=g8O3-9hNUhEOLGZoeP20GqkkqOp1tlKQxbAQkK7oql3az91xRGI87-HkFaJo_WUWNQ0ZvyOiMNmn4Y-7gjxLTcFeaYJxv58xiBO4dd436WyVO13ZEjrmWdByD9w38JknZOhoFMfFsec8_tLlFYnBxqBYAvKD35EzrTCCUgN6iGicjqUPJX1PzjOApcolKiJfFaRXDlVWtpFJvsDXMk7Gv8LRaq1Is7XD52Dyw0JPwmZHqCTna6id5kJh7qQk4tMlf98h6Csz-eoN4K0LyS7GTw4smnVcmJ4pFinyN6CPvgnpmuhpvh7qNI03sJG-be-LdABQLemIfgKzUaKsENYDB1iLs37X4DworsRPPQQpoh8Em4yruLiTl6Lm0Toi-Za2lM98DFi0d_lU2dCZieJh3g%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
