name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlhevv1an3348r27thfmvprhrp7kb1itp77okp28_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhm0o74cph2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbtf15441e306vobh6l3hh9hejgg4mg614pl0uc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhm0o74cph2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5l2dhrq6hsisem9lieg6dl0mnk2rk6aom5ks14o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhm0o74cph2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb83gghubdgk92j8mtddub6fcrnp12bvncac5108_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhm0o74cph2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvt8tpfso8ngl3l7m1nn1hiuq4n97pc9iu6cse20_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhm0o74cph2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zs6414c4lg9gqh8m83mudrch3vp8qd8jbqkngbig_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhm0o74cph2bs)
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2z7g2tvetrja3ao5eachikjlbuie7qogfgst1gqi8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2znjtujug45r0f7fvvdot9pf29oia45eq7ifphdmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhm0o74cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

The NHGOP continues to work hard with ONE GOAL; GETTING REPUBLICANS ELECTED! | | | | | New Hampshire Republicans have a lot to focus this year as we lay the ground work for the 2024 elections. It's hard to believe that almost a year from now Republicans will gather together to vote in the First in the Nation Presidential Primary! Not to mention we'll have two competitive U.S. Congressional races, a fight to expand control of the House, Senate, and Executive Council and to keep Corner Office! | | On to Victory! -Stephan StepanekChairman | | | | | | Share on social | | | | If you feel you received this email by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please _.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: What’s most important to you, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Pramila is working hard to make sure Democrats follow through on the transformative policies we need. Now as Chair of the largest Progressive Caucus in history, Pramila wants to know what you care about most.
So Peter, we wanted to check in with you: **[Will you take 2 minutes to take our survey and quickly share your perspective with Pramila?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2023-priorities-survey/?source=em20230112&t=1&akid=2047%2E420207%2EQz6xYR)
**Your answers will help us understand what matters to Pramila’s most engaged supporters and guide her Congressional priorities for 2023.**
**[Take the survey »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2023-priorities-survey/?source=em20230112&t=2&akid=2047%2E420207%2EQz6xYR)**
With the start of the newest Congressional session, Democrats no longer hold the majority -- but with Pramila at the helm of the Progressive Caucus, our diverse progressive bloc will continue to fight for policies that will put working people first.
In the past two years, Democrats passed one piece of historic legislation after another, driven by our strong agenda -- federal gun control, large-scale climate action, economic relief for working people and families, major investments in our infrastructure, and more.
Pramila is determined to keep passing people-first policies in this Congress, GOP control or not. But first, she wants to hear which issues matter most to you at the start of this term.
**[Will you take our post-election priorities survey today so we can share with Pramila?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2023-priorities-survey/?source=em20230112&t=3&akid=2047%2E420207%2EQz6xYR)**
Thank you for your time!
— Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230112-2047-footer&t=4&refcode2=2047_420207_Qz6xYR&akid=2047%2E420207%2EQz6xYR)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=2047%2E420207%2EQz6xYR)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2047%2E420207%2EQz6xYR)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Why I Fight…

body:
\
A lot of people are asking why I took such a strong stand last week in the vote to elect a new Speaker of the House.
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk2p4vcgsrtnsdg3tsdujkmbn9fh6ccl3rsgie20_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhm8o32clh2bs)
---
| | | Friend,

A lot of people are asking why I took such a strong stand last week in the vote to elect a new Speaker of the House.
---

_**It’s because I work for the people and the people alone.

I refuse all PACs - that means corporate PACs, Leadership PACs, and ideological PACs.

I refuse all federal lobbyist donations.

I believe no other Republican in Congress has such a policy. **_

I am 100% funded by the people because that’s the **ONLY** constituency I swore to serve. I stood up for you when it mattered, and [_**now I’m asking you to do the same by chipping in $25 today.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zude96874dkvg8u5ocgpb3rcob0upko2h7hqepe0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhm8o32clh2bs)

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ece3ca461924d16ac46c00e630cc2c4&_e=acykTwXW_-89909DRwfGhXl9yDfZfiPuBfUnNVM0LpU_0nFhcqCtsFT2zTsE0Q7bE3wKdiajLPKv-rFBs6h-3zYXeVIGy2sxUvTdcLPOYRtONHiy32ec-0W5Is1HfjK9LIy80eFewFTaIy1MjjalojMewCmtZI-wnO14AVffPG9VYzav1xX4qSsqBf5rn3fnI5-PLpP2F922sAxdTdYT6jA88Ag5xeU0-2HbsR5F8riF6CrPgAVfqFiopbPiADtzsGzdd1H8Ol80iv2nOjlSS5VyGZOo0zwwhWkIaX2j16JHjSO7-103bfZOthmn7lZxfNY1RJKwEJQH--bxiKryrRTFgXFoE5hVCCf3iRbIquds3QYwMQq5A_OocAS0QIVzKiQLH_uaR5xCuiYyeCogTA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ece3ca461924d16ac46c00e630cc2c4&_e=acykTwXW_-89909DRwfGhXl9yDfZfiPuBfUnNVM0LpU_0nFhcqCtsFT2zTsE0Q7bE3wKdiajLPKv-rFBs6h-3zYXeVIGy2sxUvTdcLPOYRtONHiy32ec-0W5Is1HfjK9LIy80eFewFTaIy1MjjalojMewCmtZI-wnO14AVffPG9VYzav1xX4qSsqBf5rn3fnI5-PLpP2F922sAxdTdYT6jA88Ag5xeU0-2HbsR5F8riF6CrPgAVfqFiopbPiADtzeHpsiojy5AjeIIJ3goZ9_txfi0YZB_2ovR-lbiDGEkWNZgz61JP3FwBThuIeTQK1dGwhEohFKERX5WUTZgRDs1RFVwiWlM0m-_3Fj2s2IGzVcwl1M6zBwk55D0M5ZD5yKL45S-D83waU-pKEpZbh-A%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8ece3ca461924d16ac46c00e630cc2c4&_e=acykTwXW_-89909DRwfGhXl9yDfZfiPuBfUnNVM0LpU_0nFhcqCtsFT2zTsE0Q7bE3wKdiajLPKv-rFBs6h-3zYXeVIGy2sxUvTdcLPOYRtONHiy32ec-0W5Is1HfjK9LIy80eFewFTaIy1MjjalojMewCmtZI-wnO14AVffPG9VYzav1xX4qSsqBf5rn3fnI5-PLpP2F922sAxdTdYT6jA88Ag5xeU0-2HbsR5F8riF6CrPgAVfqFiopbPiADtzEqTD-aH9uYsPH-W0zsNX2q7-0AQFwZf4SLbtjFEcVI2FD-AJVxCMmX1RRaHMHhWkkD6O1B8OpkSLCPlrPVhCutHrkcq4r3yJo6d_yIcGLj1zvEhI4mavCOox3tE--XPuWXHWOJ_z8vt0KKkh0oEkew%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: My friend, colleague, and former student Katie Porter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Katie Porter is running for the Senate, and I’m very happy to support her.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=15726%2E3422442%2EkDBLsw)
Derek,
I couldn’t be more excited about my first endorsement of the year:**Katie Porter is running to represent Californians in the U.S. Senate, and she has my full support.**
I want to share more about why I’m supporting Katie below, but if you’re on board now and ready to help kickstart Katie’s campaign for Senate, **[please chip in if you can. As an early supporter, you’d help ensure Katie has the resources she needs to build a winning campaign.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14680?refcode=EMAF12_1_WAR_20230112_V1_F&t=2&akid=15726%2E3422442%2EkDBLsw)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Donate $15 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14681?refcode=EMAF12_1_WAR_20230112_V1_F-el&t=3&akid=15726%2E3422442%2EkDBLsw) [Donate $22 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14682?refcode=EMAF12_1_WAR_20230112_V1_F-el&t=4&akid=15726%2E3422442%2EkDBLsw) [Donate $50 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14683?refcode=EMAF12_1_WAR_20230112_V1_F-el&t=5&akid=15726%2E3422442%2EkDBLsw) [Donate $100 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14684?refcode=EMAF12_1_WAR_20230112_V1_F-el&t=6&akid=15726%2E3422442%2EkDBLsw) [Donate $250 ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14685?refcode=EMAF12_1_WAR_20230112_V1_F-el&t=7&akid=15726%2E3422442%2EkDBLsw) [Other amount ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14680?refcode=EMAF12_1_WAR_20230112_V1_F&t=8&akid=15726%2E3422442%2EkDBLsw)
---
I met Katie long before either of us imagined we’d be serving as elected officials. She was one of my law students, studying consumer law. Even then, she showed a deep-down commitment to making a difference in people’s lives.
I still remember the first day we met. My class was held early in the morning, meaning a lot of students had their heads down, trying to avoid being called on. But not Katie. She was determined and ready to go. When the first answer she gave wasn’t her strongest, she came to my office hours and said, “Please keep calling on me. I am going to learn to do this.”
Years later, in 2012, then-Attorney General of California Kamala Harris secured a settlement of $18 billion from our country’s biggest banks for their predatory lending practices that spurred the 2008 housing crisis. She asked if I knew anyone who could work as an “independent monitor” to make sure the Big Banks actually paid California families the money they were now owed. It was a massive undertaking, but I knew just the person for the job: my former student Katie Porter. She served as a watchdog over Wall Street banks and held their feet to the fire to ensure California families received the billions they were owed.
When she decided to run for Congress in 2018, I was very happy to support her. I knew that we needed more people like Katie in Washington — who understood the real experiences that working families faced, who had the courage to stand up to big corporations and special interests, and who would fight to make our government work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. A Democrat hadn’t represented her district for decades, but she knew exactly how to personally connect with voters, build a strong movement, and win. She flipped that seat, and she’s been winning for working people ever since.
**Simply put, Katie delivers.** She’s smart and she isn’t afraid. She stands up to Wall Street and Big Pharma, she holds fossil fuel companies accountable, and she fights to protect our rights. She is exactly who Californians need as their next Senator, and I’m proud to endorse her.
**[We need her (and her whiteboard) in the Senate. And we want you on our team. Just like she always has, she’s running a people-powered campaign. I’d be so grateful if you could make a donation today to support her campaign for Senate.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14680?refcode=EMAF12_1_WAR_20230112_V1_F&t=9&akid=15726%2E3422442%2EkDBLsw)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth Warren
P.S. I just have to share this old photo of us from when I first got to know Katie. I’ve been a fan of hers for years and years, and it would be a great honor to serve alongside Katie in the Senate in the next chapter of her career.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14680?refcode=EMAF12_1_WAR_20230112_V1_F&t=10&akid=15726%2E3422442%2EkDBLsw)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=11&akid=15726%2E3422442%2EkDBLsw)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=15726%2E3422442%2EkDBLsw)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: 13 years later, it’s time to end Citizens United
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
Special interests shouldn’t have a louder voice in our elections than voters. |
---

| | | | | 13,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED:
[_Join the call to remove dark money from our elections >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57241032/387294917/-1377487939?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzY1M2ZjNi05ZTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o9qzoE2bslV-YnG1HZAya7JGgfDbtXtdiYAkd6L6GFQ=&emci=70f8c423-8e8b-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=53653fc6-9e92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)
---
This month marks 13 years since _Citizens United v. FEC_ opened the floodgates for dark money to pour into our elections. Since then, billions in outside money has been spent. I got the nickname the “Hunted Democrat” back in 2012 when special-interest groups spent $40 million in an attempt to buy Ohio’s Senate seat. That was over a decade ago and a lot by 2012 standards. And our elections have only become more expensive since then. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the five most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent and even more is expected to be spent on our race. [_**We need to show our opponents that there’s a groundswell of support for getting dark money’s corruptive influence out of our politics, so for its anniversary, we’re working to gather 13,000 signatures in support of ending _Citizens United_. Will you add your name to mine?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57241033/387294918/-1377487939?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzY1M2ZjNi05ZTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o9qzoE2bslV-YnG1HZAya7JGgfDbtXtdiYAkd6L6GFQ=&emci=70f8c423-8e8b-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=53653fc6-9e92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=18332626) Special-interest groups are playing the long game. When corporations and billionaires contribute big sums to campaigns, we all lose -- because those candidates will do special interests’ bidding instead of looking out for the people they serve. Special-interest groups should not have a louder voice in our elections than working Ohioans. That’s why I introduced a measure that would overturn _Citizens United_ , and I’m counting on your support for my efforts. [_**Join my call to overturn _Citizens United_ and put power back where it belongs: in the hands of voters at the ballot box.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57241034/387294919/-1377487939?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzY1M2ZjNi05ZTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o9qzoE2bslV-YnG1HZAya7JGgfDbtXtdiYAkd6L6GFQ=&emci=70f8c423-8e8b-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=53653fc6-9e92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)
---
| | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57241035/387294920/-1377487939?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzY1M2ZjNi05ZTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o9qzoE2bslV-YnG1HZAya7JGgfDbtXtdiYAkd6L6GFQ=&emci=70f8c423-8e8b-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=53653fc6-9e92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)**

Special-interest groups should not have a louder voice in our elections than working Ohioans. That’s why I introduced a measure that would overturn Citizens United , and I’m counting on your support for my efforts. | | With gratitude, Sherrod | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN Contributions or gifts to Friends of Sherrod Brown are not tax deductible. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States Don't want to receive these emails anymore? =

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr7sfuntnaovdosc926m63p9lvrvtpi7a4gif17g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhm4or6c1h2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zoe0q3mmunqpj9022tjkq0lkklcep73p8ho1efjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhm4or6c1h2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6if070a9ao097v4sm4oapsm9v7fq7j93resmvcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhm4or6c1h2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0bjv2esi3a3b9f50cg5q0mtqdmf2djagoltufn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhm4or6c1h2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9hkpgh6cfo2anf61mqtv0ubal3leuvjji8o1oso_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhm4or6c1h2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5hnfcb7eep410ruk1i5ij21c8m1ge2sj8tk2lbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhm4or6c1h2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: January is a historically sleepy month for fundraising. But we cannot and will not let that prevent our party from reaching our goal. And I’m counting on you to make that happen. | | Give me a moment to explain. Derek, January is historically a sleepy month for fundraising. Especially after a massive election like the one we just had. The GOP knows this. And they aren’t slowing down. After a bruising speakership fight, the first order of business for Republicans’ new majority is a bill to protect ultra-wealthy tax cheats from paying their fair share. And now, they’re readying themselves for elections in 2023 and 2024. Now, I’m not going to tell you we have to outraise Republicans in order to win. But we do have to ramp up our current fundraising pace, especially this month when it looks like we might not make our goal. If you’re able, I need your help to make sure that doesn’t happen. Will you rush a $7 donation to the DNC now to close our fundraising gap and directly contribute to Democrats’ success? We have to keep the GOP on their toes. $7 \-- just $7 at a time. That’s all we need to take Republicans head on and fight to secure majorities for the Democratic Party. It’s not easy, we know this. But it’s more than possible when grassroots supporters like you step up. Thank you for all you do, Lauren Lauren Williams Deputy Chief Mobilization Officer, Grassroots Fundraising Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I need to be able to count on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18861?t=1001&akid=2886%2E346206%2Er29wAh ][IMG]

Hi – I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little
bit of debt to pay off. We made some great progress before the end of the
year, and we’ve got just a little bit left to go. If you could give just
$20 right now to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my
energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the
link: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18861?t=1002&akid=2886%2E346206%2Er29wAh ]https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18862?t=1003&akid=2886%2E346206%2Er29wAh

Peter – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP
spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were
doubting whether we could win.

My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising
investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were
making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might
that the funding will come through.

Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign
has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. We’ve made a ton
of progress in closing the gap and since you’re one of my most important
supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to get us over the top.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18861?t=1004&akid=2886%2E346206%2Er29wAh ]Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to help us retire our
debt? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Charles Booker,
and I’d be grateful for anything you can give.

I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now,
we just have to finish this thing off.

Thank you for your help.

With every good wish,

Maggie Hassan

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230112-2886-footer&t=1005&refcode2=2886_346206_r29wAh&akid=2886%2E346206%2Er29wAh

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2886%2E346206%2Er29wAh

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Team Vasquez
subject: Will you support Gabe’s first bill in Congress?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57242330/387297104/1850399781?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230112mccarthyact_tv_od90ds_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njk0MmE4OS1hMjkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YnRUvt88Or6f6o1X7POH9FuQiuhiwqiXOuIM7tV6EGg=)

Team, In case you missed it, Gabe is introducing his FIRST bill in Congress this week, and it’s aimed at holding the right-wing extremists accountable for holding Congress hostage and wasting taxpayer dollars with their chaotic five-day House Speaker vote last week — _the longest speaker vote our country has seen in 164 years._ _Rep. It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools

| | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42f698e86b2b4746895d018c723160bd&_e=lxmHbDCmzxyT98tzvuXIDdcJ8FUBzCIbX7lJ3I13V5Ru90Vy4z1tcTRKp68kwt5Ep8GQ48zIhZl-LPi3Wph99N_VK2sAJaZu2lLjEFsfLphankHL_dxrsxqZEo5LKWXYAb6dKHuUGqSwIuYMU_9a14R0FsqHjlRsS8AH45vAxp3rUu-JxIVG7lirJwZ3_gg6oZLW92x2NcHmdA6Yrjgo-umYy_fum7mNPffHIY_uzKMw3WJkQgB6vbV8QNT8ujT90kY-T-kyTiMMVCDJBaNYnHk6ZmBf5d7zWj9wUGD9y2q__JGoAkVZW81tXBg_Mko1a-I6ShUzdxJHvQWdKVFQOKbJWyOFiFZ29GXZHXTZWsokZH5t2lsSgjY_3gZD4Gle1lkaLDD0ArEivBYAOEHb_Q%3D%3D)

| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, "What happened to my country?"

It's a question I've asked myself many times over the last few years as I've read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we've produced the new online course, "**The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism**."

In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You'll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you'll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today's global elite; and, you'll explore how these movements overtook America's key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=42f698e86b2b4746895d018c723160bd&_e=lxmHbDCmzxyT98tzvuXIDdcJ8FUBzCIbX7lJ3I13V5Ru90Vy4z1tcTRKp68kwt5Ep8GQ48zIhZl-LPi3Wph99N_VK2sAJaZu2lLjEFsfLphankHL_dxrsxqZEo5LKWXYAb6dKHuUGqSwIuYMU_9a14R0FsqHjlRsS8AH45vAxp3rUu-JxIVG7lirJwZ3_gg6oZLW92x2NcHmdA6Yrjgo-umYy_fum7mNPffHIY_uzKMw3WJkQgB6vbV8QNT8ujT9GUnEXLITp_UIvey5aI-UKmQZKzGvKsoP4lSAhkMwo00su-GO7vIb3bVCPJjMHi6Wepvb1GPzEek5j-r96kp0B2s9-pPO96B2XpdHsKwr6yfABmzt1n4KkAfMUcNfTz2v3vx1mZk0s_E2dwWXIWiRpQ%3D%3D)**

I hope you'll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Becca Balint
subject: A recap of my first week in Congress:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
https://www.beccabalint.com/ [https://www.beccabalint.com/]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/BBVT-AL-Email-Jan2023-FR-January?refcode=E20007-20230112-FirstWeek-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/BBVT-AL-Email-Jan2023-FR-January?refcode=E20007-20230112-FirstWeek-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5]

Hi Peter,

It’s been an exciting and eventful first week in Congress to stay the least.

*
I
was
sworn
in
and
signed
my
oath
.
After
being
sworn
in
on
the
House
floor,
I
also
signed
my
official
congressional
oath
of
office,
pledging
to
defend
the
constitution
and
be
a
faithful
servant
of
the
people
during
my
time
in
Congress.
*
I
nominated
a
new
Democratic
Leader
–
Rep.
Hakeem
Jeffries.
While
it
took
Republicans
15
votes
to
come
together
to
nominate
a
House
Speaker,
I
stood
united
with
my
Democratic
colleagues
to
unanimously
nominate
our
party’s
leader.
*
I
cast
my
first
vote.
I
voted
NO
on
the
new
Republican
rules
package
–
a
set
of
standards
that
govern
how
Congress
runs.
Their
final
package
gutted
the
office
of
Congressional
Ethics.
I
don’t
see
how
members
of
any
party
support
this.
Members
of
Congress
should
be
held
to
the
highest
ethical
standards.
Despite
its
passage,
I
will
continue
to
push
for
accountability
and
transparency.
*
I
gave
my
first
speech
on
the
House
floor.
Following
the
overturning
of
Roe
v.
Wade
,
partisan
extremists
have
ratcheted
up
their
attacks
on
abortion
rights
nationwide.
There
is
no
issue
more
pressing
than
protecting
our
reproductive
liberty.
I
made
it
known
that
I
will
be
leading
the
fight
to
defend
the
bodily
autonomy
of
all
Americans.

Despite a chaotic start to the new Republican-controlled Congress (in which we went nearly a full week without a House of Representatives), I’m committed to making sure we pass progressive, bold, and meaningful legislation that addresses the priorities of Vermonters in the 118th Congress.

Join me as I take on the status quo and fight for working people during my first term: Donate $5 or more to power our work in the year ahead! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/BBVT-AL-Email-Jan2023-FR-January?refcode=E20007-20230112-FirstWeek-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/BBVT-AL-Email-Jan2023-FR-January?refcode=E20007-20230112-FirstWeek-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5]

Yours,

Becca Balint
https://www.facebook.com/beccabalintvt/ [https://www.facebook.com/beccabalintvt/] https://twitter.com/beccabalintvt [https://twitter.com/beccabalintvt] https://www.instagram.com/beccabalintvt/ [https://www.instagram.com/beccabalintvt/]
Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's making history as the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to ever serve Vermont in Congress. If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, click here. clean_body: [] [] Hi Peter, It’s been an exciting and eventful first week in Congress to stay the least. I was sworn in and signed my oath . After being sworn in on the House floor, I also signed my official congressional oath of office, pledging to defend the constitution and be a faithful servant of the people during my time in Congress. I nominated a new Democratic Leader – Rep. Hakeem Jeffries. While it took Republicans 15 votes to come together to nominate a House Speaker, I stood united with my Democratic colleagues to unanimously nominate our party’s leader. I cast my first vote. I voted NO on the new Republican rules package – a set of standards that govern how Congress runs. Their final package gutted the office of Congressional Ethics. I don’t see how members of any party support this. Members of Congress should be held to the highest ethical standards. Despite its passage, I will continue to push for accountability and transparency. I gave my first speech on the House floor. Following the overturning of Roe v. Wade , partisan extremists have ratcheted up their attacks on abortion rights nationwide. There is no issue more pressing than protecting our reproductive liberty. I made it known that I will be leading the fight to defend the bodily autonomy of all Americans. Despite a chaotic start to the new Republican-controlled Congress (in which we went nearly a full week without a House of Representatives), I’m committed to making sure we pass progressive, bold, and meaningful legislation that addresses the priorities of Vermonters in the 118th Congress. Join me as I take on the status quo and fight for working people during my first term: Donate $5 or more to power our work in the year ahead! [] DONATE [] Yours, Becca Balint [] [] [] Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. Biden is forcing Arizona to pay **$76 million to take DOWN** a border wall made of shipping containers.

subject: Kari Lake cannot be allowed to be a U.S. Senator. She is not morally fit for a position in government, proven again after her gubernatorial loss to Katie Hobbs in Arizona, but Kyrsten Sinema may yet give Lake a way in.
body:
We can’t let this happen
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a42e57a-9391-4926-a0fd-f5d3570f3c07/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

---
| | | | | Peter, _Kari Lake cannot be allowed to be a U.S. Senator. She is not morally fit for a position in government, proven again after her gubernatorial loss to Katie Hobbs in Arizona. Election officials have had to go into hiding because of Lake's lies about election fraud--they've received enough credible death threats that they have police protection. _ [**_Can you join us right now in giving Congressman Ruben Gallego--who's been one of the Democrats' strongest voices in the House and would make an amazing Senator!!--$5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb7dde18f-94a6-4ea3-a804-6889e01632f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Yet, the result of Kyrsten Sinema's ego driven betrayal of Democrats who worked, donated and voted for her may lead to this tragedy. Democratic firm Blueprint Polling released numbers showing a three-way race with Sinema as a spoiler._ **_Lake leads Democrat, Ruben Gallego, 35.7-31.9%, with Sinema at 13.8%. Sinema can't win, but she can hand the election to a fascist trying to overthrow AZ democracy._** **_We CAN'T let this happen._**
---
|
---

| **_Gallego's a young, progressive Latino veteran. He's personable, passionate about helping working people & protecting those GOP policies assault every day. Gallego's so close to matching Lake--within 3.8 points! And nearly 19% of voters are undecided, many of whom Gallego can win._** [**_Can you join us right now in giving Congressman Ruben Gallego--who's been one of the Democrats' strongest voices in the House and would make an amazing Senator!!--$5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbdebb690-646b-4a14-b054-d5a2e5789e44/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for supporting a true champion of the people in Gallego. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfbae07d6-f8f7-4875-8b29-3b7ec87e7ab7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: 60-second ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
The only way we can keep Nevada blue is if we build a winning strategy fueled by your on-the-ground insights.
Friend, I wanted to quickly follow up to make sure you saw this.
---
Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ says that the GOP has a clear path to retaking the Senate, and experts are already calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats on the ballot. I need to know you're with me in this fight.
**Our survey closes at midnight tonight, and I'm really hoping to hear from you before then: Will you please take 60 seconds to share your grassroots input?**
**Here's the best link:[www.rosenfornevada.com/prioritiessurvey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57258135/387333503/-146199797?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2307-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDVhZTU0Ni1jZTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jQfbESAJbAUtIwdbhqxMlZDJ2MvnSSsVUJo1kAayw2A=&emci=a3d7db32-a792-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=945ae546-ce92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=3800590)**
Thank you,
Jacky Rosen
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Jacky Rosen**
Date: Wed, Jan 11, 2023
Subject: I need to hear from supporters like you, friend
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57258136/387333504/-146199797?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2307-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDVhZTU0Ni1jZTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jQfbESAJbAUtIwdbhqxMlZDJ2MvnSSsVUJo1kAayw2A=&emci=a3d7db32-a792-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=945ae546-ce92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=3800590)
Friend,

I’m so grateful to have grassroots supporters like you by my side as we work to make positive change for families in Nevada and across the country. And I’m especially grateful to have you with me as I face my first reelection fight.
In 2022, Nevada decided control of the Senate: My friend Sen. Catherine Cortez Masto defended her seat by _less than 1 percentage point. _It was the most competitive Senate race of the midterm elections.
**Now, experts say that Nevada could once again decide Senate control – so I need your urgent help. The only way we can keep Nevada blue is if we build a winning strategy fueled by _your _on-the-ground insights. It's critical that your priorities and concerns are at the forefront of our campaign.**
**[So please, friend, will you take a moment now to tell me which issues are most important to you? I need your grassroots input to help shape our strategy, keep Nevada blue, and defend the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57258137/387333505/-146199797?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2307-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDVhZTU0Ni1jZTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jQfbESAJbAUtIwdbhqxMlZDJ2MvnSSsVUJo1kAayw2A=&emci=a3d7db32-a792-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=945ae546-ce92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=3800590)**
| | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57258138/387333506/-146199797?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2307-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDVhZTU0Ni1jZTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jQfbESAJbAUtIwdbhqxMlZDJ2MvnSSsVUJo1kAayw2A=&emci=a3d7db32-a792-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=945ae546-ce92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=3800590)
---
Having grown up in a working-class family, I've made it my mission to give back to my community and ensure that _every _American has the opportunity to thrive. I'm the granddaughter of immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran – and I was the first in my family to graduate from college. In 2018, I ran for the U.S. Senate and was the only Democratic challenger in the country to unseat a Republican incumbent that year.
**I'm fighting for progress each and every day, but I can't continue this important work without your help. Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ reports that the GOP has a clear path to retaking Senate control – and experts are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats on the ballot.**
So, to keep both this seat and the Senate blue, I need to hear from supporters like you: [Please, friend, will you take our quick priorities survey and share what matters most to you and your family? During CNN’s Presidential Town Hall, Joe Biden said he was open to altering the filibuster to pass voting rights legislation (and maybe more!).
**To be clear:** The filibuster allows 41 Republican Senators to STOP Joe Biden’s agenda in its tracks. And since Democrats only have 51 votes in the Senate, Mitch McConnell’s minority holds a lot of power.
Republicans have already blocked the Freedom to Vote Act and threatened to kill the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. Meanwhile, Republican state legislators are pushing over 400 voter suppression bills in 39 states!
The clock is ticking, and we can’t let Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies stand in the way of progress, Peter!
But we want to know if you would support a Biden push to eliminate the filibuster. So before midnight:
**Do you think Democrats should eliminate the filibuster to pass historic voting rights legislation?**

clean_body: Everything is on the line. | = 🔴 Peter, you’ve been selected for an exclusive poll! 🔴 | CNN : “Biden says he's open to altering filibuster on voting rights” Do you think Democrats should eliminate the filibuster to pass historic voting rights legislation? RESPONSES NEEDED: 89 | DEADLINE: Midnight | = | = ---|--- During CNN’s Presidential Town Hall, Joe Biden said he was open to altering the filibuster to pass voting rights legislation (and maybe more!). To be clear: The filibuster allows 41 Republican Senators to STOP Joe Biden’s agenda in its tracks. And since Democrats only have 51 votes in the Senate, Mitch McConnell’s minority holds a lot of power. Republicans have already blocked the Freedom to Vote Act and threatened to kill the John Lewis Voting Rights Act. Meanwhile, Republican state legislators are pushing over 400 voter suppression bills in 39 states! The clock is ticking, and we can’t let Mitch McConnell and his GOP allies stand in the way of progress, Peter! But we want to know if you would support a Biden push to eliminate the filibuster. So before midnight: Do you think Democrats should eliminate the filibuster to pass historic voting rights legislation? = | = ---|--- Thanks for your response, Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, we’ve been working around the clock to uplift President Biden’s message to the American electorate and elect Democrats who will continue to fight for his ambitious agenda. President Biden and the Democrats are fighting tooth-and-nail to move our country forward, but Republicans are threatening to derail everything. = | = = Follow along: | ---|--- | Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Byron Donalds
subject: Last Friday’s deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
Here’s the critical changes we secured.
Here’s the critical changes we secured.
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfafomp4js80hucneeco4qd38slsmi3mivcpov80_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhmaob0shh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
The institution in Washington is broken. Congress doesn’t work for the American people, and to be honest, it hasn’t in a long time.
---
**Corrupt establishment swamp politicians have repeatedly sold-out hard-working Americans while doling out favors to lobbyists and special interest groups.**
---
In order to effectively fight for YOU over the next two years, we needed to make fundamental, institutional changes to the way that Congress functions.
---
_That’s why I joined 19 of my colleagues to hold the line in the people’s House until we secured a deal that accomplished the following:_
---
* Reverses Nancy Pelosi's rule change and returns the House to the 100+ year precedent of allowing a single member to bring up a motion to remove a speaker if they break their promises or betray the American people.

* Promises a vote on term limits and a Texas border security plan.

* Requires single subject bills instead of several thousand-page monstrosities that are full of unrelated provisions and irrelevant nonsense.

* Requires a minimum of 72 hours to read and review the contents of a bill.

* Establishes an investigation into the weaponization of the FBI, DOJ, and other government agencies.

* Holds Biden and Senate Democrats in check by ensuring that debt ceiling increases will be accompanied by reductions in spending.

---
Now, conservatives will be able to truly fight for WE THE PEOPLE with our new House majority.
---
[**Please make a contribution to support us as we hold the line against the Swamp and fight on your behalf in the 118th Congress.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2agob0jjdm5uj230h3tugb2eib2fjfmh5m0p75o_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhmaob0shh2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9rd50p2jl4ih6pei3jdfikh22t0oo3k0ce7rbj8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhmaob0shh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi63t6kp4okltjhuusdkevav42mg4g8rh3mmoekg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhmaob0shh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9fdv1f7si5vil4jjntlm5hhn7s34r25ufj4gro0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhmaob0shh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr41d85ftndkvqmqhkutsffvr42bc4opqfvlnf3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhmaob0shh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs5hs9i7k76p1udae83270eim5vit6eghqejcjvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhmaob0shh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmbbc5vq09198krd0n633fhamd4fi36vfi9miel0_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhmaob0shh2bs)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjeafinlasma9tlsp4pc5oai8bkhtre80f19eme8_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhmaob0shh2bs)
---

Some of the institutional changes we secured may seem small, but they are things that are critical for the House moving forward.
---
After the FBI’s illegal and partisan raid on President Trump’s home last summer, we’ve got to pursue investigations to explore possible abuses of power.
---
The motion to vacate rule for the speaker was in place in the House for over a hundred years until Nancy Pelosi changed it, and reinstating it is a huge step towards restoring accountability in Washington.
---
_In the real world, if you lead a company, it only takes one member of the board of directors to hold a vote against the chairman of the board or the CEO._
---
It shouldn’t be any different in Congress. Restoring the single-member threshold ensures that any future speaker is fully accountable to the members.
---
_If you want the job of leading the House, then you shouldn’t be afraid of that._
---
**Requiring single subject bills and a minimum of 72 hours to read and review them are major steps towards transparency and reducing wasteful spending.**
---
Far too often in Washington, various laws, provisions, and funding for dozens of separate, unrelated issues are cobbled together into massive Frankenstein bills.
---
Then, members are only given a few short hours to read them before they’re forced to vote yes or no on the entire thing.
---
The recent 4,000+ page omnibus that authorized $1.7 TRILLION in reckless spending is a perfect example of why these rules are desperately needed.
---
These rules changes matter immensely, Friend.
---
_They ultimately dictate how the House functions, and that goes directly to the ability of us accomplishing the solutions that we promised the American people._
---
Things like securing the border, budgetary restraint, and holding the Biden Administration accountable will be much easier to accomplish because of these changes.
---
When I came to Washington, I vowed to stop the destruction being caused by radical far-Left progressives and advance an America First agenda.
---
Last Friday was a massive step towards delivering on that promise.
---
But this was only the beginning. We still have a lot of work to do.
---
To keep up the fight, we’re depending on support from grassroots, America First patriots like YOU.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to support us as we hold the line against the Swamp and fight on your behalf in the 118th Congress.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf5hr1v8qhvs2thhuvi8rhkgcns0fl8vpt1j8k18_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhmaob0shh2bs)
---
Thank you,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf82h5t2crvtdkdhlcvdcutka5dd6p17tgapg2hg_rp22sh2s8i66pr6clhmaob0shh2bs)
---
Rep. Byron Donalds
FL-19

name: Andy Kim
subject: I am deeply disappointed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
As I begin my third term in the House of Representatives, I am still in awe of the responsibility the people of New Jersey have entrusted me with.

That trust is sacred, and I'm honored to be entrusted with yours. Being able to trust our representatives and hold them accountable is a cornerstone of any functioning democracy.

So, I'm deeply disappointed that the rules package passed solely by my Republican colleagues that will hollow out the Office of Congressional Ethics, making our democracy less transparent.

Congressional Republicans have restricted this independent office's ability to hold members on both sides of the aisle accountable.

At a time when the deep divisions across our nation are so clearly reflected in our governing body and public trust in our ability to govern is low, the last thing we need is less transparency and accountability. The American people deserve better.

Know that I and so many of my colleagues will continue the fight for what is right.

Though I am disappointed, I am not discouraged. I know we can bring respect and civility back. I am more confident because of you and the movement that we have built together over the last four years. Our work is just beginning. Will you join in today and fight the good fight? body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=hm5lY4iXoQve0iI&b=6kKqmlBC2CqDBpjIfL.qJw)

> # BREAKING NEWS!
> Former Congressman **Ted Yoho** Headlines Fundraiser for Ryan Chamberlin in Special Election House District 24
> [Click here for the Details](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=hm5lY4iXoQve0iI&b=02YyDeupxG4yysVKT_wseA)
> [](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=hm5lY4iXoQve0iI&b=02YyDeupxG4yysVKT_wseA)
> My fellow conservatives,
> One of the things that has frustrated me the most about the Washington establishment over the last two decades is that it seems to be made up of Republican after Republican who said one thing on the campaign trail and then did something different once they were elected. That’s why we loved President Trump for kicking in the establishment and draining the swamp, and that’s what we all love Gov. Ron DeSantis. He has done the same in Tallahassee.
> One person that never broke his word and remained true to his conservative principles was former Congressman Ted Yoho. He campaigned on fighting the establishment, he fought for term limits for members of Congress, and he limited himself to 8 years of service as an example to others.
> That is why I am so pleased to tell you that Congressman Ted Yoho will be supporting our campaign with a special appearance at a fundraiser on January 24th. Just like Congressman Yoho, I am already fighting an establishment that does not want a conservative like me serving in the legislature, and I need your support.
> Please plan to attend and help add your endorsement and support for our campaign! You can RSVP here:
> I look forward to seeing you there.
> Sincerely,
> Ryan
>
> **P.S.** The max contribution for any individual or company is $1,000 per entity. We would be honored by a maximum contribution, but we would be grateful for any amount as this is a short campaign that will take every dollar to defeat the establishment that is working so hard against me. You can find a contribution link here: [www.RyanChamberlinCampaign.com](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=hm5lY4iXoQve0iI&b=cWeBea1kQBU5JnVprb2Uvw)
>
> **P.P.S.** To help us spread the word about the Campaign - [click here](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=4koMV&m=hm5lY4iXoQve0iI&b=.E4OtMZuXzOUL_wt5lQ.ow)

12305 SE 55th Avenue Rd
Belleview FL 34420
USA

| | Fellow American, Do you believe President Biden's first trip to the southern border was a serious visit? Last year, Governor Larry Hogan joined 25 other Governors to form the _"Border Strike Force"_ offering common sense policy solutions to secure the border. Border security means stopping the criminal cartels, improving intelligence, stopping the flow of drugs, and combating human smuggling. We cannot do any of this with weak leadership from the top. We'd like your input today with an urgent poll...

clean_body: | | | | | Fellow American, Do you believe President Biden's first trip to the southern border was a serious visit? Last year, Governor Larry Hogan joined 25 other Governors to form the "Border Strike Force" offering common sense policy solutions to secure the border. Border security means stopping the criminal cartels, improving intelligence, stopping the flow of drugs, and combating human smuggling. We cannot do any of this with weak leadership from the top. We'd like your input today with an urgent poll... | | ⬇️ Do you believe Joe Biden's visit was or just more ? | | Thank you for your input,Rapid Response Team An America United | | | | | | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | Contributions to An America United are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | |

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Open border extremism
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6ed6fb6c7d4428da7fc3a59e6d3b0f0&_e=rLpXZfNwjo1P5pmPBQlY4cHVBKRTSKPFbEezfgr_fdcx0Q-E44mpJdlXx62PLZ8i9vZVAhh3ioVf3WYhKalY6lhW9LGQ_qfCEqDaK3gWO__0lMsxuTtyDQZONXBdAfmrxwlKdcgGpahEzB5ce70nN8uV7Ld6ao2nR6pCAAyc5zUxeEsouGDjDZlqI0483DDlkeJ0JSvGDJF0lgR1c9Y-nC6tR0_57qJs1q60s26cq6y-Y7Qs5hEoMy4f-Iskid6CP6hX-Yc5_0sEmu_EL6jbLHmtFJr2zdnN9o7pq963t8R8TtHV5Vw-vSaKzVOPb_cYEvrzssb5vLUuvHu1hhe42Z_WPuAoCmakXLGpV2XNwnl9OUcFq79aCe08dvWZuIzO)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6ed6fb6c7d4428da7fc3a59e6d3b0f0&_e=rLpXZfNwjo1P5pmPBQlY4cHVBKRTSKPFbEezfgr_fdcx0Q-E44mpJdlXx62PLZ8i9vZVAhh3ioVf3WYhKalY6lhW9LGQ_qfCEqDaK3gWO__0lMsxuTtyDQZONXBdAfmrxwlKdcgGpahEzB5ce70nN8uV7Ld6ao2nR6pCAAyc5zUxeEsouGDjDZlqI0483DDlkeJ0JSvGDJF0lgR1c9Y-nC6tR0_57qJs1q60s26cq6whWPHA1scbGq4ZhxDo6XSo1i4qzOrHxR0qR7zg6DH5XafuTy0NbhKHjVwmbpkrT9dK8ZNYzeE2bxIWhCjZm9YcRhaN-IkGp3pxI92YckD5f1rgkp_MKcxVBkmiTOz3IeDuX6N_T5vnTz0pc148HSlS)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6ed6fb6c7d4428da7fc3a59e6d3b0f0&_e=rLpXZfNwjo1P5pmPBQlY4cHVBKRTSKPFbEezfgr_fdcx0Q-E44mpJdlXx62PLZ8i9vZVAhh3ioVf3WYhKalY6lhW9LGQ_qfCEqDaK3gWO__0lMsxuTtyDQZONXBdAfmrxwlKdcgGpahEzB5ce70nN8uV7Ld6ao2nR6pCAAyc5zUxeEsouGDjDZlqI0483DDlkeJ0JSvGDJF0lgR1c9Y-nC6tR0_57qJs1q60s26cq6zNQ8_3Gw58Tma42VtHO8aDUcAzj-GWAgVD9rLLJvd-FhDU3WzFVGmLqTEm5Nccgz2v1z_YCgUvyjSbuC8Mzo9rW_on-lpklO6a7qDQS4Dimam48RS8VLOBU5QNOebKeG33Ezl3qyCO2x7xGmPxDhty)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6ed6fb6c7d4428da7fc3a59e6d3b0f0&_e=rLpXZfNwjo1P5pmPBQlY4cHVBKRTSKPFbEezfgr_fdcx0Q-E44mpJdlXx62PLZ8i9vZVAhh3ioVf3WYhKalY6lhW9LGQ_qfCEqDaK3gWO__0lMsxuTtyDQZONXBdAfmrxwlKdcgGpahEzB5ce70nN8uV7Ld6ao2nR6pCAAyc5zUxeEsouGDjDZlqI0483DDlkeJ0JSvGDJF0lgR1c9Y-nC6tR0_57qJs1q60s26cq6yw8zs4QpTr6Sr7zkE3BR3ySis943q7ALg8cvfoza_3DLSvFDzX40-GxCBtcmNg0_QDT4Y0lF8M9syKURaUzU8QGITT5-t5vZ1QdEfnccyUKR6_Dz1oBZcxkx-z3-edi7jGMGEYKy1uCi6sj48sQQQN)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6ed6fb6c7d4428da7fc3a59e6d3b0f0&_e=rLpXZfNwjo1P5pmPBQlY4cHVBKRTSKPFbEezfgr_fdcx0Q-E44mpJdlXx62PLZ8i9vZVAhh3ioVf3WYhKalY6lhW9LGQ_qfCEqDaK3gWO__0lMsxuTtyDQZONXBdAfmrxwlKdcgGpahEzB5ce70nN8uV7Ld6ao2nR6pCAAyc5zUxeEsouGDjDZlqI0483DDlkeJ0JSvGDJF0lgR1c9Y-nC6tR0_57qJs1q60s26cq6z08gapBJfwM0IppFXe42YZ3azQyz9ORvwim4dMTmnzElQh6sl-ZcIcpBJw9FJyMbTrgZB3-S-zOV9aC8N0ABh-UnhCBv6yUpXmwRSd9QlTWy-UQhDjejP2ccfmkEl6KPDOqIrVs1UI0mrvNGgraHxd)

But right now, I’m humbly asking you to fight with us. = Here’s the deal: Speaker McCarthy is rushing to outraise us to prove that we don’t have what it takes to reclaim the Majority. We’re going to prove him absolutely wrong, team. Which is why we need a powerful surge of support – 1,000 gifts in my first crucial days as Leader – to kick this year off with a strong foundation for victory, outraise extreme MAGA Republicans and hand them their first upset of the year. Can Lisa Blunt Rochester and I count on you to step up in this defining moment? name: Mike Thompson
subject: I’m ready to get to work. Are you?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress [unsubscribe](https://support
body:
|
---
| | Peter,

Last Saturday, I was sworn-in as United States Representative for California’s Fourth District in the 118th Congress. It is my greatest honor to represent our beautiful district in Congress.

I’ve always made it a point to put our district first and focus on the issues that matter most to you, Peter. Over the last two years I’ve focused on these issues:
* Lowering costs for working families
* Combating climate change
* Decreasing health care costs and increasing access to affordable care through telework
* Ensuring fire survivors are not taxed on settlements
* Securing financial relief for growers impacted by natural disasters
* Ending the scourge of gun violence

But these fights are far from over and it’s never been more important to stay the course. As I head into this new Congress, with new leadership, I need to know, what issues matter most to YOU?

Peter, serving the people of California’s Fourth District is an immense honor, and I appreciate the faith and confidence you have in me to represent you in Congress. [And if you have 45 seconds — please let me know which issues are front and center for you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57252252/387308285/28019136?refcode=MT_EM_SV_WL_20230112_1_1&refcode2=3305711a-ad92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzA1NzExYS1hZDkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2LYVYl6s0-eSDqQv3OB_AZN6yDH0q6YCiknDOPhprnA=&emci=3c78cf13-ad92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=3305711a-ad92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=2678920)

Thanks,

Mike

---
|

_**Transcript** _

PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP: The now-famous “Twitter Files” have proven beyond all doubt that the corrupt officials at the FBI have been coordinating a massive censorship, surveillance, and propaganda campaign against the American People, and frankly against me.

In the most recent and notorious example, the FBI worked to stop the truth from being told about the Biden Family’s criminality —they worked so hard to stop it from coming out — and the corruption prior to the 2020 election. They didn’t want any bad information to come out about the Biden family. The fix was in, the election was rigged.

But the censorship of the Laptop from Hell is only the beginning of the story about the weaponization of government against free speech. We must have free speech in our country. We must have a fair and free press. As recent reporting shows, the FBI and other rogue agencies have been systematically colluding with former national security officials placed in high positions at Twitter, and very likely other companies, to advance their censorship regime, which is really in this case to steal an election.

This anti-American effort, and a very illegal effort at that, has been working to silence dissenting opinions on COVID and crucial issues on public health and on the election, and elections in the future. They suppressed doctors and health experts who dared to question approved public health narratives. They censored voices who criticized school closures, lockdowns, and mandates. And they even banned people simply for stating proven scientific facts. And anything bad about China, they didn’t want out. But anything bad about Biden and the Biden Crime Family — and that’s what it was, just look at the Laptop from Hell — they didn’t want that coming out under any circumstances. What they wanted coming out was anything bad about your favorite president, me. Anything bad about Trump, put it out, even if it’s not true.

But this all had nothing to do with science. This had nothing to do with saving lives. It had everything to do with politics or a sick ideology. This was about government working with powerful corporations to seize power over YOU, the American People. And we can’t let that continue.

The “Twitter Files” prove that we urgently need my plan to dismantle the illegal censorship regime — a regime like nobody’s ever seen in the history of our country or most other countries for that matter. To prosecute the perpetrators for their crimes, and to restore free speech for all Americans — so important. We need a free press, we need free speech, we need fair elections, and we need borders.

The new Congress should immediately hold hearings to investigate the role of the FBI and other federal agencies in censoring lawful speech. Congressional leaders should promptly issue subpoenas in furtherance of this goal.

The revelations also highlight why my proposal to end the revolving door between the Deep State — and there is a Deep State indeed. I wasn’t a believer, but everybody’s a believer right now — and the tech tyrants is so important. There must be a 7-year cooling off period before any employee of these powerful agencies is allowed to take a job at a major platform.

When I am president, we will take back our freedoms. We will take back our country.

Transcript PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP: The now-famous “Twitter Files” have proven beyond all doubt that the corrupt officials at the FBI have been coordinating a massive censorship, surveillance, and propaganda campaign against the American People, and frankly against me. In the most recent and notorious example, the FBI worked to stop the truth from being told about the Biden Family’s criminality —they worked so hard to stop it from coming out — and the corruption prior to the 2020 election. They didn’t want any bad information to come out about the Biden family. The fix was in, the election was rigged. But the censorship of the Laptop from Hell is only the beginning of the story about the weaponization of government against free speech. We must have free speech in our country. We must have a fair and free press. As recent reporting shows, the FBI and other rogue agencies have been systematically colluding with former national security officials placed in high positions at Twitter, and very likely other companies, to advance their censorship regime, which is really in this case to steal an election. This anti-American effort, and a very illegal effort at that, has been working to silence dissenting opinions on COVID and crucial issues on public health and on the election, and elections in the future. They suppressed doctors and health experts who dared to question approved public health narratives. They censored voices who criticized school closures, lockdowns, and mandates. And they even banned people simply for stating proven scientific facts. And anything bad about China, they didn’t want out. But anything bad about Biden and the Biden Crime Family — and that’s what it was, just look at the Laptop from Hell — they didn’t want that coming out under any circumstances. What they wanted coming out was anything bad about your favorite president, me. Anything bad about Trump, put it out, even if it’s not true. But this all had nothing to do with science. This had nothing to do with saving lives. It had everything to do with politics or a sick ideology. The new Congress should immediately hold hearings to investigate the role of the FBI and other federal agencies in censoring lawful speech. Congressional leaders should promptly issue subpoenas in furtherance of this goal. The revelations also highlight why my proposal to end the revolving door between the Deep State — and there is a Deep State indeed. I wasn’t a believer, but everybody’s a believer right now — and the tech tyrants is so important. There must be a 7-year cooling off period before any employee of these powerful agencies is allowed to take a job at a major platform. When I am president, we will take back our freedoms.
