name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING: Lori Lightfoot Broke the Law
body:
Urging CPS teachers to offer students credit in exchange for volunteering on her campaign is wrong, and according to Lightfoot herself, it’s criminal.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/f63284fe6576/breaking-lori-lightfoot-broke-the-law?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fc1ef09474-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_12_06_56&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fc1ef09474-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Under Standards Imposed by the U.S. Attorney's Office - Where She Once Worked, Lightfoot Broke the Law (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/under-standards-imposed-by-the-u-s-attorneys-office-where-she-onced-worked-lightfoot-broke-the-law.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fc1ef09474-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_12_06_56&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fc1ef09474-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

On Wednesday evening, WTTW News (https://news.wttw.com/2023/01/11/lightfoot-campaign-asks-cps-teachers-encourage-students-help-her-win-reelection-return?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fc1ef09474-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_12_06_56&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fc1ef09474-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) broke a story that Mayor Lori Lightfoot’s campaign sent an email to Chicago Public Schools (CPS) teachers on their official city email addresses to encourage students to volunteer on her campaign in exchange for class credit.

Did she break the law?

Under the standard imposed by the US Attorney’s office here in Chicago – an office where the mayor worked from 1996-2002, she did.

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/under-standards-imposed-by-the-u-s-attorneys-office-where-she-onced-worked-lightfoot-broke-the-law.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fc1ef09474-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_12_06_56&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fc1ef09474-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The standard for bribery was set in the case of ** United States v. Giles (https://law.justia.com/cases/federal/appellate-courts/F3/246/966/469117/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fc1ef09474-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_12_06_56&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fc1ef09474-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
. This case was decided by the 7th Circuit Court of Appeals while Lightfoot worked in the US Attorney’s office prosecuting corruption cases. According to the Giles standard, she’s guilty of attempted bribery.

Lightfoot’s former office has previously argued in high profile trials that a political benefit is now considered a personal benefit and therefore can rise to the level of a bribe. By offering public school children class credit in exchange for doing political work for Mayor Lightfoot’s campaign, the mayor is receiving both a political and personal benefit. According to the Giles case, this constitutes bribery, and that’s a crime.

When Lightfoot campaigned and was elected in 2019, she pledged to end corruption in Chicago. On election night during a speech declaring victory, the Mayor-elect
** said (https://apnews.com/article/us-news-il-state-wire-neighborhoods-ap-top-news-chicago-d0f207a0f7f745bd848d3503e6a0b236?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fc1ef09474-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_12_06_56&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fc1ef09474-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
,

“We can and we will break this city’s endless cycle of corruption.”

But she isn’t ending corruption – she’s expanding it.

How different is this from the old school politics of the Chicago Democratic Machine where the US Attorney’s office sent countless city workers to jail for no-show jobs where political work was done on government time, or because they were being rewarded for their political work by getting raises and promotions in exchange for knocking on doors for Democratic candidates?

That’s precisely how the biggest political boss of all time, Mike Madigan, who she now attacks in political ads, built his political machine. Yet even Madigan didn’t go so far as to ask school children to leave the classroom and go knock on doors for him.

The Mayor may want to think twice about running negative ads attacking her political opponents linking them to Mike Madigan, when she’s outdoing Madigan by using school children for political gain.

School is a place for children to learn how to read, write and do arithmetic. CPS students shouldn’t be asked to leave their studies and critical after school programs to knock on doors for Mayor Lightfoot’s re-election campaign.

It’s no secret that CPS students are struggling – made worse by shutdowns and remote learning. And
** test scores (https://chicago.suntimes.com/education/2021/12/2/22814922/illinois-report-card-cps-test-scores-pandemic-state-board-education-search?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fc1ef09474-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_12_06_56&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fc1ef09474-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
indicate that CPS students are falling way behind on math and reading skills since the pandemic.

The kids belong in the classroom learning, not in the precincts knocking on doors.

Mayor Lightfoot should know better. The US Attorney’s office, where she once worked, has thrown governors in prison for things less than this.

Urging public school teachers to offer students class credit in exchange for volunteering on the Lightfoot campaign is certainly wrong, and according to Lightfoot herself, it’s criminal.

The U.S. The Attorney’s office can’t selectively choose, nor weaponize this standard to only target one political figure and not another.

Shortly after the story broke last night, Team Lightfoot
** issued (https://news.wttw.com/2023/01/11/lightfoot-campaign-asks-cps-teachers-encourage-students-help-her-win-reelection-return?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fc1ef09474-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_12_06_56&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fc1ef09474-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
three different statements in less than two hours – indicating that the campaign was in total panic mode.

Initially, a spokesperson for the Lightfoot campaign told WTTW News that the email was “to provide young people with the opportunity to engage with our campaign, learn more about the importance of civic engagement and participate in the most American of processes...done using publicly available contact information.”

A short while later, Lightfoot’s campaign issued a second statement to WTTW, stating the campaign would “cease contact with CPS employees out of an abundance of caution.”

A few hours later, the Lightfoot campaign issued an astonishing third statement to WTTW, stating,

“All [Lightfoot for Chicago] campaign staff have been reminded about the solid wall that must exist between campaign and official activities and that contacts with any city of Chicago, or other sister agency employees, including CPS employees, even through publicly available sources is off limits. Period.”

Although, Illinois Review has no evidence to prove this, the third statement sounds like a statement personally written by a frustrated Mayor, who ended the statement with the word, “period.”

Several people, including mayoral candidate Paul Vallas have called for an independent and joint investigation by the City of Chicago and CPS Inspector Generals to get to the bottom of this scandal.
** (https://twitter.com/PaulVallas/status/1613554061197955072?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fc1ef09474-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_12_06_56&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fc1ef09474-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Lightfoot campaigned on ending corruption. But taking school children out of the classroom and away from their homework to work on her campaign may be criminal, is grossly hypocritical and worst of all, is hurting our children.
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fc1ef09474-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_12_06_56&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fc1ef09474-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/illinoisreview?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fc1ef09474-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_12_06_56&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fc1ef09474-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/illinois.review?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fc1ef09474-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_12_06_56&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fc1ef09474-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Website (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=fc1ef09474-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_12_06_56&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-fc1ef09474-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
** Email (mailto:articles@illinoisreview.com)

P.O. Box 2783, Orland Park, IL 60462

.

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Surprising ways your children are taught socialism
body:
Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation’s youth.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65dc59db071c4e6d92d16398cf8617a6&_e=TEH3okpdMt_imTfvtJgN1Fhva2U42exLTa4Qfj19QcPXQlZebKhgo7z-oQ9ON4uypXvcjrKykh3NKdivA3y_vJ_SZj64ub833H-laWg_ZK0_sQZChdy9nRc3zFfw4OQBZGq5yOxGaSdL3xyWeSQGGfa5Ce5HCboar4MJAyhvd6xbyv3CPqS5-sdy1kjt57Pp-vAq5_6nJY6_sGpwQzFngN60RmkcdqKk4fxv6gALPhx0NdL6AUQcrnGtXMIH0df5Hg8HQNfHcpscupav0Y0IvqBbHAstv9sMP8M-d9qPmRzBpz_QP49uN25NNJaae0hlUQ6_xnadUzDPbkktVhwleYkITF6Z2UCvvWCCb83tO6I%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend, Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation's youth. And it's no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education.

But today's young people don't understand the true realities of socialism--or the clever ways it's being introduced to them.

That's why our latest addition to The Libertas Institute's _Tuttle Twins_ series is so important, _["The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism."](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65dc59db071c4e6d92d16398cf8617a6&_e=TEH3okpdMt_imTfvtJgN1Fhva2U42exLTa4Qfj19QcPXQlZebKhgo7z-oQ9ON4uypXvcjrKykh3NKdivA3y_vJ_SZj64ub833H-laWg_ZK0_sQZChdy9nRc3zFfw4OQBZGq5yOxGaSdL3xyWeSQGGfa5Ce5HCboar4MJAyhvd6xbyv3CPqS5-sdy1kjt57Pp-vAq5_6nJY6_sGpwQzFngEYKIOTlfmq2YDdi5iuYNwZ7Vexq6-sQyh86aHv8N1leK1eZ2Rbhc7K2NhIC1_mfutu-JN1qc1E4zpQP7kwDbTIxaBfsgciyoPTKZiG5BP1lM4LYqutratKjInJpLF4A0Kszkb_dNBjUivoATFR2qno%3D)_
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65dc59db071c4e6d92d16398cf8617a6&_e=TEH3okpdMt_imTfvtJgN1Fhva2U42exLTa4Qfj19QcPXQlZebKhgo7z-oQ9ON4uypXvcjrKykh3NKdivA3y_vJ_SZj64ub833H-laWg_ZK0_sQZChdy9nRc3zFfw4OQBZGq5yOxGaSdL3xyWeSQGGfa5Ce5HCboar4MJAyhvd6xbyv3CPqS5-sdy1kjt57Pp-vAq5_6nJY6_sGpwQzFngPGOXU3UxitgpIMF0kGhNixmCGTj8PA5C7eGzZYidmfUnsGoGg9cJ8k-q1HV8HyOqlbFwxUwHcOR7WdCeMLHaZvWt8xvC_sP4z47AU8ixJiYeEhfypixXBuJrCbhbX7YmXVW1HNK4-30cLoveRhFaAc%3D)
---
| | You can get your free copy using this secure link:

[https://act.libertas.org/tt-subtle-ways](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=65dc59db071c4e6d92d16398cf8617a6&_e=TEH3okpdMt_imTfvtJgN1Fhva2U42exLTa4Qfj19QcPXQlZebKhgo7z-oQ9ON4uypXvcjrKykh3NKdivA3y_vJ_SZj64ub833H-laWg_ZK0_sQZChdy9nRc3zFfw4OQBZGq5yOxGaSdL3xyWeSQGGfa5Ce5HCboar4MJAyhvd6xbyv3CPqS5-sdy1kjt57Pp-vAq5_6nJY6_sGpwQzFngPWwzkB_EbbF1JZ2IdytvCsoKc0paZr55E7FWylJnOcDepBOo_1C8vH_iG8L0fErNdNLmO2TRxnvUCas8dOd9K-VYVPzSPVbqihI5NM3OhhIaKaIXbAtCfF3beSAzuOEM8E-18-AVqER1z2xVzvvnGs%3D)

Inside this eBook, you'll get an in-depth look at some of the socialist concepts being fed to your children. But more importantly, you'll discover practical ways to explain socialism while teaching your children important liberty-based principles of how to live free.

If you're concerned with the rise in socialism in our country--especially among our nation's youth--this is the eBook for YOU!

Peter,

We couldn’t be more excited to have **_fourteen_ Democrats Serve candidates** newly sworn into the U.S. House of Representatives!

These community leaders, military veterans, teachers, and other public service pros are ready to get to work for the American people.

[Help us congratulate these new members by signing our digital card today!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57252568/387309662/-1185843060?source=DS_EM_PT_LO_230112_1_1&refcode2=b3e00fd4-af92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&contactdata=gAvwNENUhZIupxQi3uaY5IF49GC4Sqc33L1/PeyNw3FYBCYsknBIjs1CTz9BMnMihGDO/0sC8i/EEwxTTE/GsQ==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzZTAwZmQ0LWFmOTItZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YJo7aCiwa5BT72Lp3yeUBzvZYiGY5ZUj5MDLPF9mAAg=&emci=c584d9ac-ae92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b3e00fd4-af92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=10067282)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57252569/387309663/-1185843060?source=DS_EM_PT_LO_230112_1_1&refcode2=b3e00fd4-af92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&contactdata=gAvwNENUhZIupxQi3uaY5IF49GC4Sqc33L1/PeyNw3FYBCYsknBIjs1CTz9BMnMihGDO/0sC8i/EEwxTTE/GsQ==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzZTAwZmQ0LWFmOTItZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YJo7aCiwa5BT72Lp3yeUBzvZYiGY5ZUj5MDLPF9mAAg=&emci=c584d9ac-ae92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b3e00fd4-af92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=10067282)
While House Republicans fell into chaos as soon as they arrived back in Washington, our Democrats Serve members immediately joined their Democratic colleagues in a show of unity.

We’re proud to have helped these 14 members get to Congress, and one of our top priorities for 2023-2024 will be to take back the House and put the Speaker’s gavel in Hakeem Jeffries’ hands.

[For now, we invite you to join us in congratulating these new members (finally!) being sworn into Congress by signing our digital card.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/57252570/387309664/-1185843060?source=DS_EM_PT_LO_230112_1_1&refcode2=b3e00fd4-af92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&contactdata=gAvwNENUhZIupxQi3uaY5IF49GC4Sqc33L1/PeyNw3FYBCYsknBIjs1CTz9BMnMihGDO/0sC8i/EEwxTTE/GsQ==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIzZTAwZmQ0LWFmOTItZWQxMS05ZDdiLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YJo7aCiwa5BT72Lp3yeUBzvZYiGY5ZUj5MDLPF9mAAg=&emci=c584d9ac-ae92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=b3e00fd4-af92-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=10067282)

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

Democrats Serve

Milford, CT 06460

clean_body: | = Peter, We couldn’t be more excited to have fourteen Democrats Serve candidates newly sworn into the U.S. House of Representatives! These community leaders, military veterans, teachers, and other public service pros are ready to get to work for the American people. While House Republicans fell into chaos as soon as they arrived back in Washington, our Democrats Serve members immediately joined their Democratic colleagues in a show of unity. We’re proud to have helped these 14 members get to Congress, and one of our top priorities for 2023-2024 will be to take back the House and put the Speaker’s gavel in Hakeem Jeffries’ hands. Thank you! Democrats Serve | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | =

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we need to
talk about George Santos — the new Republican Representative for New
York’s third district.

He lied his way to Congress by fabricating his experience and background
to voters. Since then, he’s also been spotted flashing a white supremacist
hand-signal on the House floor.

George Santos has no place in Congress and as long as he’s in Congress it
will be a sign of disrespect to the American people. Allowing his behavior
and manipulative tactics to stand sets a dangerous precedent — Congress
needs to act now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/expel-santos/?source=em20230112-27019&t=1001&akid=27019%2E1203867%2EMQoDRm ]Will you add your name right now to sign our petition calling on the
House to expel George Santos? We cannot allow him to make a mockery of our
democracy.

Thank you for taking action,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1002&akid=27019%2E1203867%2EMQoDRm ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1003&akid=27019%2E1203867%2EMQoDRm ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=27019%2E1203867%2EMQoDRm

Peter, In case you haven’t heard, New York Republicans just elected George Santos to Congress – a candidate who has now been exposed for fabricating nearly his entire resume.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDufi9jXMpwhJXJz_xFCene7eZMGeXgg8cRxB_m22rqz04jWNl1t-jk0g7APvNLWR8SPPAUaei1Rdqz6apYLvlcHhR0isvc8MFrCuBZfs0gw5HZzTPDsvvSRA8QVtGyXtqygM9PvjKGAyla_EuCL2xbga-CD70vQ0qaruCp0Z85PrIUf9ITopWQeOpF6I6Tu3hZjECnHAfmLooI7OKvF3gDptLB4gs-DHItZTHdPEOGne-cLAND6Ynezmve2Cp6CcLCRkIzy9rjy1rmWvd1KIsOAR9lF7XbEl4Vy63dh5pH6Ew_Zf1ssmsPiieLLcoMLsEU/3ss/6m0hNPzYTl68oipbfivC0w/h1/o8vHftWxClmzZ2dbZyiKwmgMQDaUfR40y00DpH9UYV4)
---
In his campaign, Santos duped voters with made up educational history and work experience. He told voters and donors his grandparents were Holocaust survivors, and even went as far as claiming to have employed four people killed in the 2016 Pulse nightclub shooting. We’re clearly dealing with a pathological liar who will say anything for personal gain. **I joined my colleagues in the LGBTQ+ Equality Caucus in calling for Santos to resign. But as the 118th Congress gets underway, Santos is still walking the halls of Congress -- exploiting a position he lied his way into. It’s unacceptable, Peter.** **[If you agree, please add your name to our petition calling on Santos to step down. Help send a message that the American People won’t stand for elected officials who lie their way into positions of power.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDufi9jXMpwhJXJz_xFCene7eZMGeXgg8cRxB_m22rqz04jWNl1t-jk0g7APvNLWR8S4qhDhTZs8OWIj8a6WVcbhc2X5MEXsDYK43Z-HISg4acrMvejJIpxBze8MVjoGmgxAbJDe0-k0SmtArAuE9Gxqa3TUTTf95xWxkMWN7pjmtwMENCr5wH2h-oltg7owPtIn7eZRXvE0kaGbOZLCtw6Lm3AMMze5KyxHTGg-F-pvuT-LJ3V_JeZg1CYMKZgaetF3Q5gPIDBARsJBbVmIJyNa36mUlqCdZ-WPQ4-S5r-RhwzQK5o3Q0vsZpoj07rCyX1/3ss/6m0hNPzYTl68oipbfivC0w/h2/CUlwfo-3WdpByOtiOiPZnMtbhGYjjAfMo3kZuprdCik)**

**This scandal hits close to home because I actually ran against a Republican who was exposed for misleading voters and embellishing their resume.** As a meteorologist, it was my job to deliver factual, actionable information to help my community prepare for the days and weeks ahead. I ran for Congress with the belief that we could use more truth-telling in Washington -- not less. There’s a pattern emerging here, and the Republicans appear willing to lie to the voters if it means keeping a vote in Congress. It’s cynical, and it’s politics at its very worst. **[If, like me, you think Santos should step down, add your name to our petition today. The reason why this sort of gets under my skin is because the fight to keep Nevada blue doesn’t just magically stop in an “off year."
Organizers are still working around the clock to win races up-and-down the ballot, the Republican Party is continuing to invest their resources in our state, and **Democratic representatives like myself are counting on their supporters to help keep their campaigns moving.**
I have to be honest: **If we want any chance at winning in 2024, our effort needs to kick into high-gear right now.**
So, it may seem close to the election, but I have to ask you not to put your guard down. Our fight continues because the GOP won’t give up on their mission to flip my seat.

clean_body: a personal message | | | = Folks, I need to be honest – there’s been a lot of talk about being in an “off year” due to the election just occurring. I can’t overstate how far this is from the truth. Representatives like myself serve in two-year terms in the House, the shortest terms of any elected officials in government. This means that the “off year” doesn’t exist for us – we have to immediately start fundraising to keep this seat blue in 2024. = | | | = | | = The reason why this sort of gets under my skin is because the fight to keep Nevada blue doesn’t just magically stop in an “off year." Organizers are still working around the clock to win races up-and-down the ballot, the Republican Party is continuing to invest their resources in our state, and Democratic representatives like myself are counting on their supporters to help keep their campaigns moving. I have to be honest: If we want any chance at winning in 2024, our effort needs to kick into high-gear right now. So, it may seem close to the election, but I have to ask you not to put your guard down. Our fight continues because the GOP won’t give up on their mission to flip my seat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Don’t tire out on me now! Forward, Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . body:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8201?source=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230112_1_1&t=1011&akid=3875%2E5885482%2EWvm6UL ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Moderna's stock price soared when they
announced they were considering a massive price hike for their COVID-19
vaccine, but now that Bernie Sanders is in charge of oversight over Big
Pharma as chairman of the HELP Committee, they are learning that their
free ride from accountability is over.

Bernie called out their greed and threatened to subpoena executives to
testify.

Big Pharma isn't used to being held accountable for profiteering from
human misery, and the army of lobbyists and politicians they bankroll in
both parties will attack Bernie with everything they have.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8201?source=OR_EM_FR_25SP_20230112_1_1&t=1012&akid=3875%2E5885482%2EWvm6UL ]Help us defend Bernie from big-money attacks from the healthcare
industry by chipping in what you can here! They will do everything they
can to avoid accountability, so any amount helps!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Semi=20Bird?=
subject: China is buying up our land
body:
| | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=f563ed7949&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,If I told you that hostile foreign governments had police stations operating on American soil, what would you think? Would you be surprised? What if I told you these facilities were used by the Chinese Communist Party to push an illicit campaign of transnational repression?What if I told you there were 48 of them across our land?And what if I told you those are only the 48 we know of, and there very well could be more?The practice of selling American land to anyone other than American citizens is heinous and unconstitutional. American soil belongs to American citizens. End of discussion.The land we've been blessed with is ours – not the Federal Government's – yet they sell it as if it were their own. One of the many reasons I'm running for Governor of the state of Washington is to put an end to this practice.
Americans must have access to reliable and sufficient quantities of affordable, nutritious food, and similarly, require equal access to reliable and sustainable energy sources. In order to ensure this is possible, we MUST lawfully prevent foreign acquisitions of Washington State lands.There won't be any America for Americans if we sell it all to our adversaries, and I'm on a mission to ensure our land stays OUR land. When I’m Governor of Washington I will make sure that we BAN Chinese entities from buying up our strategic land.
| [HELP SEMI FIGHT BACK!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9e9634698a&e=fdefed58de)
---
I am ready to fight against that CCP and get back to the value of America First. When I’m Governor of Washington, one of my FIRST bills will be to STOP the sale of our land to the CCP!**WILL YOU CHIP IN TODAY TO HELP ME GET THERE?**
| [CHIP IN: HELP US STOP CHINA!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=fc5c1de3e6&e=fdefed58de)
---
We can change things in this country together, but I am going to need your help. Will you join me in this fight to save our great country? I know that good folks like you are willing to defend American values, rights and freedoms. We will not let the liberal elites ruin this great country. If every person reading this letter would chip in just $5 today, we would have the funds needed to fight this battle. What do you say? Are you with me?
| [STAND WITH SEMI! DONATE NOW!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=aad0ec8bde&e=fdefed58de)
---
In God We Trust,Semi Bird

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Help us congratulate Rep. Cathy McMorris Rodgers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Cathy McMorris-Rodgers has been appointed as the new chair on the House's important Energy and Commerce Committee

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! () State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. () Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press: “We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions. “Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Add your name: Ban hedge fund investors from owning single-family homes
body:
Petition for a fair housing market
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T393f8383-f81e-485d-be6f-924cfe97e6e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **[Sign the petition: Ban hedge fund investors from owning single-family homes.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tefbb76b3-792c-40e2-898d-1b3beef20b9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** The affordable housing crisis is impacting nearly every community, every neighborhood. Rents are going up almost everywhere, even as families struggle to make ends meet. And home prices, especially for first-time home buyers, keep climbing further out of reach. There’s a Wall Street-driven reason for that – private hedge funds are [exacerbating](https://default.salsalabs.org/T33ed5fa8-906d-4e86-88e7-c1efe8929832/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) the crisis by buying up housing in bulk. All across America, hedge funds and private equity are using their vast fortunes to outbid everyday Americans looking to buy homes. And because their investors demand Wall Street-style returns, they're driving up rents and cutting back on repairs.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T230b4bda-b89c-4ea5-ab8d-4162c9160044/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| In order to protect American home buyers from Wall Street greed, Senator Jeff Merkley has a plan to end Wall Street ownership of residential housing. While aspects of the housing crisis— including a supply shortage—will take years to remedy, others can be addressed immediately, including a ban on hedge funds and private equity firms owning and controlling large parts of the American housing market. It's time to ban Wall Street from buying up the homes in our neighborhoods. [**Sign the petition: We must take action to make housing affordable by ensuring that housing is for homes, not hedge funds.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc24e3b93-9f2b-45af-b5b7-71eb60b6c955/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for standing up for a fair housing market for working families. Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9cd5b04-a3c4-4633-b2f3-77b0391628d8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/banhedgefundsfromowningsingle-familyhomes2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te15931d5-8914-4bb0-b0a4-eeb40459acc5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Katie Porter
subject: I’m running… for the Senate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=15725%2E3422442%2ERky4qa)
Derek, I wanted you to hear it from me first: **I’m running for the U.S. Senate.**
More on the “why” and the “how” below, but first I want to ask if you’ll be a Founding Donor to our campaign.**Reporting a strong early fundraising number will show the strength of our movement, and I want you on our team.**
**[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15046?refcode=EMAF12_2_NDR_20230112_V1_F&t=2&akid=15725%2E3422442%2ERky4qa)**
**_Why I’m running_**
I don’t look, live, or talk like most Members of Congress. Instead of attending swanky fundraisers with corporate lobbyists, I’m one of a dozen Members of Congress who rejects all contributions from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. **I’m leading the fight to ban congressional stock trading and was the *only* Democrat to oppose earmarks** (which are a way of funding Members’ pet projects). I’m a single mom of three school-aged kids who drives a minivan and uses a whiteboard to break down the math behind corruption and greed. **I’ve spent my career—both before and after being elected to the House—taking on special interests and delivering for working people,** and I’m running for the Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington.
---

**_How this is going to work_**
This isn’t going to be an easy race, but I wouldn’t be asking for your support if I didn’t know we have what it takes to win. But the reality is, reaching voters in our large and populous state requires serious resources. Because California has a unique system where the top two vote getters in the primary (regardless of party) advance to the general, there are so many unknowns in this race. Building a robust campaign that reaches Californians from all walks of life will be key to our long-term success.
---

**_My pitch: Become a Founding Donor_**
Winning this race will only be possible because of grassroots supporters. This isn’t BS—**contributions of $10 or $20 are the only reason I was able to win three competitive House races and compete with nearly ten million dollars in Republican super PAC spending this past year** —that’s remarkable, and I’m so grateful. But now we need to reach even more voters and run an even larger campaign, and we’ll be up against even more spending from our opponents. **[Contributing right now will help us kickstart this campaign.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/15046?refcode=EMAF12_2_NDR_20230112_V1_F&t=3&akid=15725%2E3422442%2ERky4qa)**

clean_body: Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Derek, I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m running for the U.S. Senate. More on the “why” and the “how” below, but first I want to ask if you’ll be a Founding Donor to our campaign.Reporting a strong early fundraising number will show the strength of our movement, and I want you on our team. Why I’m running I don’t look, live, or talk like most Members of Congress. Instead of attending swanky fundraisers with corporate lobbyists, I’m one of a dozen Members of Congress who rejects all contributions from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. I’m leading the fight to ban congressional stock trading and was the only Democrat to oppose earmarks (which are a way of funding Members’ pet projects). I’m a single mom of three school-aged kids who drives a minivan and uses a whiteboard to break down the math behind corruption and greed. I’ve spent my career—both before and after being elected to the House—taking on special interests and delivering for working people, and I’m running for the Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. How this is going to work This isn’t going to be an easy race, but I wouldn’t be asking for your support if I didn’t know we have what it takes to win. But the reality is, reaching voters in our large and populous state requires serious resources. Because California has a unique system where the top two vote getters in the primary (regardless of party) advance to the general, there are so many unknowns in this race. Building a robust campaign that reaches Californians from all walks of life will be key to our long-term success. My pitch: Become a Founding Donor Winning this race will only be possible because of grassroots supporters. This isn’t BS—contributions of $10 or $20 are the only reason I was able to win three competitive House races and compete with nearly ten million dollars in Republican super PAC spending this past year —that’s remarkable, and I’m so grateful. But now we need to reach even more voters and run an even larger campaign, and we’ll be up against even more spending from our opponents. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Derek, thank you for considering making a contribution, and thanks for being a part of Team Porter. Onward! Katie Porter

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Surprising ways your children are taught socialism
body:
Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation’s youth. And it’s no surprise as to why.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=64345b90573747d994c24238c97e0d5e&_e=BPFSsZVfqQUuJ4erHfBfTYNAqp-yR9vHH31uMiE96fCFxIl28hUtNmZj97caDHi3XvOt1SLOUBNjZgLacBfqvOB-5Brsb0tcUXtUrgtzHJESwC0JtOLpe-tjCmSIp-iLvBj9NtUKs55l_TklcA97ZKrggs2l8Lgd-hhO4kcaatgbwRlWhfbiTM0BV6DwdZ9DWzaoKz8yxSIq4dJdX5FSeKMEKwarNFdijFqK8Nx-evfuOCaTU_lOOASG2VOF3Z55KOUqY80tY6x_UriQ0x885vk1oLG9scBbTER5_CwYNajUHKuw2RTojEg2yqJzkmzLS1TH1YQg42tmId5-zQfEljq9iWDWfRS_9n3_2P9rKUQ%3D)

| | Dear Friend, Socialism is gaining popularity with our nation's youth. And it's no surprise as to why. Politicians like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Bernie Sanders lure them in with promises of universal health care and a free college education.

But today's young people don't understand the true realities of socialism--or the clever ways it's being introduced to them.

That's why our latest addition to The Libertas Institute's _Tuttle Twins_ series is so important, _["The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism."](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=64345b90573747d994c24238c97e0d5e&_e=BPFSsZVfqQUuJ4erHfBfTYNAqp-yR9vHH31uMiE96fCFxIl28hUtNmZj97caDHi3XvOt1SLOUBNjZgLacBfqvOB-5Brsb0tcUXtUrgtzHJESwC0JtOLpe-tjCmSIp-iLvBj9NtUKs55l_TklcA97ZKrggs2l8Lgd-hhO4kcaatgbwRlWhfbiTM0BV6DwdZ9DWzaoKz8yxSIq4dJdX5FSeNypEIPtYdYzsN-8QhWyfsC8QZ4MWfSqL2ypTL8zYHQ6a-LP3sPyLiUAavJuID93ExY528oOrabhu3VfabWMW3BPwPRe-g-Wqnz-uUepjfgLEH5JNxPGyJjJEFu7IUQps570KPiFjhws0SWXe9cur40%3D)_

Inside this eBook, you'll get an in-depth look at some of the socialist concepts being fed to your children. But more importantly, you'll discover practical ways to explain socialism while teaching your children important liberty-based principles of how to live free.

If you're concerned with the rise in socialism in our country--especially among our nation's youth--this is the eBook for YOU!

Please use this link to get instant access to your free copy of, [_The Tuttle Twins: Subtle Ways Your Kids Are Taught to Embrace Socialism._](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=64345b90573747d994c24238c97e0d5e&_e=BPFSsZVfqQUuJ4erHfBfTYNAqp-yR9vHH31uMiE96fCFxIl28hUtNmZj97caDHi3XvOt1SLOUBNjZgLacBfqvOB-5Brsb0tcUXtUrgtzHJESwC0JtOLpe-tjCmSIp-iLvBj9NtUKs55l_TklcA97ZKrggs2l8Lgd-hhO4kcaatgbwRlWhfbiTM0BV6DwdZ9DWzaoKz8yxSIq4dJdX5FSeE_GtCVqtstCEjaCDKsnNJ6etAJJyfy4bSp5zSlAc-J9b3sW8Hl9kfkHVlYkJfQ_9LfRRJ8V87-wFTFDlEKqubMIcS8qNEj0qCNiflSUVwjwyps12nuW7oduYZXxMvyRzPKQun82NVYx_Tp6gIWzNjw%3D)

Connor Boyack

body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=197baae89d5c46ef8cf2ef32adb19a0a&_e=_zoh02neYqliprPrcF04jfNbC_EXTzd_rs-xJPD5TRo4kctRyGvzrXrUBniqsBj_qClpeXo2XgVRicD7UdonmXnbn2CZu260g2oWxvEuX_HFmUQvGUeWYh4NU-ipEFFQAv57He1SEE68qxDB3qxtGY7voxvPDGG7dZz59-nYvhYAP-v8NpZpU3D-_qBWcCKqjzfEzzKmteYMTv2w3lsuA8NbQQW1UnN38Y49dJ4mrvg74EMWuq6Nu1YBUb7ThmkIb4P_dlWhfbkTU1Dz2bfmzQ4SWZROVrp-bCYidGF7aUMT3tPVwi6LPRXE-eyiiblVk5c14wCLQHzUkaHOpeiYsGvj3cIBEZ7YbPI2ZlBXJxwJSQEtFzb_5s_oDiHVdPGsU1ILhATyk_OSs9A1DvbQwEfBOhy3xW8kbLA-tECHfDb3RaqVIlkrWjso_gI3-OCB)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith—making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=197baae89d5c46ef8cf2ef32adb19a0a&_e=_zoh02neYqliprPrcF04jfNbC_EXTzd_rs-xJPD5TRo4kctRyGvzrXrUBniqsBj_qClpeXo2XgVRicD7UdonmXnbn2CZu260g2oWxvEuX_HFmUQvGUeWYh4NU-ipEFFQAv57He1SEE68qxDB3qxtGY7voxvPDGG7dZz59-nYvhYAP-v8NpZpU3D-_qBWcCKqjzfEzzKmteYMTv2w3lsuA8NbQQW1UnN38Y49dJ4mrvg74EMWuq6Nu1YBUb7ThmkIb4P_dlWhfbkTU1Dz2bfmzZ5-G4Z0fhQMaYDYu7JRWdfI-5x77M25f24dWundWrwpWUZwbW3b-fmgiSW6O33msepKdwJ2_UHu8F947-KAuxqPs_FLGVO-JHCAXRo4vRPGlUBYMt8mioi8A6Zspl2tFXgdMTuFo8K19AvHPFlMJZIpgFQsgLl1YCxPxyA-M5B-)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=197baae89d5c46ef8cf2ef32adb19a0a&_e=_zoh02neYqliprPrcF04jfNbC_EXTzd_rs-xJPD5TRo4kctRyGvzrXrUBniqsBj_qClpeXo2XgVRicD7UdonmXnbn2CZu260g2oWxvEuX_HFmUQvGUeWYh4NU-ipEFFQAv57He1SEE68qxDB3qxtGY7voxvPDGG7dZz59-nYvhYAP-v8NpZpU3D-_qBWcCKqjzfEzzKmteYMTv2w3lsuA8NbQQW1UnN38Y49dJ4mrvg74EMWuq6Nu1YBUb7ThmkIb4P_dlWhfbkTU1Dz2bfmzYuBx0HFwsyyp-EO0v519kuTNNCKOVhw19qocdPd9MhV8WJqWAAKC_2nnCWLZt-NqTokUNYlN_4D0xOSz5k0Vz_fTBj1qn49vEVntXlF3_thKsndduRVCCy_0E2fSWRmsnDmJnJwNeF4K7U7D3svpr6fKtg2fwBPCxSqBXM6Bkn3)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=197baae89d5c46ef8cf2ef32adb19a0a&_e=_zoh02neYqliprPrcF04jfNbC_EXTzd_rs-xJPD5TRo4kctRyGvzrXrUBniqsBj_qClpeXo2XgVRicD7UdonmXnbn2CZu260g2oWxvEuX_HFmUQvGUeWYh4NU-ipEFFQAv57He1SEE68qxDB3qxtGY7voxvPDGG7dZz59-nYvhYAP-v8NpZpU3D-_qBWcCKqjzfEzzKmteYMTv2w3lsuA8NbQQW1UnN38Y49dJ4mrvg74EMWuq6Nu1YBUb7ThmkIb4P_dlWhfbkTU1Dz2bfmzZcSdsUoJnYrJtg6smjfqX5a2i_dOj2YpDCSyB03_U0dB2j0L4LhCbv8ZT4K273ngp8hxOBPFSA_4JCxXJMcyPdze7sd0HpBoRN14Twq4lKzdkOIHqsOwHIF-v59qgej3raqFfwsbFjoMc6k0mU7g1xaUziGFu3pLFqU4SFRu5VV).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: After multiple votes - | = | Peter, After multiple votes - 15 to be exact - days of deliberation, and an almost fistfight on the house floor, Republicans have finally chosen Kevin McCarthy as House Speaker. The Republican chaos shows they can’t govern and care more about politics than working people. Their control over the House is one that will hurt the American people rather than help them. = | = The reality of a Republican-controlled House is one where voters like YOU will be essential to our work to get North Carolinians the rights they deserve. The fight will not be easy, but I will work every day to make sure we are making all the right strides to help our community and improve the lives of hard-working families. From lying about his ethnicity to breaking campaign finance laws to even fabricating the cause of the death of his mother, Santos has made so many ethical breaches that we can't even begin to keep them all straight. He said that if 142 people tell him to resign, he will. So let's show him that there is even more than that who want him to step aside. Sign our petition and show George Santos that Americans deserve ethical representatives in our government.

subject: Coffee with Canepa and SMC Parks Survey
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **Join Us for Coffee with Canepa!**

---
| **[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=33ede8432d&e=c0babbc643)
Share your ideas for new recreational facilities at San Bruno Mountain** San Bruno Mountain State and County Park is a gem in north San Mateo County that offers vast open space in the middle of some dense urban areas. San Mateo County Parks is currently exploring expanding visitor facilities in San Bruno Mountain State & County Park, in the Saddle field area just north of the main parking lot.

Our Parks Department has also been assessing what types of activities residents would like to see at the park which include bike rides, nature hikes and wildlife viewing?

San Bruno Mountain Park is an open space island amongst itself surrounded by dense urban areas. It is underutilized and we need your help to find ways to get more families and children into the park.

Copy and paste [https://www.smcgov.org/parks/SBM-Survey](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=592a422fe6&e=c0babbc643) into your web browser to take the survey.

In friendship, David J. Canepa

name: Team TNDP
subject: It's high time to legalize weed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
We think it's about time.

Peter,
Marijuana legalization is a no brainer to us, and thanks to our Democratic state legislators, it could become a reality. Senator Heidi Campbell and Representative Bob Freeman have introduced a bill that would fully legalize recreational and medical weed in Tennessee. Unfortunately, Republicans like Senator Richard Briggs think that we need more research before fully legalizing weed. But we know what this has always been — a stalling tactic. The research is clear: full legalization is a win for healthcare, criminal justice, our economy, and for freedom. [**_Our Democratic legislators are working hard to push for legalization, but we need more friends on the hill to get it passed. Senator Heidi Campbell and Representative Bob Freeman have introduced a bill that would fully legalize recreational and medical weed in Tennessee. name: Arizona Democrats
subject: The AZ GOP’s agenda is hate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | Help us fight back | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ7b5wNyzKPLhTo-AgqfOTTnFjqiiqtXGFjXqPt0ZI2dRS5W8P7-nEOr3nO0D-XDwp9sZRAMQpzGAclQqM_Giu_91s2MP1C2NFRFDPBreVIFaglG7d2X1NedJYekc58tCOFQhvEccXt1UlNEvC8E_JDN10a66X573381cWQMqVS3ZCGHayJAv0yOe66lw0Q3jEqxE5x9zzdAz0IpnD6XMpZHAj4-tDEu792uLx3Swk1GcEpWgYyB9N2pQKGYVjyO2iQ_TQjNe8snKBjz7b61s6bNLGwl8UVKXdy9xSAeOPep4Nl7fEASDWCmlrL5AFArTcMBAaaQmgpCQ415GcnYNWFKwbl01O1dVeVbhLG1siZBbiqJwjsIayH7qRAq0nx1csK8fC3hk8poUU618DD65paSOuIfhi1CgS0F2zDcTzGA/3ss/KNGn4O4PS-Sp9kNIymzkGA/h0/IV9Of2I9WaiYyhwOaSHKThwbyLgvcrOrPeicSpWBWPo)

---
| Team,

On her first day in office, Governor Katie Hobbs re-committed Arizona as a welcoming place for everyone, and banned discrimination in all forms in state employment, policies, and state contracts.

Gov. Hobbs' action was the first of many she took to make good on her promise that while she’s governor, we’re going to be building an Arizona for everyone.

But this week, once the GOP-controlled legislature came back in session, they immediately held press conferences and threatened lawsuits to overturn Gov. Hobbs’ actions. **_That’s right, the AZ GOP is mad that Governor Hobbs outlawed discrimination on the basis of race, sex, gender, pregnancy and other commonsense protections._**

**[Team, it’s clear the AZ GOP’s sole agenda is one of hate. They’ll never work to tackle the important issues, only work to divide us. It’s time to follow Governor Hobbs’ lead in building an Arizona for everyone, which means finally flipping GOP control of the state legislature. clean_body: | | | Help us fight back | | | Team, On her first day in office, Governor Katie Hobbs re-committed Arizona as a welcoming place for everyone, and banned discrimination in all forms in state employment, policies, and state contracts. Gov. Hobbs' action was the first of many she took to make good on her promise that while she’s governor, we’re going to be building an Arizona for everyone. But this week, once the GOP-controlled legislature came back in session, they immediately held press conferences and threatened lawsuits to overturn Gov. Hobbs’ actions. That’s right, the AZ GOP is mad that Governor Hobbs outlawed discrimination on the basis of race, sex, gender, pregnancy and other commonsense protections. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Hate has no place in Arizona. Let’s work together to defeat it. subject: The fight continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
How we got here and where we need to go

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57255540/387324445/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTA2OTMwNC1jMDkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=71zaVTZGRf_Miy68uCoRbP3ZCypWCqcRar5-aWNKs80=&emci=685eb9c1-f691-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&emdi=fe069304-c092-ed11-9d7b-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Hey Peter,

I never saw myself as an activist, until my son Jordan was shot and killed over a decade ago in November 2012. **At that moment, everything changed.** As a grieving mother, I decided I had to turn my pain into purpose. I decided to dedicate my life to ensuring that no parent has to feel the pain that I felt that day – and that I still feel to this day.

In the years after my son’s death, I began working as an organizer and an activist for gun safety organizations. I felt like our work was making a real difference in states around the country, but after the 2018 shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, I knew that I needed to do more.

I decided to run for Congress in a district deemed impossible for Democrats to win, against a Republican incumbent with millions in dark money from corporate PACs and special interests. No one thought we could pull the upset, but I knew our community better.

Since our win in 2018, the Democratic Party of Georgia has expanded and counted win after win against the ever more extreme GOP. We flipped the state blue for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in 2020 – defeating Donald Trump. We flipped the Senate blue, electing Senators Jon Ossoff and Rev. Raphael Warnock. **_And then we elected Rev. Warnock AGAIN last month._** But the past is not why I’m emailing you. I want you to understand the situation in Georgia – that we have activists and passionate civic leaders ready to follow the call to defeat the GOP. [_**But I’m emailing you to support our future and to ask you to split a donation between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia to continue our hard work.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57255541/387324446/458732943?refcode=20230112.1_LM_1K&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTA2OTMwNC1jMDkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=71zaVTZGRf_Miy68uCoRbP3ZCypWCqcRar5-aWNKs80=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The Democratic Party of Georgia has critical races coming up – not just in 2024, but in 2026 when we MUST re-elect Jon Ossoff, and even this fall with municipal elections across the state that will impact communities and millions of Georgians.

We need to ensure that our state party represents not just metro Atlanta but the entire state, from Savannah and Columbus to Valdosta and Augusta, from Albany and Macon to Rome and Statesboro, and small towns ALL across the state.

[_**So I’m asking you to help out. Make a donation today, split between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia, to ensure that the Democratic Party of Georgia can hire organizers and open offices all across the state and build lasting relationships and change in critical communities _everywhere_ in Georgia.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57255548/387324453/458732943?refcode=20230112.1_LM_1K&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTA2OTMwNC1jMDkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=71zaVTZGRf_Miy68uCoRbP3ZCypWCqcRar5-aWNKs80=)

clean_body: How we got here and where we need to go | | | Hey Peter, I never saw myself as an activist, until my son Jordan was shot and killed over a decade ago in November 2012. At that moment, everything changed. As a grieving mother, I decided I had to turn my pain into purpose. I decided to dedicate my life to ensuring that no parent has to feel the pain that I felt that day – and that I still feel to this day. In the years after my son’s death, I began working as an organizer and an activist for gun safety organizations. I felt like our work was making a real difference in states around the country, but after the 2018 shooting at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, I knew that I needed to do more. I decided to run for Congress in a district deemed impossible for Democrats to win, against a Republican incumbent with millions in dark money from corporate PACs and special interests. No one thought we could pull the upset, but I knew our community better. Since our win in 2018, the Democratic Party of Georgia has expanded and counted win after win against the ever more extreme GOP. We flipped the state blue for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in 2020 – defeating Donald Trump. We flipped the Senate blue, electing Senators Jon Ossoff and Rev. Raphael Warnock. And then we elected Rev. Warnock AGAIN last month. But the past is not why I’m emailing you. I want you to understand the situation in Georgia – that we have activists and passionate civic leaders ready to follow the call to defeat the GOP. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = The Democratic Party of Georgia has critical races coming up – not just in 2024, but in 2026 when we MUST re-elect Jon Ossoff, and even this fall with municipal elections across the state that will impact communities and millions of Georgians. We need to ensure that our state party represents not just metro Atlanta but the entire state, from Savannah and Columbus to Valdosta and Augusta, from Albany and Macon to Rome and Statesboro, and small towns ALL across the state. = With love, – Rep. Lucy McBath | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

clean_body: 4,827 supporters have already pledged their commitment to state Democrats by renewing their 2023 DLCC membership! | | | | | We keep emailing you about renewing your 2023 DLCC Membership, and here’s why: 4,827 supporters have already pledged their commitment to state Democrats by renewing their 2023 DLCC membership! And on Tuesday night, thanks to our grassroots supporters, state Democrats FLIPPED a Virginia Senate seat in the first competitive special election of the year! But to keep up our strong momentum, we need every last Democrat reading this on board! We just pulled your 2023 record, and it seems like you have yet to renew your membership. Is this right? | 2023 DLCC MEMBERSHIP SUPPORTER RECORD SUPPORTER: 2023 Member Status: PENDING Suggested Gift: $10 But don’t worry – there’s still plenty of time to become a 2023 DLCC member and do your part to keep the Democratic victories coming in 2023! Despite our win in Virginia this week, we don’t have any time to celebrate. In the next month, we’ll be facing special elections in battleground states like Pennsylvania and New Hampshire – where margins are so slim that they could be critical for Democrats’ control of entire chambers. Republicans are looking for any opportunity to build power, so it’s vital that Democrats win these races. But by making an ongoing commitment to the DLCC,you can help us tackle these tough challenges, fund our winning strategy, and build Democratic power in all 50 states. Your early investment is how we do that. By joining our growing list of members, you can own a piece of this ongoing fight. name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: RE: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Shemia Fagan
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jeffries-split-jan23?refcode=EM_FR_011223_B2_Hakeem_30ac&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jeffries-split-jan23?refcode=EM_FR_011223_B2_Hakeem_30ac&amount=5]
Saturday, I was sworn in as the new Democratic Leader.
Today, I promise you this: House Democrats will always fight for you and your family.
But right now, I’m humbly asking you to fight with us. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jeffries-split-jan23?refcode=EM_FR_011223_B2_Hakeem_30ac &amount=15]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jeffries-split-jan23?refcode=EM_FR_011223_B2_Hakeem_30ac &amount=15]After Republicans’ historically dysfunctional start, everyone will be watching to see what kind of fundraising numbers Democrats post. The support you show in my first few days as Leader is essential to reclaiming the House for Democrats so we can continue to deliver For The People. I’m asking: Will you rush $15 to make this a historic fundraising period for Democrats? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jeffries-split-jan23?refcode=EM_FR_011223_B2_Hakeem_30ac &amount=15]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jeffries-split-jan23?refcode=EM_FR_011223_B2_Hakeem_30ac &amount=15]Here’s the deal:
Speaker McCarthy is rushing to outraise us to prove that we don’t have what it takes to reclaim the Majority.

Hi – can I count on your help retiring our debt?
| | |

Hi – our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off and the amount we owe is publicly reported.

If you could give $3 right now to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57256251/387327248/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2182-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmM4OTU4MC1jNDkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H-fkZ5Tu1MtfAyHcpGygqUPhwG4rys_m0vQKXG07JpM=)**

Taking on this debt was the right thing to do. GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign, polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win. We made the best decisions we could with the information we had.

Now we need to put this campaign to bed once and for all.

**[I’m hoping that I can count on you to kick in $3 or more right now so that we can fully take care of this debt.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57256252/387327249/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2182-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmM4OTU4MC1jNDkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H-fkZ5Tu1MtfAyHcpGygqUPhwG4rys_m0vQKXG07JpM=)**

Thank you so much for your help – both now and during the campaign.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

**Alexandria’s third term in Congress has officially begun,** and this team is as dedicated as ever to achieving the progressive world we dream of. There’s so much more work to be done, but with your support we’re feeling more hopeful than ever.
With that said, we want to make sure our priorities are aligned with yours going into this year. Your input is valuable. We’re committed to sending you emails that are useful and provide ways you can take action in our democracy and in your communities.
[With that said, will you take 2 minutes to complete our 2023 Team AOC Priorities Survey, and share with us what matters most to you going into this new year?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/2023-priorities-survey/?source=em20230112-3789-P_ENG_SUR_MIS&t=2&akid=3789%2E2526796%2EVv7H6n)

When Alexandria and our team launched this campaign, going door-to-door in 2018, we could never have imagined how these last four years would unfold.
We’re incredibly grateful, and excited for what we can accomplish together heading into 2023.
Thank you for everything,
Team AOC

It took Republicans 15 votes and four days to complete the most basic task on the list: choosing the Speaker of the House.

**_But now that Kevin McCarthy has gotten the gavel, the chaos will only get worse._**

While Democrats’ unity was on full display in the midterms, Republicans have made it clear they are at each other’s throats — and that’s no way for a party to govern. **Right now, we’re looking ahead to two years of gridlock from _within_ the GOP.** That means two years of stalled legislation and a House majority unable to get anything done on behalf of Americans.

The good news is, the GOP’s majority is incredibly slim. In 2024, we can and will put Democrats back in power in the House. **_But if we want to flip critical toss-up districts in California, we’ve got to get started as early as possible._**

[_Please chip in $10 to help me pave the way to a 2024 Democratic House majority!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/57258155/387333581/339029266?amount=10&sourceid=&refcode=LVF_EM_FR_3MO_20230112_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjRkOGZiNC1jZTkyLWVkMTEtOWQ3Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PMuBpbybMabDFmbvHXwiI_mmG23KDWfiguoTupH7MQY=)

Team Zoe

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: NBC: "Republicans target Sherrod Brown"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Ohio is already shaping up to be a must-win battleground.
#
I'm up for re-election in 2024, Derek, and as one of just three Democrats in states Trump won and the only remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I'm a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. _(There's already a wealthy Republican state senator considering running against me.)_
NBC says my race could be "even nastier and more expensive" than this year's Senate race in Ohio -- and that race was one of the most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent.
**[Derek, it's going to be my toughest race yet, but if we work together, we can win in Ohio. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and John Fetterman's as we begin the new year?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49649?refcode=em20230112-8206&t=1&akid=8206%2E434096%2EyS8DSS)**
**[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49657?refcode=em20230112-8206&t=20&akid=8206%2E434096%2EyS8DSS)**
I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio. I went to school with the sons and daughters of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. Eventually, those jobs disappeared as one big plant after another left town. Every day, I fight in the U.S. Senate to bring those jobs back to our state and to put money back in the pockets of hardworking families.
I wear a canary pin that a steelworker gave to me years ago -- a reminder that workers used to have to take a canary with them to the coal mines in case there was dangerous gas. The pin is a symbol of the progress we've made on workers' rights and the work we still have left to do.
Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by.
That's what the Dignity of Work is all about, Derek. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do -- whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips -- your work has dignity and I'll fight for you.
**[I need you in this fight, too, Derek. It won't be easy, but if we organize, work hard, and start early, I know we can do this. Please consider chipping in our average online contribution of $26-- or whatever amount makes the most sense for you. ](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49649?refcode=em20230112-8206&t=21&akid=8206%2E434096%2EyS8DSS)**
With gratitude,
Sherrod

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230112-8206-footer&t=22&refcode2=8206_434096_yS8DSS&akid=8206%2E434096%2EyS8DSS)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=8206%2E434096%2EyS8DSS)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=8206%2E434096%2EyS8DSS)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Tell Republican Congressman Santos to resign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| The serial liar and newly-elected U.S. Representative for New York’s 3rd congressional district, George Santos, has managed to make himself a pariah within his own party – in less than a week.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1577%2E5257348%2EESKWn9)
Derek,
The serial liar and newly-elected U.S. Representative for New York’s 3rd congressional district, George Santos, has managed to make himself a pariah within his own party – in less than a week.
Considering the standards of today’s MAGA Republican Party, that’s saying a **_lot._**
House Speaker Kevin McCarthy has vowed not to assign Santos to any top committees — while leaving the door open for other important committee assignments. Profile in courage, that Kevin McCarthy.
Even while the Nassau County GOP in Santos’ home district has called for his immediate resignation.
**_“He’s not welcome here. He’s disgraced the House of Representatives and we do not consider him one of our congresspeople.”_** —Nassau County GOP chair
I agree. I think pretty much everyone in the country does too, except Santos, who is vowing NOT to resign.
**[Join the bipartisan calls for George Santos’ immediate resignation from Congress by signing my petition today. With Republicans abandoning him already, we have a real opportunity to force his resignation if enough people speak up — but we need to act now.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230112-santos-resign-vsp.1GviP_&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230112_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1577%2E5257348%2EESKWn9)**
[TELL SANTOS: RESIGN](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-20230112-santos-resign-vsp.1GviP_&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230112_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=5&akid=1577%2E5257348%2EESKWn9)
---
Santos has betrayed the trust of his constituents and the American people. It’s time for him to go.
Thanks for speaking up and adding your voice today.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1577%2E5257348%2EESKWn9) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1577%2E5257348%2EESKWn9)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---
